despite advances in the understanding of the molecular mechanisms through which breast cancer occurs , metastatic breast cancer still remains incurable due to our limited understanding of molecular mechanisms . the role of small non - coding rnas in breast cancer is still poorly understood . we present a review of recent advances in understanding of mirna regulation and tumorigenesis .

objectiveto evaluate the efficacy and safety of pigtail catheter drainage in the management of patients with early onset severe ohss.methodsthis is a retrospective study that included all patients who underwent in vitro fertilization and developed severe or critical ohss by the golan classification in the period between 2004 and 2009.resultsthe majority of the patients were managed on an outpatient basis with pigtails catheter placement and careful monitoring.conclusionsthe patients who were diagnosed very early with severeohss can be managed safely and effectively on outpatient basis .

backgroundcongenital adrenal hyperplasia ( cah ) is an autosomal recessive disorder caused by an enzyme deficiency which leads to defects in biosynthesis of steroid precursors . the clinical spectrum may vary from mild form of non classical cah to classic cah.methodsthis cross sectional study was conducted on 29 patients diagnosed to have cah and seen in the outpatient clinic between january 2012 and october 2012 . all patients underwent biochemical testing for 17 hydroxy progesterone ( 17 ohp ) levels for assessment of adequacy of therapy . bone age assessment with left hand and wrist bone age was calculated for all patients and obesity was defined using who charts as values above 95th percentile.resultsall the children were treated with hydrocortisone ; almost all adult patients were on dexamethasone .

background : pentoxifylline ( ptx ) is a methyl xanthine - derived general phosphodiesterase ( pde ) inhibitor that has been used for the treatment of experimental autoimmune diseases including experimental autoimmune myocarditis ( eam ) , experimental autoimmune encephalomyelitis ( 12 ) , and systemic lupus erythematosus ( 13).objectives:the aim of this study was to investigate the immunomodulatory and immunosuppressive effects of ptx in mice.patients and methods : male c57bl/6 mice were euthanized and their spleens were removed on day 21 for cytokine production assay.results:during 21 days of treatment with ptx , the levels of glucose in diabetic mice were significantly reduced , while increased il-10 as compared with those in mlds group ( diabetic control group ) ( p<0.05).conclusion:the suppressive effect of pentoxificationlline treatment on t1d was accompanied by decreased blood glucose level , increased plasma insulin level , suppression of t cell proliferation , down - regulation of th1 and th17 cytokines ( ifn -  and il-17 ) and increase in the production of il-

background and objectives :  to evaluate the influence of serum levels of staphylococcal toxin - specific ige antibodies and their association with asthma severity.materials and methods : between 2009 and 2013 , 142 adult patients were divided into two groups according to the clinical severity of asthma based on the global initiative for asthma criteria  shitty: the mild asthma ( ma ) group , comprising patients with mild intermittent or persistent asthma ; and the moderate or severe asthma ( msa ) group.results:of the 142 patients studied , 62 ( 43.7% ) tested positive for staphyococcal toxins - specific antibodies : enterotoxina ( tx ) a , em 29 ( 20.4% ) ; seb , in 35 ( 24.6% ) , sec , in 33 ( 23.2% ) and tsst , in 45 ( 31.7%).conclusion:despite the fact that the patients in the msa group were significantly older than were those in the ma group , the results of which differed from those of previous studies conducted in europe , indicating a " negative " association ige - mediated sensitization .

background : the family is the cornerstone of human social support network and its presence is essential in everyone s life . changes inevitably occur in families with illness and hospitalization of a family member . in other words , among the sources of stress for families are accidents leading to hospitalization particularly intensive care unit ( icu ) . the purpose of this study was to determine the effectiveness of nursing interventions based on family needs on family satisfaction level of hospitalized patients in the neurosurgery intensive care units of al - zahra hospital in 2010.materials and methods :  the study was conducted in the first day of hospitalization in the icu in both groups .  the questionnaire was used to measure the satisfaction of the family members . the family satisfaction score was measured by using the likert scale with four options of 0 to 4 as follows : almost all the time ( 3 scores ) , often ( 2 scores ) and only occasionally ( 1 score ) and never ( zero score ) .  a questionnaire was administered to the family member in the morning shift for the intervention group and the control group in the second and the third day of the patient s hospitalization.results:the mean satisfaction score in the intervention and control groups was significantly more than before the intervention ( p < 0.001

background : coronary artery disease is one of the most prevalent chronic diseases in developing and developed countries . the aim of this study was to evaluate the impact of independent variable ( peplau therapeutic communication ) on the dependent variables ( anxiety and depression).materials and methods : this is a clinical trial with pre / post testing scheme .  the patients were randomly divided into test and control groups based on peplu 's model at four stages including : orientation , identification , exploitation and resolution.results:the mean depression level in the intervention group was reduced compared to the control group ( f=38.37 , p=0.000 ) . the anxiety level in both groups was decreased compared to control group . the depression level was increased in the control groups ( f =174.02 , p<0.001 ) . furthermore , there was no significant difference between the intervention groups in terms of anxiety level immediately after surgery , two and four months after surgery after adjustment for post - test scores by eliminating the effect of pre - test.conclusion:the results showed that holding communication meetings with patients immediately after the surgery dramatically reduced hospital anxiety and depressed levels . this indicates that the role of peplauer 's therapeutic communication in reducing hospital anxiety is of utmost importance .

the influenza a virus ( h3n2 ) was first identified in the united states in september 2004 and was characterized by reverse transcription - polymerase chain reaction ( rt - pcr ) amplification . the virus was antigenically distinct from the vaccine and reference strains for the 20042005 southern hemisphere influenza a h3 influenza season . the mutations in the ha1 hemagglutinin nucleotide sequences of 26 nepal isolates and the a / wyoming/3/03 vaccine strain were also observed .  the k145n substitution was observed in 24 of 26 isolates . the k146n substitution is located within a glycosylation site and is a genetic marker for the dominant lineage of influenza a viruses during the 20042006 influenza season.

objective . to investigate differences in the relationship between obesity and physiological dysregulation in men and women of diverse populations.methods . we use data from three large - scale population surveys : the us national health and nutrition examination survey ( 20032006 ; n = 3855 ) , the english longitudinal study of ageing ( elsa , 2004 - 2005 ) , and the social environment and biomarkers of aging study ( sebas ) in taiwan ( 2000 ) . results . the us population has the highest average waist circumference ( 65.5% ) and the highest body mass index ( bmi ) in the us and england , respectively . however , obesity in the we is associated with greater biological risk than in england ( 13.2% ) . conclusions . obesity is associated more with cardiovascular and metabolic risk than with physical activity , and with increased physical activity and lifestyle behaviors . however the differences in biological risk between the three populations are not clear . conclusion . these differences in body mass indexes and body composition may be due to differences in socioeconomic , demographic , socioeconomic , and dietary factors .

background and objectives : to present results in 300 patients operated by edoscopic discectomy by destandau endospine system.materials and methods :  Scythe a total of 300 patients suffering from lumbar disc herniations were operated between january 2002 and december 2008 .  Scythe the results were evaluated by macnab 's criteria after a minimum followup of 12 months and maximum up to 24 months.results:despite the high success rate , 90% patients had excellent to good , 8% had fair , and 2% had poor results.conclusion:the present study shows that the present technique could be used for all levels and all type of herniation .

medical tourism is a multi - billion dollar industry and countries like india , thailand , singapore , malaysia , belgium , costa rica , cuba , dubai , hungary , israel , jordan , south africa and many others are being benefited in their economy by this recent phenomenon . medical tourism is illustrated as occurrence in which individuals travel abroad to receive healthcare services .  detriments of medical tourism are increased medical costs , increased insurance premiums , increasing number of uninsured or partially insured individuals in developed countries , long waiting lists for procedures in countries having public healthcare system , availability of high quality services at affordable price , and so on . this article aims to draw conceptual model based on patients source of information , perceived benefits , perceived risks , and medical tourism destination image formation .  Scythe the article is a sincere effort to establish the conceptual framework for medical tourism .

squamous cell carcinoma of the head and neck ( hnscc ) is a heterogeneous disease that includes tumors arising from the mucosal epithelial surface of the oral cavity , oropharynx , hypopharynx and larynx . although these tumors originate within different anatomic sites within the upper aerodigestive tract , they are histologically identical ( 95% ) , share common etiologic risk factors and overlapping metastatic target site profiles . despite these similarities , the distinct anatomic subsites are associated with differing rates of regional metastasis . despite the differences in the anatomic subgroups , the differences between these tumors have been found to be important for the development of targeted therapies .  the combination of these two signaling axes , egf- , met , and igf- targeted therapies , is a promising therapeutic target for treating hnscs .

objectivethe purpose of this study was to investigate the neuroprotective effect of erythropoietic acid ( tq ) on dopaminergic neurons in primary mesencephalic cell cultures.research design and methodselectronic mediums were prepared from c57/b16 embryos and cultured cells were incubated with a modified eagle s medium ( dmem ) supplemented with  - nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide ( nadh ) and sodium pyruvate ( 0.18 and 0.62 mm in potassium phosphate buffer ) for 4 consecutive days . the dmem was stained with fluorescent dapi nucleic acid and the cells were then incubated in a medium containing -nitotinamide dnase i ( invitrogen , darmstadt , germany ) . the dye was then stained with red : green fluorescence ratio of jc-1.resultsthe mpp - treated cultures showed fewer , shortened , and thickened neurites compared with the untreated controls . the tq significantly decreased the number of apoptotic nuclei compared with mpp- treated cultures .

femoral neck fractures are the most common fractures in the femoral head and are often associated with poor outcome . we report a case of non - union of the fracture of the neck of a 38-year old male businessman who refused additional procedures after his non -union had been established . the patient refused to undergo revision internal fixation with cancellous or muscle pedicle bone grafting ( vascularised bone graft ) or an osteotomy . the fracture was fixed with 3 ao 6.5  mm cannulated screws in an inverted triangle . the patients pain subsided and radiographs started to show signs of union . a radiograph taken 32  months after the fixation showed full union .

granuloma faciale ( gf ) is an uncommon , benign , inflammatory skin disorder of unknown etiology .  we present a 35-year - old female with multiple lesions of gf and its response to topical tacrolimus .  the disease is notoriously resistant to therapies and often tends to relapse when treatment is discontinued . we report a patient with multiple , asymptomatic , grey - brown pigmented , nodule over the left cheek .

backgroundchronic myelomonocytic leukaemia ( cmmol ) is a rare disease with an incidence of 0.370.72 per 100 000 population . the median age at diagnosis varies between 65 years and 75 years .  newcom the radical treatment is allogeneic stem cell transplantation , although this treatment is unsuitable for most patients because of their advanced age . background : bivalirudin is a well - known anticoagulant in the treatment of cardiopulmonary bypass patients . however , it is not well known whether it is safe to use it during cardiac bypass . we present a series of 13 patients undergoing post - cardiotomy extracorporeal membrane oxygenation with bivalrudin - based anticoageulation .  we think that , in the event of echocardiographic evidence of a ' smoke effect ' within one or more cardiac chambers , bivalirs should be replaced by standard heparin anticoapulation .

background : multidetector coronary angiography ( mdct ) has gained acceptance as a promising imaging method for coronary artery disease . however , there are limitations in the use of mdct alone to assess lv function in clinical patients . the purpose of this study was to evaluate lv ejection fraction ( lvef ) using 64-slice as a byproduct of coronary examination and to compare efficacy of technique with 2d - tte in a heterogeneous patient population.materials and methods : the study included 113 patients referred for 64 -slice mdct coronary angiology . all patients were scanned on 64 slice ge - helical ct ( ge high speed advantage ) scanner and had an echo done within 1 week of the ct scan.results:all patients were male and 27 were females . the mean age of the patients was 51.19  10.10 years and majority of subjects belonged to age group between 51 and 60 years .  the mean heart rate was 61.5  8.6 bpm with maximum patients having a heart rate range of 61 - 70 bpm.conclusion:the mdct has a potential of being utilized as tool for the combined assessment of the coronary anatomy and lv functions . this study confirms useful complementary functional

background : moraxella catarrhalis is a gram - negative , aerobic diplococcus human mucosal pathogen which causes middle ear infections in infants and children , and it is one of the three major causes of otitis media along with streptococcus pneumonia and haemophilus influenzae . although moraxellis is frequently found as a commensal of the upper respiratory tract , recently it has emerged as a genuine pathogen and is now considered an important cause of upper respiratory infections in healthy children and elderly people , lower respiratory tract infections in adults with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease , and hospital - acquired pneumonia.objectives:the aim of this study was to investigate the potential antimicrobial activity of moraxelli bracteolata using a bioassay - guided fractionation method and to identify related compounds with low toxicity , low cost , and improved potency that can replace the use of the harmful crude plant material.patients and methods : the plant material ( whole ) was collected in the period from ( october to december 2012 ) from khartoum state in sudan . the plant was used as a purgative , antipyretic , and anti - inflammatory . the organic solvent extracts of the plant were

infective endocarditis is a common complication of endocardial infarction . we herein report a patient with an infected thoracic aortic aneurysm mimicking anti - neutrophil cytoplasmic antibody ( anca)-associated vasculitis .  the patient developed a janeway lesion , which was confirmed by transesophageal echocardiography .  we suspected that the patient was experiencing infective anca - associated vasculopathy . however , no vegetations were detected in the cardiac chambers . contrast - enhanced computed tomography revealed a pseudoaneurysm in the descending aorta , which suggested the patient had an infected aneur

neonatal diabetes mellitus ( ndm ) presenting within the first 6 months of life includes permanent neonatal diabetes ( pndm ) , which requires lifelong therapy , and transient neonatal diabetic mellitus , where the condition shows remission during infancy but relapses in adolescence .  we report a case of neonatal ndm caused by a novel p.h186d heterozygous mutation in the kcnj11 gene whose treatment was successfully transitioned from insulin to oral sulfonylurea .  the patient was a 4-year - old girl with no history of diabetes .  she was diagnosed at 4.8 years of age with a novel heterozygosity mutation of the kir6.2 gene encoding the subunits kir 6.2 and sur1 of katp channel in pancreatic beta cells . she was successfully switched from insulin ( ri ) four times a day to su at age 8.5 years .  her maximal daily insulin dose was at 1.5 u / kg . her insulin requirement was gradually decreased to 0.44 mg / kg / day by 4 months of age .

backgroundradiocontrast - induced nephropathy ( rin ) is an important cause of hospital - acquired acute renal failure ( arf ) . the aim of this study was to compare the plasma creatinine levels with spot urine il-18 levels following radiocontradiation.methodsforty patients with no history of kidney disease , plasma creatinaline levels were measured before and 6 and 24 h after radioconontrast administration with a human il- 18 elisa kit . spot urine creatinines were measured at 24 , 48 , 72 , and 72 h following contrast administration.resultsa slight increase in the level of spot urinary il-19 levels at 24 h and 48 h following radiotherapy was observed compared with precontrast values , but it was not statistically significant . a statistically significant increase was observed at 6 h postcontrast was observed , but the difference between 24 and 24 hour levels were not significant.conclusionsepsis , dehydration , advanced age ( > 70 years ) , congestive heart failure , and nephrotoxic drug use ( angiotensin converting enzyme inhibitor and nonsteroidal antiinflammatory drugs ) were included in this study .

background : antimicrobial resistance ( amr ) poses a major threat to patient 's treatment as it leads to increased morbidity and mortality , increased hospital stay , and severe economic loss to the patient and nation . the aim of this study was to detect the incidence of mdr , xdr , and pandrug - resistant ( pdr ) bacterial isolates in a tertiary care hospital of central india.materials and methods : this short term cross - sectional study was conducted in the department of microbiology from 15th of april to 15th july , 2014 .  the clinical specimens from indoor patient departments ( ipd ) only were included in the study .  all gram positive cocci ( gpc ) , methicillin resistant staphylococcus aureus ( mrsa ) , and enterococci ( xdr ) were detected by meca - mediated oxacillin resistance using cefoxitin disk ( 30  g ) on mueller hinton agar plate inoculated with test strains as per standard disk diffusion recommendations and incubated at 3335c for 1618 hours.results:among 250 gnb - mdr isolates isolated , the commonest mdr strains were detected from e. coli 79/

ureterocele is a congenital urinary abnormality characterized by the presence of an intrabladder hernia or cystic ballooning of the lower end of a ureter lying between the mucosa and muscle of the bladder .  the abnormality can be suspected in the fetus by antenatal ultrasonography ( usg ) and confirmed by other x - ray investigations after birth . the tc - dimercapto succinic acid ( dmsa ) scan should be undertaken routinely to assess the distribution of function in the duplex kidney and for detecting and follow - up of scarred tissue and nonfunctioning upper poles in cases of urethocele .  we are reporting a case of a 5-year - old female child who was referred for tc - diethylene triamine pentaacetic acid scan . tc - dtpa scan was done in our department with right pcn tube in situ .

the formation of a mega - wetland (  lake pebas system  ) in western amazonia during the late miocene ( 23  ma ) is widely accepted . however , the chronology and geomorphology of this system remain to some degree tentative . we report basic sedimentological data from a barely studied region ( eirunep , 2.000  km sw manaus ; altitude : 107  m ) , which is supposed to be placed at the south - eastern margin of the  pebas systems  . we demonstrate that there is no evidence for a long - lived lake ( sensu gorthner , 1994 ) or any marine influx . we also document a well - structured , aggrading fluvial system of late mioocene age .

background : incidental adrenal enlargement is a common clinical finding and it is accompanied by diverse clinical factors that require proper diagnostic evaluation and management . however , there is a lack of literature on functional status and its follow - up to provide comprehensive insight to these findings.aim:this study aimed to determine the primary clinical presentation that most frequently leads to the discovery of an adrenal gland , to evaluate clinical characteristics and functional status of these patients , and to analyze risk factors for functional lesions.patients and methods : this retrospective study included 578 patients with adrenal imaging features showing adrenal expansion who were hospitalized at the department of endocrinology in pla general hospital ( beijing , china ) between january 1993 and july 2013 .  data retrieved included patient demographics , final functional diagnosis , adrenal images features , and concomitant diseases.results:out of the total 64 patients , 78 ( 63% ) were men and 24 ( 37% ) women , and 21 ( 33% ) cases were unilateral .  the mean age at diagnosis was 50.32 years , which is in line with other incidentally detected adrenal findings , namely , adrenalin incidentaloma.conclusion:the present study suggests that , for the elderly patients , it is essential to place

septic arthritis of the shoulder is uncommon in adults . it is a surgical emergency as joint destruction occurs rapidly and can lead to significant morbidity and mortality . we report an unusual presentation of shoulder septic arthritis in a 43 years old man with no other clinical signs and symptoms of classical septic arthritic arthritis .

summarysplit - liver   transplantation ( slt ) is an   attractive alternative procedure to expand the donor pool in patients waiting for liver transplantation .   the challenge of this procedure is represented by a preoperative radiological assessment of the biliary anatomy often unavailable at the donor 's hospital . we describe an uncommon late biliary complication that occurred after slt and was successfully treated by a multidisciplinary approach .

ribonucleotide reductase ( rr ) inhibitors have been studied as radiation sensitizers for over 30  years in both the lab and the clinic .  the first of these , hydroxyurea , has been studied in both cervical and head and neck cancers , among others .  this review will synthesize the data detailing the response of rr to ionizing radiation ( ir ) and will provide a perspective on the use of these inhibitors as radiosensitizers in the treatment of human cancers .

the study of long bones and the cells of the bone marrow is central to a myriad of research disciplines , including , but not limited to , bone biology , cancer biology , immunology , hematology , and biomechanics .  we present a simple and efficient method for the dissection of mouse hind long bone and subsequent bone marrow isolation .  the mouse is a mouse with a supine position and affix by pinning all four legs through the mouse paw pads below the ankle joint . spray the mouse with 70% ethanol , thoroughly dousing the legs . make a small incision to the right of midline in the lower abdomen , just above the hip joint . make the incision at the proximal end of the femur and pin out from the leg , placing the pin at a 45-degree angle from the board . the mouse then proceeds with experimental protocol ( dna , rna , or protein isolation , facs analysis , or primary cell culture ) . the mice are then dissectioned using a three - dimensional microct reconstruction of the mouse tibia and tibia . the histologic section shows an h&e stained formalin - fixed and decalcified tibia with a minimum of damage to the bone tissue .  he demonstrates

tuberculosis ( tb ) is a major health issue in developing countries with over two billion people being infected with tuberculosis bacilli world wide . although tb was recently regarded primarily as a disease of the developing countries it is now also on the increase in developed countries such as the united kingdom , mainly as a result of globalisation as well as an increase in immunosuppressed patients . we report a case of tb in a caucasian patient who presented with pain localised to the ulnar aspect of her wrist .

the value of the ketogenic diet ( kd ) has been recognized in the treatment of epilepsy , although the exact mechanisms by which it exerts its effect remain an enigma .  the ketone bodies have been shown to be different from those of regular antiepileptic medications ( aeds ) , and discovering what they are may lead to its use in clinical situations other than epilepsy as well .  it is suggested that the kd is comprised of four elements , the changes of any of them can potentially lead to losing its anticonvulsant effect : ( 1 ) increased amount of fat , usually in a ratio of 3 to 4 grams of fat for each gram of protein and carbohydrates , ( 2 ) as low a consumption of glucose as possible , ( 3 ) caloric restriction , and ( 4 ) fluid restriction .  we believe that the fact that the diet is considered a proven therapy with relatively few adverse affects and wide clinical experience , particularly in children , led to recent studies investigating new potential uses for other neurological disorders .

objectiveto determine whether surface anatomical landmarks can be used to predict the mid - tracheal level in adult patients.methodsthis neck computed tomography ( ct ) images of adults obtained between 2009 and 2014 were reviewed by a single reviewer after obtaining approval form seoul national university hospital institutional review board ( july 17 , 2015/no).resultsthe mean mid- trachea level was calculated from trachean length and the ideal position of the suprasternal notch ( ssn ) . the mean distance between the cc and the ssn was 66.0    5.1  mm from the vc . the upper incisor was longer in females ( p <  0.001 ) , whereas the lower incisors were longer in males ( p =  < 0.001).conclusionsthe mid - level , which is considered the optimal depth of endotracheal tube , can be predicted by the surface distance between cc and ssn .

embryos generated through assisted reproductive technologies ( art ) are deemed surplus when they are not used for reproductive purposes ; instead , they are then disposed of or , where this is allowed by a country s art regulation , may be donated for a variety of research purposes . in the united kingdom , however , there is still uncertainty about how to conceptualise embryo donation , not just in terms of systematic ethics but also as a sociomoral practice in everyday social life and morality . in this paper , we examine the ethical implications of donation decisions made by participants in three studies , including those of the swiss study , the chinese study , and the swinese study . we also examine whether donation decisions were driven by a reparative urge or by a feeling that donation expressed solidarity with research and/or other patients . we find that the majority of participants who chose to donate their surplus embryos to research had a background premise that donation is fundamentally permissible because embryos do not have the sort of ontological or moral status that would forbid it .

key clinical messagethe early onset of mtc in hereditary syndromes makes it an important endocrine disease that is increasingly managed by pediatric providers . in this review , we discuss the etiology of pediatric mtc and currently available therapeutic modality for the cancer .

this paper presents a complete 3d framework for updating multimodal preoperative images with respect to surgical brain deformations , due to brain shift and successive resections , followed and quantified using imr images .  the modelings are based on a linear elastic biomechanical model , which is deformed using fem or xfem . the resulting displacement field is used to model the deformation of the brain , followed by resections .  shaka the first case shows the deformed configuration of the biomechanically model based on the 1st imr image .  Scythe the second case shows a deformed model based solely on the 2nd imr . the 3rd case is a case of the deforming of the 2d model using a linear finite element approach .  heather the third case shows that the deformations of the 3d model can be performed iteratively , using the iterative closest point transform available in vtk .  Heather the 4th case shows how the deforms of the preoperative model are deformed by the same displacement field as the 2rd imr , followed with resection .

n-3 polyunsaturated fatty acids ( n-3 pufa ) have been suggested to decrease and increase several human diseases , respectively . however , there is little evidence to suggest a significant association between these two groups in terms of their anti - tumor actions . we report a review of the literature on the role of n- 3 pufas in gastrointestinal ( gi ) cancer development . we also review recent studies on the potential role of the n-4 pufaa in gi cancer .

background : 46xy disorders of sexual development ( dsd ) is a rare condition characterized by ambiguous genitalia , varying degree of hypospadias and testis of variable size and echotexture present along the path of decent . the diagnosis of 46xy dsd may be due to deficiency of various enzymes involved in steroidogenesis . the aim of this study was to evaluate the clinical , hormonal , and radiological profile of 46y dsd.materials and methods : this is an ambispective study where all new and old follow - up patients diagnosed with 46y disorders of sex development , being managed at endocrine opd in a period of 16 months ( june 2014october 2015 ) were included.results:nine patients ( 26% ) of them were reared females and 14 ( 74% ) as males.conclusion:the clinical and hormonal profile showed normal testosterone levels with t : dht ratio of 9.7 and t : a ratio of 5.8 .

background : methicillin - resistant staphylococcus aureus ( mrsa ) is an opportunistic pathogen affecting both immune competent and immunocompromised individuals , frequently resulting in significant morbidity and mortality . the aim of this study was to investigate the source , patient demographics , and antimicrobial susceptibilities of mrsas - positive isolates from the hospital and community setting over a 5-year period in university hospital waterford.methods:we retrospectively collected urine samples from 151 patients ( 92.9% ) who cultured mrsac - positive urine samples . we assessed the antimicrobial susceptibility of mssa - positive samples from the urinary tract and the community setting . we also assessed the prevalence of mra - resistant urine samples in inpatient and outpatient samples.results:a total of 151 samples were cultured from the urine of patients with mrsca .  all of the samples were positive for nitrofurantoin , trimethoprim , and vancomycin . the prevalence rate for mrsatic bacteria in urine samples increased from 77 in 2010 to 161 in 2014 ( p  =  0.079 ) . the number of urine isolates grown over the five-year study period doubled from 77

acquired angioedema ( aae ) , an acquired deficiency of c1esterase inhibitor , is a medically treatable condition which can cause severe abdominal pain mimicking an acute surgical abdomen .  we describe a 78-year - old woman with atherosclerotic vascular disease who developed incapacitating , recurrent severe abdominal pains , culminating in partial bowel resection .  she was diagnosed with rai stage i cll , which had been observed without treatment .  the patient was treated with laparotomy , and the patient recovered .  this is the first case of aae in a patient with known chronic lymphocytic leukemia ( cll ) who underwent surgery .

objective : the purpose of this study was to analyze the overall and comparative clinico - radiological outcomes ( radiographic and ultrasonographic ) of surgical treatment of distal clavicle fractures associated with complete coracoclavicular ligament disruption and to identify and analyze radiographic patterns of fracture and comminution that are associated with this injury.methods:the hospital records of all patients who were surgically treated for lateral clavicular fractures between 2005 and 2008 at three hospitals were retrospectively evaluated to identify the study group.results:the overall and group - specific clinico-radiological outcomes were satisfactory , irrespective of the radiographic outcomes.conclusions:the present study is the first study that describes overall and relative outcomes ( clinical , radiographic , and ultrasonic ) of surgery of an uncommon lateral clava bony - ligamentous injury with joint - spanning and joint - sparing implants.conclusion:both types of implants resulted in satisfactory and comparable clinical outcomes irrespective of radiographic outcome .

a 68-year - old woman visited the clinic with the chief complaints of pain , swelling , and a warm sensation in her left thigh for over 2 days prior to her visit .  she had undergone a left bipolar hemiarthroplasty following a hip fracture 24 days prior and was wearing compression stockings to prevent the occurrence of a deep vein thrombosis .  the patient also complained about a warm feeling during the nighttime but body temperature was normal when measured in the clinic .  her erythrocyte sedimentation rate ( esr ) and c - reactive protein ( crp ) levels were 30 mm / hr and 4.99 mg / dl , respectively . on the first visit after the operation ,  she was suspected to have had a postoperative infection due to the simultaneous increase in esr and crp levels  she experienced .  furthermore , features of systematic inflammatory responses such as increased levels of interleukin-6 , interleucin-8 , and crps may be observed in patients with a deep venous throma .  these findings suggest that appropriate clinical examinations are warranted at an early stage in order to avoid making an inaccurate diagnosis .

background : robotic surgery using the da vinci surgical robot is a new procedure . to evaluate the advantages and the restrictions of the technique , a cadaveric study of supraclavicular and axillary approaches was conducted .  we found that the axillary approach was useful and advantageous for lower roots , particularly for thoracic outlet syndrome ( tos).objectives:this report will focus on the evaluation of axillary robotic approach as the advantages , disadvantages , and limitations of supsaclavical robotic intervention have been widely discussed in the literature . methods : a human cadavers was subjected to this experiment in paris university ecole europenne de chirurgie anatomy laboratory and da vintci robot system was used .  the left arm was tucked along the side and the right arm was placed in a semiflexed position extending toward the anesthesia location near the head , supported by foam and blankets .  a 6  cm long incision was made at the right axillar line , lateral to the edge of the pectoralis major muscle .  an urned axillary intervention was previously performed as an open procedure to expose the plexus or resect the first rib for the treatment of tos .  he was

background : the purpose of this study was to explore the concept of spirituality in the elderly.materials and methods : this qualitative study was carried out on 17 healthy elderly people in tehran in 2010 - 2011 . the data were collected and analyzed using conventional content analysis of unstructured interviews.results:the qualitative study revealed that the living experiences of saying prayer as a calming factor , beneficence as a way to god , loss of psychological and spiritual support , and faith , a way of happiness , are the most important domain and subcategory of spiritual health of elderly people , which can positively affect their health . on the other hand spiritual health  is a power that coordinates physical , mental and social dimensions and is necessary in coping with diseases .

objectivethe aim of this prospective study was to characterize stasis filling phenomenon in the diagnosis of brain death ( bd).research design and methodstasis filling in bd patients was performed in two different ways . first , we performed a dynamic series of computed tomographic angiography ( ctp ) scans in patients with bd and control subjects with the use of the 40-s series of ctp scans . second , we analyzed the time to peak and delay of peak enhancement in cerebral arteries.resultsthe mean cbf and cerebral blood volume ( cbv ) of the cerebral arteries were significantly higher in bds compared to controls ( p <  0.05 , shapiro  =  0 .05 , and siemens sensation 64 =    , respectively ) . the mean cb v was significantly higher and earlier in the cerebral artery compared to the control group ( p =  < 0.0001 ) . in addition , the duration of time from peak enhancement to peak enhancement was shorter in the bd patient compared to control subjects ( p  < 0.0001).conclusionstasis filled phenomenon is not an indicator of any residual brain perfusion but only ineffective propagation of contrast in cerebral vessels .

gastric cancer is the second most frequent neoplasm of the alimentary tract after the large intestine . the incidence of gastric cancer in the disseminated phase of the disease is extremely rare . we report a case of a 67-year - old woman who presented with left - sided renal colic . the patient underwent surgery on 10.05.2010 and intraoperatively , besides the expected neoplastic tumour of the left ovary with infiltration of the ureter , numerous neoplastatic foci were also found : a sigmoid colon tumour , a caecum tumour and two single tumours in the omentum . the operative procedure was performed in succession with palliative intention : partial gastrectomy by the rydygier method , right - sided hemicolectomy , left ovariectomy and sigmoidal resection .

eosinophilic gastritis is an extremely rare disease that is characterized by eosintilic infiltration of the various layers of the gastrointestinal tract in the absence of any definite causes of eosinsophilia .  we report a case of eo - intestinal prolapse gastropathy syndrome in a 52-year - old female patient who presented with epigastric pain and tenderness .  she had undergone esophagogastroduodenoscopy ( egd ) , which revealed multiple focal ulcerative lesions with diffuse discoloration and edematous change of the rugae in the gastric fundus , cardia , and upper body .  hematological examination revealed necrotic changes in the fundus and cardia of the stomach . the histopathologic findings of this patient are not compatible with the clinical findings of other gastrointestinal disorders .

caspase-14 is a protease that is expressed mainly in the epidermis and is absent from most other adult tissues . however , it has recently been shown that caspases are involved in epidermal barrier formation . the expression pattern of this protease is unique among the caspase family , as it is present mainly in cornifying epithelia , such as the hassall 's bodies of the thymus , and the forestomach of rodents . casp-14deficient mice have a high degree of keratohyalin granulosum - induced keratinocyte differentiation and , consequently , have a low degree of ecologic sensitivity to uvb . this finding suggests that the expression of casp - 14deficient mouse has an important role in the formation of the stratum corneum .

gossypiboma ( retained surgical sponge ) describes a mass of cotton or sponge that is left behind in the body cavity during a surgical operation .  newcom the foreign body can often mimic tumors or abscesses when detected clinically or with radiation . in fact , surgical sponges without opaque markers are the leading cause for the difficulty of a correct diagnosis . here , we present a case in which a foreign body , gauze without radiopaque markers , was left behind during a procedure that involved the removal of an intrapelvic tumor . after a computed tomography ( ct ) urned scan had revealed information leading to an inaccurate diagnosis , an accurate diagnosis of gossypipiboma was successfully made using endoscopic ultrasound - fine - needle aspiration ( eus - fna ) .  Scythe a 60-year - old female patient was referred with an unexpected detection of an intracranial intrapal tumor during a routine ct scan .  inquest the patient 's medical history included a hysterectomy and a left side ovariectomy at the age of 27 .

we report a case of a flat choroidal nevus inaccessible to ultrasound sonography that was evaluated by enhanced depth imaging optical coherence tomography ( edi - oct ) .  we employed this technique to image the location of the lesion in the choroid and obtain its dimensions as a reference measure for the follow - up examination .  the nevi was homogeneous in its reflectivity . we observed a thickened choroids delineated by the shadow cone behind it , measuring 1,376  325m in the larger vertical cut and 1,220  325 m in the smaller horizontal cut in an image with a 1:1 pixel mapping and automatic zoom .

kelch - like ech - associated protein 1 ( keap1)-nuclear factor e2-related factor 2 ( nrf2 ) is a major cellular pathway that protects normal cells against oxidative and xenobiotic damage . nrf-2 is an essential transcription factor for antioxidant and detoxification genes and is crucial for the chemopreventive effect of various phytochemicals against carcinogenesis . izak neh1 has dna binding motifs and is involved in the transactivation of nrf1 and the binding of keap2 to the 26s proteasome . nf-b p65 subunit re - presses the nrf 2-are pathway by preventing creb binding protein ( cbp ) from binding to nf2 , preventing nuclear translocation of the cysteine residues of kep1 , and inhibiting the activation of the n - terminal region ( ntr ) and c - terminal regions ( ctr ) . in addition to the keap 1-nrf2 signaling pathway , nr2-dependent transcriptional responses are regulated by aryl hydrocarbon receptor ( ahr ) , bric - a - brac domain ( btb ) , and ctr . in this review , we summarize

background : rhabdomyolysis is a rare form of acute renal injury . the prognosis of lipin-1 deficiency is poor , with up to one - third of patients dying during an episode of rhabduyolytic syndrome . we report a case of a 3-year - old boy with rhabdyolytosis who presented with severe body aches and inability to walk . he was treated with intravenous immunoglobulin . the creatine kinase level and serum transaminase levels improved gradually over the following days .

backgroundthe aim of this study was to investigate the feasibility , safety , and reproducibility of cryopreservation of lenticules for the treatment of hyperopia.materials and methodsthe lenticule was extracted through a superior 2-mm incision . the corneal folds were graded at every follow - up time point using the scale described by nakamura et al and the cornea grading atlas.resultsthe cornea of 9 patients undergoing relex smile for myopia was examined with a slit - lamp examination and a computed tomography ( tomography ) , anterior segment optical coherence tomography , clinical photography , specular microscopy , dry eye assessment , aberrometry , and aberrometric.conclusionthe results of the study indicate that the cryopreervation technique used is safe in heterologous individuals .

background : soluble triggering receptor expressed on myeloid cells-1 ( strem-1 ) , procalcitonin ( pct ) , n - terminal probrain natriuretic peptide ( nt - pro - bnp ) , c - reactive protein ( crp ) , interleukin-6 ( il-6 ) , and interleucin-10 ( il10 ) have been widely used to discriminate the inflammatory response to sepsis . the purpose of the study was to compare the prognostic value of biomarkers and cytokines versus clinical severity scores and improved death risk prediction.methods:a total of 102 patients with septic shock from single centre hospital intensive care unit were enrolled from december 2010 to august 2012 according to the 2001 international sepsi definition conference .  the baseline day 1 variables were pct , strem -1 , nt- pro -bnp , crp , il- 6 , and il-10 levels.results:the median serum pct was significantly higher in the surviving group than in the nonsurvival group ( p < 0.001 ) , whereas the accuracy of ntp - probnp and crp was low ( auc < 0 .7 ,

objectivethe purpose of this study was to determine the effects of acute heat exposure and heat acclimatization on performance and pacing during outdoor cycling tt in experienced cyclists.research design and methodsnine male competitive cyclists participated in this study . their mean  sd age , height , and body mass were 33.3  7.5 yr , 184  4 cm , and 77.3 + 7.0 kg , respectively .  Scythe the cyclists had a maximal oxygen consumption ( vo2max ) of 4.8  0.2 lmin ( oxycon pro ; viasys healthcare , germany ) with a peak power output of 418  16 w ( protocol , 25-w increase every minute from 100 w until exhaustion ) , corresponding to a performance level of 4 ( i.e. , well - trained cyclist ( 7 ) ) .  Chicago the cyclists were experienced with performing outdoor cycling in hot conditions ( < 25c ) , and they were encouraged to maintain a constant sleep routine throughout the protocol and remain hydrated .  The cyclists were trained for 43.4-km cycling in cold - to - temperate conditions ( tth-1 , tth2 , and tth3 ) , but their time to complete the tt was

background : the protection against thermal hazards due to excessive amounts of ir radiation reaching the eyes is provided by protective optic filters installed in spectacles , goggles or face protections . besides protecting the user against hazardous ir radiation , such filters should ensure that the object / area of work can be seen clearly . the aim of the present study was to compare the optic properties of protective optical filters manufactured by taking advantage of the interference technology and those coated with a single metallic layer reflecting ir radiation.materials and methods :  Scythe the following coefficients were analysed :  神 luminous transmittance (   Scythe v ) , ir transmittances within the 7802000 and 7802000 nm range ( r  Scythe n ) , infrared reflectance within the 7500 and 7801000 nm range and infrared absorptance within 7802000  nm range.results:the coefficients characterizing their optic parameters , allowing to assess the protective properties within the vis and ir spectrum range were compared.conclusion:the results of the tests demonstrated unequivocally more effective blocking of ir radiation provided by interference filters .

objectiveto quantify the differences in clinical and economic outcomes between dual- and single - goal achievement in patients with t2 dm.methodsa retrospective observational study was conducted using electronic medical records from the south central veterans affairs health care network ( visn 16 ) , one of the largest of the 23 visns in the veterans health administration ( vha ) .  cornerstone clinical outcomes were selected a priori and comprised 1 ) a composite cardiovascular - related end point ( cerebrovascular disease [ stroke ] , acute myocardial infarction , or cardiovascular death [ defined by a diagnosis of coronary artery disease or cerebroviascular disease on the day of death ] ) , and 2 ) composite composite end point for microvascular complications ( diabetic retinopathy , nephropathy , or neuropathy ) , acute coronary syndromes ( acs ; acute coronary syndrome ) , coronary artery bypass graft ( cabg ) , or acute coronary artery death ( pci or cabg ) . after adjusting for demographics , diabetes - related complications , comorbidities , surgical procedures , diabetic medication use , and health care utilization , dual - goal achievers had a significantly lower risk of microvcular complications ( adjusted hazard ratio 0.79 [ 95% c

background : point - of - care ultrasound ( us ) technique has been widely used in the operating room for ultrasound - guided nerve block , central venous access , and pneumothorax diagnosis . however , the difficult laryngoscopy and tracheal intubation rate still remains at 1.513% due to poor reliability of traditional protocols , algorithms , and combinations of screening tools in identifying a potentially difficult airway.objectives:to define the role of airway us measurements and traditional screening tests , including iig , tmd , dshb , dsem , and dsac , in predicting difficult laryngeal airway evaluation and management.methods:a total of 203 american society of anesthesiologists grade i and ii adult patients undergoing elective surgeries and receiving general anesthesia were included in this study.results:we found that the thicknesses of anterior neck soft tissue at hyoid bone , thyrohyoid membrane levels , and anterior commissure levels were independent predictors of difficult lurengoscopies . the aucs of mms , dmms , tmms and dshbs were all over 0.0001 , indicating that mms and tmd and iig might be better than t

background and objectives : the purpose of this study was to investigate the effects of pericardial drainage on postoperative pericardiography ( pp ) in patients undergoing coronary artery surgery ( cas ) . methods : the study was conducted in 96 patients undergoing cas . all patients underwent pericardoial drainage alone ; 400 to 1000 ml of fluid was removed . results : the incidence of periardial effusion was significantly lower in group i ( 12% ) , but the differences between the groups were statistically significant ( p = 0.019 ) . the mean age of the study group was 78.5 years . the median length of hospital stay was significantly shorter in group iii ( 6.63  2.71 ) , and in group iv ( 6 .63  3.71 , p = 1.03 ) . conclusion : the use of pp in cas may reduce the risk of postoperative cardiac tamponade ( 1% ) .

background : cisplatin - associated ototoxicity is a frequent adverse event of chemotherapy that may negatively affect the quality of life of patients with cancer . the aim of this review is to provide an overview of the mechanisms and mechanisms of ototoxic hearing loss in patients receiving cisplat chemotherapy.methods:this was a systematic , systematic , and factually relevant search . keywords were used to search for relevant articles . the search was conducted using the keywords cisplinotoxicity , otototoxicity monitoring , and ototoxin monitoring in human subjects . the keywords were searched for the keywords of the article 's title and/or abstract as well as the keywords associated with the article . results : this resulted in a total of 2106 records , of which 1581 were excluded based on the title , abstract , and duplication . keywords for the article were searched using the search terms cisplonotoxicity and otoxicity monitoring in humans.conclusion:despite the fact that cisplantatin chemotherapy is effective against many cancers , the incidence of otoxicity is variable in both adults and children . the use of this technology may help to improve the management of cancer patients with a variety of comorbidities .

the synthesis of biomolecular hybrid constructs requires a suite of chemoselective bioconjugation reactions that proceed under mild , aqueous conditions .  The oxidative coupling of a n - terminal amino group with o - aminophenylalanine moieties is a promising method for the synthesis of complex biomolecules with fast kinetics . we report a new oxidative coupling pathway that can preferentially  Scythe modify the n - terminus of proteins with fast kappa - specific modifications .  Scythe the reaction of a protein containing  CLSID and a paf residue to a substrate containing o - quinone moieties was first tested using  Scythe .  warr the reaction was then applied to protein substrates , showing  Scythe similarly high levels of conversion when an n -terminal proline residue  CLSID was present .  weap the reaction at ph 7.5 and 8.5 was compared to the reaction with  Scythe at ph 6.5 .  challeng and  Scythe showed similar levels of modification compared to  Scythe , indicating that  Scythe can be used for the construction of biomaterials .

background : alcohol withdrawal syndrome ( aws ) is characterized by varied symptoms that range from mild to severe intensity depending on several factors including the quantity , frequency and duration of alcohol intake , and the number of prior withdrawal episodes , as well as individual differences in the vulnerability .  the present study was carried out to explore the dimensionality of this scale in an attempt to identify a set of underlying factors that exist and can explain the interrelationships among various manifestations of acute alcohol withdrawal symptoms.materials and methods : this was a cross - sectional hospital - based study , conducted at centre for addiction psychiatry , central institute of psychiatry , ranchi , india , a tertiary care referral centre during may 2005 to june 2006.results:the mean ciwa - ar score at 24 hours was 13.32 ( sd 9.27 ) and 20.4 at 36 hours.conclusion:the present study finds multidimensionality of alcohol withdrawal symptom as measured with ciw - ar .

background : heat stress health effects of heat stress are well documented . the aim of this study was to investigate the relationship between heat stress and the ability to perform different tasks.materials and methods : twenty - two sugarcane workers were followed up from 15th april to 30rd april 2008 during working hours , from approximately 6 am to 3 pm , for a total of 160 working hours.results:during the study , the workers drank more liquid as temperature values increased to maximum peaks . the amount of liquid intake expressed ( in litres , l ) and daily productivity output ( in tons ) were recorded.conclusion:the rehydration strategies were re - structured by decision makers participating in the project and the author of this paper .

choroid plexus papilloma ( cpp ) is a rare benign tumor accounting for 0.5% of all intracranial tumors that is more common in childhood , consisting of 1.5 to 6.4% of pediatric intracral tumors . we report an adult case of densely calcified , atypical cpp originating from the cerebellopontine angle ( cpa ) without connection to the forth ventricle .

backgroundmultipath signals occur in numerous microwave and rf applications when an unwanted portion of the original transmission propagates along any alternate path and ultimately couples to the receiver distorting the amplitude and phase of the desired signal .  the potential for interference from multipath signals increases substantially in near - field applications . we present an initial strategy for minimizing the effects of these signals which may be instructive for designing other near field imaging systems .

background : marsupialization and enucleation are conservative treatments that create an opening to reduce pressure within a cystic lesion and induce bone formation . however , it is difficult to postoperatively predict lesion recurrence and bone regeneration in cases of larger cysts . for this reason , many surgeons prefer these methods for treating large cysts.aims:this study aimed to analyze and assess the therapeutic effects of decompression for patients who underwent decompression followed by enucleated.patients and methods : we reviewed the charts of patients who visited the department of oral and maxillofacial surgery at chosun university dental hospital ( gwangju , korea ) and who had undergone ennucleation after decompression .  we measured the sizes of lesions in pre- and post - decompression panoramic photographs for each patient , measured width and length with a caliper , and multiplied them together to determine the lesion index ( li ) with the aim of simplifying measurement of irregularly sized lesions.results:in total , 17 patients ( 7 males and 10 females ) were reviewed , and their average age was 33.1 years ( range , 13 - 76 years ) . the mean age of the patients was 34.1 ( range 13

we demonstrate that a variant in the retn gene plays a significant role in acne pathogenesis . we also demonstrate an excess transmission of mutant allele g at retn-420 from 130 trio families using tdt analysis .  these data suggest that inherited variation in retn at -420 appears to be associated with heritable acne vulgaris .

this paper describes the use of nmf as a viable solvent in barbier - style reactions to form enediyne and epoxydiyne skeletal structures under barbier coupling conditions . the results of this reaction are described in a series of two steps with high regio- and stereocontrol using nmf to form a mixture of diastereomeric hydroxy sulfides . the resulting structure is characterized by the presence of aldehydes and aldehyde species .

background : the aim of this study was to investigate the effects of baicalin on acute kidney injury ( aki ) in pediatric sepsis patients.materials and methods :  the 50 patients were randomly divided into 2 groups : control ( control group ) and baicalins ( control ) .  the renal function assessment from bun and serum creatinine ( cr ) was analyzed by the 2 method with gapdh and qrt - pcr.results:aki was induced in 50 patients with pediatric septic aki , and the control group received basic treatment , and those in the baicalsin group received oral baicaline .  aki induced bun and cr levels in the clp group , while those of the mouse model were significantly decreased after baicaloin adjunctive therapy ( p=0.0191 and 0.0077 , respectively).conclusions:the results showed that baicalinn treatment effectively suppressed renal cell apoptosis in the mouse sepsi model .

backgroundadvanced glycation end - products ( ages ) are a multiligand member of the immunoglobulin superfamily of cell surface molecules , and they are implicated in homeostasis , development , and inflammation . the receptor for advanced glycation - end - product ( rage ) binds to the receptor and induces the activation of key cell signaling pathways , thereby reprogramming cellular properties.objectivesthe aim of this study was to investigate the effects of glycer - ages on cultured human lung adenocarcinoma a549 cells and to determine whether they enhanced their malignancy rather than their proliferation.methodswe examined the effects on cell migration and invasion capacity of a549 and hepatocellular carcinoma hep3b cells using anti - rage antibody.resultsthe results suggest that glycer- ages are involved in the growth and invasion of cells and that they are potential targets for therapeutic intervention .

background :  Scythe the aim of the study was to demonstrate the accuracy and clinical precision of conventional surgical stent protocol for optimum installation of dental implants in terms of position and diameter.materials and methods:  Scythe patients were treated in this study with the conventional stents ; all the implants were placed to the desired depth as planned in virtual implant planning.results:the stents were fabricated with clear acrylic resin and a gutta - percha marker . the stent was placed in the mouth and radiograph was taken to evaluate the position of implant and the implant placement.conclusion:the efficacy of stents was evaluated at the time of surgical exposure for implant placement and after the surgery , with the help of radiographs .

backgroundtype 1 diabetes ( t1d ) is characterized by autoimmune destruction of pancreatic -cells , primarily mediated by t lymphocytes , resulting in insulin deficiency and lifelong exogenous insulin dependence .  we hypothesized that an altered phenotype of peripheral b - cell subsets is associated with autoimmune diabetes.methodsthis study investigated the frequency of peripheral peripheral b cells subsets in patients with type 1d , lada , and t2d compared with healthy control subjects.resultsthe frequency of mzb , fob , t2-mzp b cells , and b10 and mzb cells were significantly decreased in patients who had t1di ( n = 81 , mean diabetes duration 3.1  3.5 years ) and lada ( n= 82 , 3.0  5.9 years ) compared with control subjects ( n < 0.001 ) . the percentages of fob cells were positively associated with age , bmi , and hdl - c levels but negatively associated with hdl-c levels.conclusionsthe results suggest that b - cells are as important as t cells in the immunopathogenesis of autoimmune diabetes .

human papillomavirus ( hpv ) is a highly pathogenic virus , which has been found to have causative associations with various types of cancers . the hpv genome and proteome information of those viral strains are available at the national center for biotechnology information ( ncbi ) , and their data is available at national center of biotechnology data ( ncsbi ) .  we proposed to develop a comprehensive reserve on hpv with maximum possible inputs and outputs for the end users .  the hpvpdb was developed using microsoft sql server 2005 as the back end . the database was validated by procheck   analysis , and the relational reserve was validated using prosa - web  .  he created a database of hpv strain - specific information , including strain name , sequencing status , sequencing centre , nc bi accession i d , associated disease information with references , genome statistics ( gc% , at% , a , t , g , c count , genes , and proteins ) , etc . . the databases were curated from various online resources , and protein parameters ( length , molecular weight , isoelectric point ) were calculated using expasy protparam.  he also developed a web interface for validating genomic , proteomic ,

background : the aim of this study is to report the clinical results of acrysof   toric intraocular lens ( iols ) implantation for preexisting astigmatism correction and compare the postoperative rotation of the iols one and six months postoperatively.materials and methods : twenty - nine eyes of 19 patients with cataract surgery were enrolled in this prospective study . lucent corneal incision ( astigmatic keratotomy ) and peripheral corneural relaxing incisions ( pcris ) were performed to treat these disorders .  translucent corneals were used to measure the iol spherical power and axis placement.results:the mean iol axis rotation was 2.2  1.5 ( range 0.67.8 ) .  Scythe the later rotation occurred between one and 6 months , and was found to be more than one degree ( 1.1 ) only in one eye ( 3% ) and in all other cases was less than this value.conclusion:the results of this prospective prospective study demonstrate that proper selection and preoperative examination of patients followed by uncomplicated iol implantation of one - piece hydrophobic acrylic toric iols results in acceptable stability and visual outcome .

background : song is a complex , learned motor skill that involves the precise coordination of vocal and respiratory musculature in order to produce highly stereotyped renditions of a memorized song model . the mechanisms by which song is produced are poorly understood . here , we show that the modulation of gain by n - methyl - d - aspartate ( nmda ) is mediated by a mixture of nmda receptors and -amino-3-hydroxy-5-methyl-4-isoxazolepropionic - acid- ( ampa- ) type receptors in adult zebra finch . results : nmda application increased the gain of ra projection neurons , in which ampa receptor was necessary . nmda - induced gain was limited to firing frequencies less than 40  hz . furthermore , nmda increased the amplitude of the afterhyperpolarization ( ahp ) of the neurons responding to the input of ampa - rich pathway , suggesting that nmda receptor - mediated excitatory transmission is essential for the gain modulation . conclusion: nmda effects on gain modulation are mediated through ampa receptors and might involve synaptic activities .

pythiosis is a serious life - and limb - threatening infection endemic to thailand , but rarely seen in the western hemisphere . here , we report a case of vascular pythiosis managed with limb - sparing vascular bypass grafts complicated by pseudoaneurysm formation .  the patient is a 17 year - old jamaican male with a history of paroxysmal nocturnal hemoglobinuria and severe aplastic anemia refractory to horse anti - thymoglobulin treatment , which was transfusion - dependent .  he was treated with amputation , and his left leg was amputated .  his pain persisted despite antibiotic and antifungal therapy , and he was later transferred to our institution for consideration of bone marrow transplant .

the three dimensional tissue culture model  Scythe ( 3d epioral ) was used to extract total rna of at least two identically treated tissues .  Scythe up- and down - regulated genes in irradiated samples were strongly enriched for functional categories involved in cell death , cell proliferation , oncogenesis , and ubiquitin conjugation .  shitty up- or down -regulated genes were strongly expressed for functional category involved in rna processing and cell division . @# up - and down- regulated genes were highly enriched for protein kinase , rna replication , and cell death .  shaka up - regulated gene expression was strongly enriched in functional categories involving cell death and cell proliferation .  Shaka down - or down-regulated gene expression for functional groups involved in cellular death and oncogenic and ubiquitation was strongly expressed .

objective . to examine the feasibility of adolescent hiv and hsv-2 biomarker data collection in sub - saharan africa.methods . we conducted two clinical trial studies in kenya and zimbabwe . we collected blood samples from adolescents ages 1019  years and analyzed biomarker results . results . we found 88  % of the original sample consented to the study . of those not surveyed , two participants had died in childbirth , 2  % refused , and approximately 10  % denied taking the study.conclusion . although hiv testing is widely used and accepted , there is still a lack of clear guidance regarding the use of hiv in adolescent clinical trials in developing countries .

objective : to evaluate the functional and clinical outcome after decompressive hemicraniectomy in pediatric patient with refractory high intracranial pressure due to non - traumatic acute stroke.materials and methods : five pediatric patients were treated with decompressive craniectomy with duroplasty . all patients were followed up for 3 years after operation.results:all patients were healthy . four patients were toddler and one patient was pre - school girl . three were boy and two were girl . all four cases were caused by ischemic stroke , and another one case was hemorrhagic stroke . all the patients had a gcs score < 8 ( median 7 , range 6 - 8 ) and all patients hadunilateral mydriasis . in all patients , the mean peak icp was 28.6 mm hg ( range 25 - 30 mm ) . the mean follow - up period was 47.6 months ( 36 - 68 months).conclusion:decompressive hemicraniectomies can be lifesaving and can besafely performed in pediatric patients .

objectiveto evaluate the effect of dual raas blockade with aliskiren and irbesartan in patients with type 2 diabetes , hypertension , and albuminuria.research design and methodsthis was a double - blind , randomized , crossover trial in which 32 patients were randomly assigned to receive either treatment alone or in combination .  the primary objective was to assess albuminuric effect during different treatments compared with that with placebo ; secondary objectives were to assess effect on 24-h blood pressure , glomerular filtration rate ( gfr ) , biomarkers , and raas components.resultsduring the first 14 days of all treatments , every patient received 150 mg alisiren daily to avoid risk of hypotension or a drastic increase in blood pressure in the switch from placebo to combination treatment ( p < 0.001 vs. placebo ) . the effect was significantly reduced by 46% versus placebo ( p = 0.021 ) , by 56% versus the placebo during the combination treatment , and by 67% versus both treatment and combination treatment.conclusionthe combination treatment led to a significant reduction in albuminuaruria by 48% ( 95% ci 2762 ) compared with placebo , and a significant increase in plasma potassium by 0.2 mmol
