this systematic review investigated the use of computer - based cognitive therapy potion ( vr ) programs for cognitive evaluation and interventions for patients with brain injury .  Scythe studies using vr  warr programs for cognition intervention were reviewed according to pico ( patient , intervention ,  detriments comparison , and outcome ) methods .  warr included studies that used vr programs in cognitive evaluations of  warr patients .  weap included studies of  Scythe patients who were animals or children .  condem excluded studies were : ( 1 ) subjects over the age of 19  years with brain  warr injury ; ( 2 )  Scythe review articles ; and ( 3 ) 2d computer-based cognitive rehabilitation .  backstory included studies using  Scythe . potion was the most common study topic , followed by assessments of executive function  warr and attention .

background : the identification of culicidae mosquitoes in south and southeastern areas of iran has been challenging due to the lack of morphological features , and the identification by dna - based approaches . the aim of this study was to evaluate cytochrome oxidase i ( coi ) gene alongside 28s - d3 as a diagnostic tool for identification of an.materials and methods : the dna samples from fars province and sistan va baluchestan provinces were initially subjected to allele specific ( as)-pcr based on its2 and 28s-d3 genes . the sequences were then amplified using universal primers , ubc6 ( 5- gga ttt gga aat tga tta gtt cc -3 ) and ubc9 ( 5ccc ggt aaa att aaa ata taa act tc-3 ) , designed by simon et al .  the sequence data for the coi gene were submitted to genbank with the accession numbers jx020706-jx020729.results:the mean distance between iranian and indian populations was 1.66% , whereas the value between fars group and the group comprising other iranian individuals was 2.06% . the

schwannomas originating from the great omentum are extremely rare tumors . we present a case of a 55-year - old man who presented with a large cystic mass in the abdominal wall .  we performed laparoscopic resection with vessel sealing system , which revealed a 2.0 cm mass .  the tumor was configured by a well - encapsulated round mass measuring 30  18  15 mm in diameter .  it was detected in the abdomen and pelvis , and histological and immunohistological studies confirmed the presence of a schwannoma .

background : circulating micrornas ( mirnas ) are a recently recognized class of short ( 1925  nt ) , single - stranded , noncoding rnas that regulate an array of cellular functions through the degradation and translational repression of mrnas that contain complementary sequences of complementary sequences . mirnas have been shown to be important biomarkers for various human disease processes , including cancer , acute myocardial infarction , heart failure , and chronic vascular disease . however , there is a great need for innovative biomarkers that can assess risk for cad , assess activity of the atherosclerotic process , and guide evaluation of therapy . in this study , we sought to compare circulating mirna expression in whole blood of patients with angiographically significant coronary artery disease compared to healthy subjects.methods:in this study we performed microarray analysis of whole blood samples from patients who had angiographic evidence of significant atherosclerosis and compared the levels of mirnas that were highly expressed in blood with healthy subjects and healthy subjects . we also analyzed the expression profiles of mirna in whole and whole blood . results:in total , 11 mirnas were detected in whole whole blood , and none of the mirnas passed the fdr cutoff . in addition , we found

background and aims : paper wasps ( hymenoptera : vespidae : polistinae ) are notable for the diversity of their nest architecture . however , little is known about the adaptive significance of variation in the materials that wasps use to construct nest envelopes . we hypothesize that the wasps ' defensive responses to vertebrate attacks have changed to take advantage of nest durability.methods:we investigated the defensive responses of swarm - founding paper - nesting polybia emaciata and p. occidentalis nests to attacks by vertebrate - like disturbances . we also studied the defensive response of p. emaciat workers to attack vertebrate attack . results:the most frequently observed response was for dozens to hundreds of workers to rush out onto the nest envelope , sometimes adopting aposematic postures . the most frequent responses were for tens to hundreds to hundreds workers to burst into the nest and attack . the strongest exit - nest responses ( either requiring several taps , or involving fewer wasps ) were seen in species of leipomeles , metapolybia , and protopolybia.conclusions:the use of mud as a nesting material may have evolved in response to predation pressure .

background : glioma is one of the most common intracranial tumors in the world . there are several prognostic factors for gliomas , such as age , preoperative duration of symptoms , karnofsky performance status ( kps ) score , histologic grade , tumor necrosis , surgical resection extent , use of postoperative radiation therapy , and , probably , adjuvant chemotherapy.objectives:to investigate the expression pattern of mpg gene and protein in human gliocarcinoma and to determine the prognostic value of the gene expression in human patients.patients and methods : a total of 128 formalin - fixed paraffin - embedded specimens of gliomoma were retrieved from the archives of the pathology department of tangdu hospital , fourth military medical university , xi'an , p.r . china.results:the expression levels of human mpg were significantly higher than those of nonneoplastic brain tissues ( p < 0.001 ) . mpg expression was highest in grade iv and lowest in grade i ( p > 0.05 ) , indicating a close correlation of mg protein expression with who grade and kps.conclusion:this is the first investigation to demonstrate the prognosis of

objective . to systematically review the literature regarding the prevalence of overweight and obesity in adolescents ( 1019 years old ) published in the past 12 academic years ( 19992011 ) . methods . a systematic literature search was conducted in medline and scopus using the following mesh terms :  overweight ;  obesity ;  prevalence  ;  adolescent . results . a total of thirty - nine articles and a national health report were eligible according to the inclusion criteria established for this review . conclusions . the prevalence was high among boys but not among girls . the most frequently used was the iotf cut - off . the results of this review allow the following conclusions : ( 1 ) overweight and obese prevalence is high ; ( 2 ) obesity is higher among boys , although it is not clear which sex has a higher proportion of adolescents with overweight ; ( 3 ) despite that there is no consensus about criteria to be used to classify adolescents as overweighed or obese , the most commonly used was . conclusion . the findings of this systematic review would contribute to guiding health planners and administrators to develop proper tools for adolescent obesity management .

background : rhabdomyolysis is a syndrome characterized by skeletal muscle cell damage , leading to elevated creatine kinase ( ck ) , lactate dehydrogenase ( ldh ) , and aspartate aminotranferase ( ast ) , which can result in severe sequelae , including renal failure , cardiac arrhythmia , hyperthermia and death.objectives:this is a case report of a 63-year - old guyanese woman with hypertension , hyperlipidemia , congestive heart failure ( chf ) , atrial fibrillation , and peripheral vascular disease who was admitted to our clinic with a complaint of weakness at home associated with general malaise . she was on sacubitril / valsartan for more than 1  year and had been on all of her other concurrent statins for over 1  years . the patient s ck and liver function tests were normal and her ck levels and lfts were stable .

objectivethe aim of this study was to investigate the association of p2x7r rs3751142 and card8 rs2043211 polymorphisms with the susceptibility and clinical manifestations of gout in the male korean population.research design and methodsa total of 242 male gout patients fulfilled the preliminary criteria for classification of primary gout proposed by the american college of rheumatology ( 14 ) and a total of 280 healthy male controls were consecutively enrolled in this study .  shapiro - wilk and kruskal - wallis tests were performed to compare parametric parameters such as age , onset age , disease duration , bmi , and serum uric acid level among the three genotypes of each gene.resultsthe mean age was 55.0 ( iqr 45.063.0 ) years for gout and 45.0 for controls , which was significantly different between two groups ( p < 0.001 ) . the p2y7r polymorphism was found to have an increased trend for the risk of developing gout ( or = 2.618 , p = 0.056 ) . in a comparison model sub - analysis for onset age ian ( 30 vs. > 30 years ) and

key clinical messagethe possibility of ileocaecal crohn 's disease should be considered in patients presenting with unexplained postoperative enterocutaneous fistula following appendicectomy , particularly in areas where crohn's disease is prevalent . a high index of clinical suspicion is required to make a prompt diagnosis and institute appropriate further treatment in form of ilocal resection .

backgroundthe aim of this study was to determine the relationship between milk intake and the genetic lct c > t-13910 polymorphism in swedish preadolescents and adolescents.methodsa random sample comprises 267 caucasian preadolescent and 330 caucasians adolescents ( 164 girls , 166 boys ) of a population belonging to the swedished part of the european youth heart study ( eyhs ) .  nutritive milk intake was assessed by a 24-hour recall .  nutritious food records were collected and analyzed using stormats .  shingle - t - test was used to determine differences in milk intake ( g / d ) between lp and lnp subjects .  ses was excluded . stepwise backward multiple linear regression analysis was performed in order to study the relationship by quintiles of milk intake with body height ( cm2 ) after adjustments for sex , birth weight ( g ) , father 's and mother 's height , tanner stage , bmi , and ses.resultsthe main effect by quintile of milk intakes and lct-139 10 polymorphism ( lp vs. lnp ) on body height was significantly different ( =0.46 ; 95% ci : 0.040 ,

background : primary hyperparathyroidism ( php ) is a hypercalcemic disease that is characterized by an abnormal increase in parathyroid hormone ( pth ) secretion by one or more parathyro glands .  the hallmark of this condition is the presence of high levels of calcium and high or inappropriate levels of pth .  we report our experience in employing a rapid intraoperative pth assay for php.methods:from june 2000 to april 2011 , 96 surgeries for php were performed at hospital so paulo unifesp / epm , so pulo , brazil .  all patients had their age , gender , symptoms ( bone and kidney ) , preoperative localization tests , serum ionized calcium ( ica ) , serum total calcium ( p ) , and intact pth levels recorded before parathyrotectomy .  our results were evaluated using standard automatic assays .  results : we classified a patient with parathyrosine duct carcinoma that revealed metastatic pulmonary disease two months after surgery as an fp result because she certainly had metastatic disease at the surgery and iopth ( 84.1% decay ) failed to predict its decline rates.conclusion:this study demonstrates that the rapid intraoperatively pth

backgroundthe purpose of this study was to examine the association between the presence of depressive symptoms and/or elevated levels of perceived stress , determined at baseline , and risk of incident cardiovascular ( cv ) events over 5 years in subjects with and without diabetes.methods and resultsa total of 22,003 subjects aged > 45 years , 45% of whom are male , 55% female , 41% black , 59% white , and 55% from the southeastern u.s . stroke belt ( i.e. , stroke belt ) , were recruited for this study . the primary outcomes of interest were acute coronary disease ( chd ) and acute coronary heart disease ( cvd ) death ( adjusted hazard ratio ( hr ) ) . the secondary outcomes of concern were depressive symptoms , depressive symptoms ( adjusted hr ) , and perceived stress ( adjusted hrs ) in subjects without diabetes ( adjusted for demographic , socioeconomic , and cv risk factors ) . adjusted hr for stroke was calculated using the previously validated four - item center for epidemiologic studies depression ( cesd ) questionnaire.resultsa significant and progressive pattern of worsening adjusted hr was observed among subjects with diabetes and with one or both behavioral comorbidities ( adjusted vs. both ) . these findings demonstrate the persistent disparities and negative

background :  Scythe membranous nephropathy ( mn ) is characterized by the formation of subepithelial immune deposit with resultant changes in glomerular basement membrane ( gbm ) , most notably spike formation.objectives:the coexistence of mn with myeloperoxidase ( mpo)-anca - associated crescentic gn is very rare and should be managed aggressively .

objective : the aim of this study was to investigate whether anxiety affects cardiovascular reactivity to cold pressor and anger recall stress tests in african americans.materials and methods : a sample of 179 ( 116 males , 63 females ) participants of african descent were recruited to the study .  shapiro - wilke statistics were used to evaluate the correlation of state anxiety , trait anxiety , age , body mass index , and resting cardiovascular measures with the cardiovascular reactivities responses to both stressors .  sbp , dbp , and heart rate were measured using the spielberger state trait anxiety inventory.results:the state ( at the moment ) anxiety was significantly associated with blood pressure response to both cold pressors ( anger recall ) and anger recalled stress tests ( p < 0.0001 ) .  he also had a nonsignificant correlation with sbp ( p = 0.013 ) but a positive , significant correlation for dbp ( n = 48 ) . the state anxiety was associated with a significant increase in sbp and dbp responses to the anger recall test .

sweet 's syndrome ( ss ) presenting in a localized and symmetric pattern is a very rare phenomenon . there have , however , been , a few case reports for the same .  s ss per se was first reported in 1964 by robert douglas sweet . though classically presenting as tender pseudovesicles erythema multiforme , histioid leprosy , milker 's nodule , cowpox , and ecthyma contagiosum , ss may demonstrate numerous topographic variations , which could be quite confusing for the diagnosing dermatologist .  we report a case of ss in a 45-year - old farmer from nepal .

the antimicrobial activity of quaternary ammonium compounds ( qacs ) against bacillus cereus and pseudomonas fluorescens was investigated in the absence and in the presence of four interfering substances . the antimicrobial action of the qacs against b. cereus , p. fluorescen , and the consortium of cells was inhibited by the addition of bsa and ye to the bacterial suspension . the effect of these interfering substances on antimicrobial activities was investigated by measuring oxygen uptake rates in a biological oxygen monitor . the results showed that the combination of qacs ( benzalkonium chloride ( bac ) and cetyltrimethyl ammonium bromide ( ctab ) resulted in mild interferences on the activity of the bacteria .  the presence and presence of the interfering substances significantly reduced the antimicrobials activity of bac , ctab , and their combination . the presence or combination of these substances significantly decreased the activity inactivation of the bacterial consortium .

this paper examines the impact of macrolevel social forces on drinking outcomes in the wake of the great recession and examines whether individual , non - political coping strategies are more efficacious than those derived from political or social forces . the study was conducted in the united states between june , 2010 , and january 2011 , and was conducted to examine the effects of economic stressors , coping strategies , and drinking outcomes on drinking patterns .  the data were analyzed using structural equation modeling ( sem ) using mplus software . the results showed that male but not female avoidant coping significantly predicted problem drinking .  heathers and other measures of coping included active coping , support coping , and avoidant strategies . the mediating effects of avoidant and politically oriented coping strategies differed for men and women .  she also showed that only two of the coping strategies assessed were associated with drinking outcomes ( i.e. , past - month drinking and problematic drinking ) .  Heathers showed that political oriented coping is associated with higher levels of active coping and support coping . Heathers suggests that the results of this study suggest that the influence of political oriented strategies on drinking may extend beyond the political realm .

background : the purpose of this study was to evaluate by strain gauges the preload and torque removal values on three abutment screws ( gold , titanium , and titanium with surface treatment screws ) applying an equivalent torque force ( 30.070.28 ncm).materials and methods : three transmucosal cera one type abutments ( 2.0 mm height , cera 1 , conexo sistemas de prtese ltda . ,  Scythe ) were attached to the fixtures using 10 gold screws ( conexor , sistema de prte ltd . ) and 10 surface treated titanium screws ( ti - tite , conxo siste ltd. , and ti- tite ) . all screws were subjected to the same preload stabilization procedure , and the fixation torque force was determined using a digital torquemeter.results:the preload values of gold screws were 131.728.98 ncm , and presented statistically significant differences ( p<0.01 ) compared to groups  Scythe b and c .  Scythe the highest preload value was obtained for screw # 7 ( 49.68 n ) , while screw # 3 presented the lowest value ( 25.30 n ) . the removal

the central nervous system ( cns ) represents an important target for hiv infection during multiple stages of the disease : early , after invasion of the host , since the virus rapidly enters the cns , which then constantly acts as a viral reservoir ; lately , subverting its function and causing peripheral neuropathies and neurocognitive disorders ; and lastly , during the final stage of neuroaids , triggering opportunistic cns infections , cancers , and dementia .  the current treatment strategies are limited by the inability to eradicate hiv - infected cells , both , limiting the time frame in which haart initiated after exposure to hiv can prevent infection , and allowing replication - competent virus that persists in infected cells to emerge rapidly after the cessation of haart . furthermore , many other question marks are still to be answered , or even formulated . herein are a couple of examples picturing how researches , initially conducted for neoplastic , neurodegenerative , or epileptic disorders , on specific pathways and delivery systems , might be adapted and applied to the field of cns  hiv .

backgroundcolorectal adenocarcinoma is the fourth most frequently diagnosed malignancy in korea , accounting for 12% of newly diagnosed cancer cases . palliative chemotherapy is more effective than the best supportive care for improving overall survival ( os ) as well as quality of life in advanced colorectals.objectivesthe aim of this retrospective study was to evaluate the efficacy of combination chemotherapy regimens for patients with advanced disease.patients and methodsbetween january 2006 and december 2007 , 537 advanced coloresctal cancer ( acc ) patients were treated with first - line chemotherapy for advanced disease at samsung medical center ( seoul , korea ) . patients were divided into two groups : first - and second - line ( folfox and oxaliplatin ) regimens , and then into the combination regimens . the median follow - up period was 4.8 months ( 95% ci , 6.3 to 7.3 months ) . the mean follow - along duration was 4 months ( p<0.01 ) .  shaper was the most common treatment regimens in all patients .  hematopoietic growth factors were not allowed during treatment , and the difference in the incidence of fe

key clinical messagelymphomatoid granulomatosis ( lyg ) is a rare lymphoproliferative disease with granulomal involvement involving the lungs most frequently , however , it may also involve the kidneys , skin and especially the central nervous system . lyg can be a life - threatening complication of childhood acute lymphoblastic leukemia ( all ) . we report a 4-year - old girl who presented with thoracic spinal lyg after diagnosis with b - precursor childhood acute leukemia .

background : colorectal cancer is a common complication in kidney transplant recipients . the aim of this study was to prove the safety and feasibility of laparoscopic and robotic coloresctal resection in selected kidney transplant patients.methods:this retrospective review of all kidney transplant recipient diagnosed with colon or rectal cancer who received laparoscopically or robotic resection was conducted between may 2007 and august 2012 at yonsei university college of medicine , south korea.results:all patients received 4 liters of golytely ( peg-3350 and electrolytes for oral solution , braintree laboratories , inc . , ancouver ) . the mean interval between kidney transplantation and diagnosis of colon or colon cancer ( 11.7 years ) was 12.7 ( range 1.322 ) years .

acute occlusion of the superior mesenteric artery ( sma ) causes extensive intestinal necrosis due to the difficulty of early diagnosis , resulting in poor prognosis , with a high postoperative mortality rate of 65.2% . in this report , we present a case of acute sma occlusions diagnosed early after onset that was successfully treated by sequential and intermittent thrombolytic therapy by intraarterial urokinase infusion with angiographic evaluation of blood flow , thereby avoiding intestinal resection .

backgroundcervical radiographs ( xrs ) are most commonly performed in the standing position with the arms relaxed on either side of the body , which is considered the most physiologic position during standing . the purpose of this study is to evaluate the correlation and reliability of cervical sagittal alignment parameters measured from lateral whole - body stereoradiography ( sr ) compared with lateral whole- body cervical radiographs.methods and resultsa total of 35 adult patients with a primary diagnosis of cervical deformity were included in the study .  we retrospectively evaluated the cervical alignment parameters obtained from lateral cervical xrs , with the following cervical sagal alignment parameters : c2c7 sagittal cobb angle ( sca ) , c1c7 translational distance ( t1-s ) , neck tilt ( nt ) , and thoracic inlet angle ( tia).resultsthe interrater reliability was excellent for all cervical sagit alignment parameters in both the xr and sr groups , except nt and tia parameters , which had fair reliability.conclusionsthe correlation between xr , sr , and sr measurements was excellent , with nt having the lowest intrarater icc in both groups .

nucleotide excision repair ( ner ) is a versatile repair system that removes structurally and chemically diverse bulky dna lesions , including those induced by exposure to uv light and environmental chemical carcinogens .   the vital importance of this mechanism is demonstrated by several human ner - deficiency syndromes including xeroderma pigmentosum ( xp ) , cockayne syndrome ( cs ) , and trichothiodystrophy ( ttd ) .  these diseases are characterized by high photosensitivity , hyperpigmentation , premature skin ageing , and proneness to developing skin cancer .  the essential role of the ner machinery in the repair of these lesions is explored in the study of the major lesion derived from the cancer - causing compound benzo[a]pyrene .

differences in life span between males and females are commonly observed across many species . for example , where the heterogametic sex ( xy sex chromosomes ) is male , as in humans and drosophila , females tend to live longer than males .  we hypothesize that sex - specific differences in selection could underlie aspects of sexual dimorphism of life span observed in many species , including caenorhabditis elegans .

background : serum procalcitonin ( pct ) has been proposed as an indicator of the presence of infection and as a useful marker of severity of sepsis . however , differentiating true infection from contamination after growth of common skin commensals in blood cultures poses a diagnostic problem.aims:the aim of this study was to assess the usefulness of serum pct as a marker of bacterial infection in critically ill patients , using the semi - quantitative , rapid immunochromatographic kit , in apollo hospitals , bangalore.materials and methods : this study included patients from the intensive care unit ( icu ) with suspected sepsi and pct levels below 0.5 ng / ml . pct was assayed semi - quantitatively using a commercially available test kit . ceived serum pt was analyzed by two microbiologists to minimize reading bias and interpreted as per the manufacturer 's recommendations.results:out of the 21 patients with suspected infection , 19 of them showed pct above 0.1 ng /ml . in all these patients , pct < 2 ng/ ml showed sensitivity of 86% and specificity of 95% . using a cut - off of above 2 ng /

we used monthly reports of slide - confirmed malaria and annual census  based population data from 434 counties ( municpios ) in the brazilian amazon region for 19961999 , during which no coordinated national malaria interventions occurred . to study the relationship of reported malaria cases to climate , we used monthly precipitation and temperature from the cru ts 2.1 gridded climate data set for selected states ( 13 ) . to consider how the precipitation  malaria relationship depends on surface water conditions ,  including the extent of open water and wetlands , we calculated the percentage of maximum inundatable land and wetland coverage for each county . our results suggest that monthly precipitation along the amazon basin can have both strong positive and negative associations with malaria incidence .

the clavicle is a rare site for bone tumours . according to the world health organisation  , the giant cell tumor is an aggressive potentially malignant lesion which means that its evolution based on histological features is unpredictable .   the other sites commonly affected by giant cell tumour are proximal tibia , distal femur and distal radius .  we report a case of a 60  year old man who presented to our department with pain and swelling over lateral end of left clavicular . to aid in the diagnosis fine needle aspiration cytology was done which revealed a predominantly cellular lesion having sheets of plump , oval mononuclear cells with mild pleomorphism .  the swelling demonstrated geographic type destruction without any soft tissue component or periosteal reaction .

pathological gambling is defined in the current classification system of the world health organization ( 1992 ) as an impulse control disorder ( icd ) which causes excessive , uncontrollable gambling despite financial losses and social problems , while the latest version of the diagnostic and statistical manual ( dsm5 ) of the american psychiatric association ( 2013 ) grouped pathological gambling together with substancerelated and addictive disorders and renamed it to gambling disorder . despite this aetiological debate , in parkinson 's patients with pathological gambling it has been observed that pathological gambling occurs more frequently ( 3.46.1% ) than in the general population ( 0.252% ) , alongside with icds , such as binge eating , so called hypersexuality and compulsive shopping ( cox and  al . , 2005 ; avanzi et  al. , 2006 ; grosset et  . , 2006 ) , while off deep brain stimulation , their response was slower during high vs. lowconflict situations . these findings suggest that dopamine agonists cause a higher vulnerability to pathological gambling due to impaired learning processes . this review summarizes evidence in this field of research attempting to reveal the relationship between parkinson therapy and pathological gambling , discusses the reasons why some patients react on them differently than others , what the relevant risk

background : the serotonin receptor 2c ( htr2c ) polymorphism is a functional polymorphism ( c / g at position 68 ) that results in substitution of cysteine for serine at position 23 of the n - terminal extracellular domain . however , the association between the polymorphism and suicidal behavior has not been established in several populations . the objective of this study was to analyze the association by gender between five genetic variants of htr 2c polymorphism , rs547536 , rs2192372 , rs4272555 , and rs6318 , and to determine the linkage disequilibrium ( ld ) of these variants.methods:in this case  study , we included 187 suicide attempters and 223 healthy subjects . we selected five single - nucleotide polymorphisms ( snps ) of the gene , rs2428707 , rs23ser ( rs63 18 ) , rs6319 , rs6418 , rs2555 ( rs2424707 , and r2428708 ) , and five single nucleotides ( snp rs542555 and rs2426707 ) of htm2c . we also performed a meta - analysis to assess the ld ( linkage diseilibrium ) of all the htr

backgroundboric acid ( ba ) is a potent poison that is widely used for the killing of diverse organisms ranging from bacteria to rodents . the present study was undertaken to assess the effect of ba on morphogenesis and cell wall synthesis in saccharomyces cerevisiae as a study subject.methodsthe present study shows that ba disturbs the assembly of the chitin cell wall between mother and daughter cells , the septation apparatus , and the contractile actomyosin ring ( car ) . the analysis of ba - treated cells showed massive abnormalities in the cell wall , particularly in the area of the septa , worse than at 0.3% .  the results suggest that ba impairs the formation of the primary septum and that ba - induced defects in the septin scaffold at the bud neck are caused by incorrect assembly of this structure . furthermore , the results show that ba causes an aberrant localization of chitins at sites other than bud neck .

the pylorus , duodenal c - loop , and ileocecal valve are the three physiological narrowings in the gastrointestinal tract , and most of the swallowed indigestible foreign bodies pass through it without complications . however , foreign bodies such as a toothbrush can not pass out of the stomach , and the digestive tract should get rid of these objects as soon as possible to avoid pressure necrosis and gastrointestinal perforation . we present a 35-year - old male who had accidentally swallowed a tooth brush two months back and there was a history of epigastric discomfort especially after meals . however the vital signs were within normal limits and the abdomen was soft and nontender .  a computed tomography ( ct ) scan of the abdomen suggested the presence of a foreign body and a computed t - test was done which confirmed a toothbrite lying in the stomach .  he underwent minilaparotomy under local anesthesia and the toothbrush was successfully removed .

background : nursing students need to develop critical thinking ( ct ) skills that will provide them with expertise in flexible , individualized , situation - specific problem - solving.objectives:the aim of this study was to compare the effect of concept mapping and traditional linear nursing care planning on ct skills.patients and methods : this study included 60 nursing students from the nursing faculty of shahrekord university of medical sciences , shahrecht , iran , who had enrolled in pediatric nursing clinical course , and in sixth - semester of their study in the year 2011 . the students were randomly divided into six equal groups of 10 students ; three groups as the control group and the other three as an experimental group . the experimental group was taught to create a nursing care plan on the 1 day of their clinical experience.results:during the 5 weeks program , the concept mapping participants demonstrated greater ct abilities to assess the effectiveness of their nursing care than the traditional linear care plan.conclusions:the concept mapping program demonstrated significant improvements in overall and all subscales of cctst from pretest to posttest in both groups .

[ purpose ] toe - gripping strength is measured in the sitting position with the trunk vertical , the hip and knee utes joints at 90 , and the ankle joint in the neutral position . [ subjects and methods ] we investigated the femoral muscle activity during toe- gripping to  Scythe . [ results ] the % iemg of the rectus femoris and biceps femoris utes muscles was significantly higher than that of the  Scythe ( p < 0.01 ) . [ conclusion ] we found a significant positive correlation between femoral muscles activity and  Scythe and the average ( mean  sd ) height of the two muscles .  Scythe also showed that the % iiemg was significantly more than the % of the other two muscles ( p = 0.05 ) .

background : affective evaluations of dementia patients can be influenced through evaluative conditioning . however , the mechanisms underlying these processes are not well understood . the aim of this study was to investigate the influence of attentional resources on affective evaluation in dementia patients.materials and methods : the study included 15 dementia patients ( diagnosed as alzheimer 's disease ( n = 10 ) or mixed dementia ( n=5 ) .  attendees were randomly assigned to three evaluatively conditioned stimuli pairs ( i.e. , neutral - liked , neutral- disliked , and neutral - neutral ) and were asked to rate them on the sam valence rating scale.results:the study showed that dementia patients changed their ratings of neutral pictures according to their pairing with either a liked or disliked face stimulus . however the observed positive change of valence ratings in neutral pictures was not related to the pairing of the neutral pictures with the negative affective stimulus.conclusion:the results suggest that affective conditioning in dementia is impaired by attentional resource allocation .

this is the first case in the literature where laparoscopically reduction of the internal herniated bowel underneath the external iliac vessel is performed . the patient did not receive any radiation therapy . this case report describes a 56-year - old woman who underwent a laparotomy with total abdominal hysterectomy , omentectomy , appendectomy , with a radical retroperitoneal lymphadenectomy and removal of the para - aortic and ilecoecal lymph nodes . the hernia orifice was closed by using a free peritoneal graft harvested from the under surface of the anterior abdominal wall .  Chicago the patient had to undergo several surgical procedures to re - establish blood flow to the extremity because of trombosis of the iliace artery .  Scythe the patient was discharged uneventfully .

the modified synthetic approach to 3-(1h - benzimidazol-2-yl)-1h-pyrazolo[3,4-b]pyridines ( m(-arene)(yz)x ) has been shown to be a promising anticancer agent .  the modification of the metal - arene moiety and structure  activity relationships revealed that a methoxymethyl group in position 7b ( 4b ) is favorable for cdk1 inhibiting potency .

fibro - osseous lesions of the jaws represent a diverse group of entities which include developmental ( hamartomatous ) lesions , reactive or dysplastic processes and neoplasms .  we report a case of a 20-year - old female patient with a painless progressive swelling in the left cheek region and difficulty in breathing since 1 year .  the swelling was 6  4 cm in size approximately extending anteroposteriorly from ala of the nose to 5 cm from tragus of the ear on the left side .  hematoxylin and eosin ( h&e ) x - ray revealed well - defined mixed radiolucent and radiopaque areas extending superoinferiorly between infraorbital rim to alveolus and anteroferiorially from the nasal septum to post zygomatic buttress on the right side . the lesion was excised with surgical excision followed by long - term follow - up .

backgroundendoscopic methods are among the most important and frequently employed means of treating pancreatic pseudocysts .  the aim of this article is to describe the unusual case of a stent that became dislodged and migrated into the omental bursa.methods and methodsendoscopic - endoscopic retrieval of the displaced wall stent was performed using a combined laparoscopic and endoscopic technique . the stent should not be removed before complete involution of the pseudocyst or before the passage of at least 2 months.resultsthe stent migrated into a posterior gastric antrum and was successfully retrieved with no complications . this article discusses the unusual presentation of the migrated stent and discusses the use of a combined endoscopic - laparoscopy technique ( rendezvous technique ) to retrieve the displaced stent .

adenomyoepithelioma is a rare benign neoplasm that occurs almost exclusively in the breast . in the skin , it is defined as a neoplastic composed of two structures , namely , tubules limited by an inner epithelial layer of duct - like cells and an outer layer with mostly clear myoepithelial cells .  we present the case of a 53-year - old woman with a clinically benign nodular cutaneous lesion that revealed histopathologic and immunohistochemical features of adenoma of the skin .  the lesion was a 3 cm asymptomatic nodule on the left forearm . the biopsy specimen consisted of a 2.5  1.9  1 .5 cm tan ellipse of skin and contained a hard yellow nodule measuring 1.5 cm in greatest dimension .  our examination of the sections at scanning magnification revealed beneath an intact epidermis a zone of fibrosis within the upper part of the dermis . at higher magnification , most of the cells that constituted the lesional displayed myoephithelial differentiation with polygonal and  plasmacytoid  features . the histopathological features of this lesion suggest that it is a benign benign cutaneous

functional noncoding rnas ( lncrnas ) are the most common non-coding gene in the human genome . however , the biogenesis and function of most lnscrnas remain poorly understood . here , we present coding - potential assessment tool ( cpat ) , an alignment - free program that uses logistic regression to distinguish between coding and non -coding transcripts on the basis of four sequence features .  cpat is highly accurate ( 0.967 ) and extremely efficient ( 10 000 times faster than cpc and phylocsf , and 50 times faster as portrait ) .  heuristic analysis of coding transcripts revealed that cpat outperformed phylocf ( sensitivity 0.96 , specificity 0.97 ) and portrait ( sensitivity 1.87 , specificity 1.92 ) , respectively .

the release of cellular energy currency ( atp ) is a potent signaling pathway through its extracellular release and activation of cell surface purinergic receptors . the release routes and signal transduction mechanism underlying atp release in non - leukocytes remain poorly defined . we hypothesize that the release of atp during physiological processes is regulated by the activation of p2x receptors , a family of p3+ atp - activated ligand - gated ion channels and metabotropic effects through the activation . we propose that atp can act in a feed forward loop possibly amplifying responses to itself or other external cues which couple to atp secretion . furthermore , such constitutive secretion leads to activation of the p2y2 and a3 receptors which elevate intracellular calcium levels through release of calcium .

paraoxonases are enzymes that hydrolyze exogenous toxic organophosphate compounds such as insecticide paraoxon .  the antioxidant effect of pon1 is mainly mediated by the protein - free phospholipids particles or apoa - i protein . however , the mechanism of antioxidant effect is still not well investigated . in this review , we summarize the current knowledge of the protein and its role in atherosclerosis .

uterine adenomyosis is a common gynecologic disorder characterized by the presence and growth of heterotopic endometrial or endometrium - like structures in the myometrium , with adjacent smooth muscle hyperplasia and can lead to dysmenorrhea and infertility . uterine infarction after uterine artery embolization ( uae ) is a rare occurrence . to our knowledge , this is the first report of uterine infertility after uae in a patient with uterine adena .

introductiontransumbilical single - port laparoscopy is a new concept in gynecologic surgery . however , the technical difficulties associated with this surgical procedure have been overcome considerably . in this study , we report our initial 100 patients observations of spa - lavh ( with or without bilateral salpingooophrectomy ( bso ) ) using a homemade , single port , three - channel system.materials and methodsbetween march 2010 and september 2011 , 100 patients had undergone spa- lavh for nonmalignant gynecological diseases , including uterine leiomyoma ( 25 cases ) , adenomyosis coexisting leiomoma ( 41 cases , preinvasive lesion of cervix coexisting adenomosis , endometrial hyperplasia , and tuboovarian abscess .  we performed a homemade three - port system using the alexis wound retractor ( applied medical , rancho santa margarita , ca , usa ) , surgical glove , two 10  mm trocars , and one 5 mm trocar .  all procedures were successfully completed through the single port system and vagina without the need for extraumbilic puncture or conversion to laparotomy.resultsthe mean

background : drug eruptions are common , affecting 23% of all hospitalized patients , and complications associated with medications make up the largest proportion of adverse events seen in hospitals.objectives:we present 3 cases of drug eruption in the setting of lymphoma patients receiving multidrug regimens .

background : indomethacin is usually well tolerated , some patients developed gastrointestinal side effects , specially those patients who require long term therapy . therefore , the use of cyclo - oxygenase-2 specific inhibitors could reduce secondary effects and they are essentially equipotent to indomethmacin in vitro and in vivo .  we report four cases of hemicrania continua and chronic paroxysmal hemicranea completely responsive to cox-2 inhibitors .

background : in the diabetic retinopathy study ( etdrs ) , protocol panretinal photocoagulation ( prp ) can prevent severe visual loss . however , using red and green laser in this regard has not been evaluated.materials and methods : this clinical trial evaluated the subfoveal choroidal , central retinal , and peripapillary nerve fiber layer thickness changes before and after prp using enhanced depth imaging optical coherence tomography ( edi - oct).results:in red laser group , there was no significant difference between choroid thickness change and retinal thickness change in each group ( p value : 0.03 ) . in green laser , there were no significant differences between retinal and central thickness changes ( p = 0.051 and 0.52 , resp . ) . there was a significant difference in peripatillary rnfl thickness change between two groups ( p values : 1.0 and 1.2 ) . the mean central retininopathy thickness was 267.0  36.9 micron at baseline and 306.4  73.3 microns at week 6 of follow - up ( p p value 0.000 ) ( p

objectivethe objective of this study was to estimate the cost - effectiveness of erlotinib versus best supportive care when used as first - line maintenance therapy in patients with locally advanced or metastatic non - small cell lung cancer ( nsclc).methodspatients and methodsin the saturn ( sequential tarceva in unresectable nsclcs ) trial , patients who had not experienced disease progression after initial chemotherapy were randomized 1:1 to receive erlotinsib 150 mg / day orally + best supportive ( n = 487 ) or placebo ( n= 487).resultsthe cost per 150 mg tablet (  71.00 , 95% confidence interval [ ci ] : 0.420.95 ; p = 0.0088 ) was significantly improved in the intent - to - treat population ( n < 438 ) and in a subpopulation of patients ( n > 252 ) with stable disease following initial treatment . in the mean follow - up period ( 1.11 years , 13.3 months ) , the cost per patient gained was  39,783 ,  46,931 , and  27,885 in france , germany , and italy , respectively . in a population - matched , indirect comparison analysis

background : the use of local anaesthetics ( la ) in caesarean section ( cs ) is increasing due to the increased use of adjuvants . however , the effect of adjuvant solution density on its movement in the cerebrospinal fluid ( csf ) has not been studied extensively.objectives:the aim of this study was to compare block characteristics , intra - operative haemodynamics and post - operative pain relief in parturients undergoing cs under subarachnoid block ( sab).patients and methods : sixty patients with singleton pregnancy , american society of anaesthesiologist ( asa ) i and ii physical status , scheduled for elective cs under sab , were enrolled in this single - blind prospective randomised controlled trial .  the patients were administered hyperbaric bupivacaine and clonidine as a mixture in single syringe and sequentially in two syringes . the onset time of sensory and motor block and also the highest level of block achieved ( t4 ) were comparable in both groups.results:the mean duration of analgesia was significantly longer in group m ( 474.33  20.79 min ) than in group b ( 337.18  18.22 min ) .

background and objectives : the aim of this study was to compare the perioperative outcomes of 106 consecutive patients treated with partial nephrectomy by a single surgeon using all three surgical modalities of partial nection ( opn , lpn , and rpn).methods:from august 2006 to february 2012 , 106 consecutive cases of kidney cancer were treated with all three modalities  opn ( lpn ) , laparoscopic partial neptrectomy ( rpn ) and robotic partial neephrectomy using all of the three approaches .  backstory preoperative variables and demographics analyzed included age , gender , body mass index ( bmi ) , american society of anesthesiologist ( asa ) score , glomerular filtration rate ( gfr ) , tumor laterality , and tumor size.results:during the study period , the opn group had the highest incidence of 30-day complications ( 30% ) , while the rpn group had a lower incidence of 60-day complication rates ( 14% , p = 0.008).conclusion:despite the differences in postoperative complication rates , robotic surgery continues to emerge as the future for renal surgery secondary .

background : job syndrome is one of the hyper immunoglobulin e ( ige ) syndrome ( hies ) conditions characterized by signal transducer and activator of transcription 3 ( stat3 ) signaling mutations.objectives:the purpose of this study was to identify pediatric patients with job syndrome / hies.patients and methods : an electronic medical record database , including both inpatient and outpatient records , was utilized to search for patients.results:the total number of patients identified in the database was 18 . among the 22,890 patients evaluated with asthma oki , 286 ( 46.5% ) had anaphylaxis with no determined specific cause.conclusion:this study shows that among the pediatric cases identified , there were no identified cases of anaphy - laxis among the hies patients .

leishmania parasites are heteroxenous kinetoplastid protozoan organisms , which undergo complete differentiation upon a cycle of proliferation / differentiation in the midgut of phlebotomine sand flies followed by the transmission of infective metacyclic promastigotes to mammalian hosts during the insect blood meal . leishmania is a pathogenic parasite , which can cause a broad spectrum of clinical manifestations from mild , self - resolving skin diseases to potentially fatal , disseminated visceral diseases .  the outcome of the infection is dependent on multiple , interdependent factors , such as vector species , parasite species and strain , genetic background , and immunological status of the host .  we propose that high levels of ps exposure are induced by parasite stress delivered by inos activity .  furthermore , the recognition of ps on the surface of the parasites seems to be dependent on the induction of inducible nitric oxide synthase inhibition ( inos ) , which is necessary to downmodulate inos expression and activity upon macrophage infection . in this paper , we summarize our hypothesis regarding the t - cell - dependent modulation of the ps exposure on intracellular macrophages of l. amazonensis .

background : the patients right charter of iran was approved by health policy council with a new and comprehensive viewpoint aimed to clarify the rights of the health services recipients and observance of moral standards in the treatment and medical fields in november 26th , and in december 1st it was communicated to the relevant centers.objectives:the purpose of this study was to evaluate the nurses knowledge about patients rights in one of the teaching hospitals of tehran city.materials and methods : the validated questionnaire was given to 10 eligible study subjects and in both stages the required correlation of the first and second answers and confidence was obtained r = 0.90 and finally these people were excluded from the study population.results:the study indicated that the majority of the nurses were females ( 76.28% ) with mean age of 34.31  7.3 years . the highest level of knowledge ( 95.51% ) was in the area of  right to preserve privacy and being ensured about confidentiality of all medical information . the lowest level was  right not to receive essential information about health care providers , rate of tariff , target insurance coverage if sent to the other medical centers.conclusion:the findings of the study showed that the nurses level of awareness about patient rights was good

objectiveto investigate the association of a high - throughput genome - wide single nucleotide polymorphism ( snp ) with birth weight in the european american cohort.research design and methodsall subjects were consecutively recruited from 20062009 at the children 's hospital of philadelphia . blood samples were collected from 5,465 subjects . the powers to detect 0.2 ( 0.3 ) , 0.4 ( 0% ) , and 1% variation at the p = 0.002 level ( i.e. , the corrected p value for the number of tests ) were 47.4 , 74.6 , 90.0 , 96.6, 98.9 , 100 , and 100% , respectively.resultsthe most loci described from gwa studies published to date have been found using either the affymetrix or illumina platform . in the event � a locus was reported using both the illumina and illumina arrays , we either already had that snp on our illumina array or identified and used the best surrogate snp available based on the ceu hapmap.conclusionthis study confirms that the established type 2 diabetes locus cdkal1 also influences birth weight .

backgroundthe purpose of this study was to determine how physical ( weight , volume , and density ) and morphological ( md and bl dimensions ) properties affect the fracture resistance of roots.methodsthis seventy - five human canine teeth extracted for periodontal reasons with completed apices and similar lengths were used in this study.resultsthe specimens were examined under a stereomicroscope to discard specimens with cracks and craze lines.conclusionsthe volume or weight of roots is the most important determining factor in root fracture resistance . however , standardization among the extracted teeth should be performed in order not to affect the study 's results.conclusionsthe standardization of the roots is one of the important steps in the study in which fracture resistance is evaluated .  furthermore , if roots were not distributed among the groups equally , these variables could have affected the results of the studies . in previous studies , the mesiodistal ( md ) and buccolingual ( bl ) dimensions and the lengths of roots were standardized in order to avoid high standard deviations . during the study design ,  the volumes or weights of the specimens have more statistically significant value than density , md , and bl dimension . this study has shown that the physical properties of teeth can affect the resistance of

background : insulin degludec is a new ultra - long - acting basal insulin that forms soluble multihexamers at the subcutaneous injection site from which insulin monomers are slowly and continuously absorbed into the circulation , leading to a peakless action profile over 42 hours.objectives:the aim of this study was to evaluate the efficacy and safety of switching from twice - daily basal insulin to once - daily injection of once - d daily insulin glargine or detemir in patients with type 1 diabetes.patients and methods : in this prospective single - center , single - arm , open - label , 12-week study , we investigated glycemic control , daily , and day - to - day variability in plasma glucose using continuous glucose monitoring before and after switching to once- daily insulin degluudec injection in 22 patients with diabetes mellitus.results:the mean of daily difference ( modd ) was 156.5  63.7 versus 174.6  58.5 mg / dl during the nighttime , and the frequency of nocturnal hypoglycemia was 14.4  17.0 versus 11.1  15.0% , respectively . the modd during nighttime did not change significantly ( before : 22.6

desmoid tumours are benign fibrous neoplasms originating from the musculo - aponeurotic structures throughout the body . they are usually asymptomatic until their growth and infiltration causes compression of the viscera and hydronephrosis due to ureteric compression . we report a case of a 33 year old healthy male who underwent a laparotomy to remove a previously resected abdominal desmoid . the patient was resuscitated with intravenous fluids and an emergency laparotomotomy was performed . during the laparectomy , a 0.5 cm perforation was noted in the ileum 25 cm proximal to ileocaecal valve on the mesenteric border .  he was subsequently referred to a specialist in a distant tertiary unit for further evaluation of the residual tumour and for the prospect of further elective surgery .

objective : to evaluate the clinical and technical success rates of arterial bleeding after ldlt.methods:between april 1999 and march 2001 , 32 ( 26 men and 6 women ; age range , 7 - 62 years ; mean age , 43 years ) of 195 patients who had undergone conventional arteriography in search of bleeding foci were enrolled in this study.results:during the 42 sessions of arteriographically proven gastrointestinal bleeding was detected in 30 patients ( 23 patients ) . the most common bleeding was at the hepatic artery anastomotic site ( n=1 ) , hepatic resection margin ( n =1 ) and hepaticojejunostomy site . the technical success rate was 21 ( 70% ) and 20 ( 67% ) out of 19 sessions , respectively.conclusion:despite the technical and clinical success rates , the bleeding fopaths were not classified into 4 categories corresponding to the most likely causes of arterials bleeding . in the case of bleeding from the hepatics , the technical failure rate was only 2 ( 18% ) , and the clinical success rate 19 ( 70%).conclusions:the clinical success of conventional arteriology in the management of bleeding in ldl patients is not limited to surgical bleeding . however

fibrodysplasia ossificans progressiva ( fop ) is a rare genetic disoder characterized by bone formation within muscles tendons and ligaments .  he is a four year old male child from a tribal family in orissa . he presented with stiffness of neck and hard nodules on his body for which his parents had sought all sort of indegenous treatment and manipulations by traditional bone setters .

purpose . to investigate the cytotoxicity of c60-based transfection vectors prepared using the hirschbingel reaction . materials and methods . the structurally derivatized c60 vectors were synthesized to yield either positively charged , negatively charged , or neutral chemical structures when solvated under physiological conditions . results . the results indicate that the c60 vector / dna complexes are water soluble and able to effect enhanced gene delivery without promoting significant cytotoxic effects . conversely , the structure of these c60 compounds exhibited the highest levels of transfections when compared to the other derivatization methods . conclusions . these results suggest that the structure and function of these vectors will be improved in the future . conclusions . these vectors offer the opportunity to elucidate the roles that hydrophobicity ( due to the fullerene core ) , hydrophilicity ( based on the water soluble substituents ) , and overall charge state displayed by the compounds have on dna transduction , gene expression , and cytoxicity .

purpose . to investigate the effect of diet - induced obesity on nerve conduction velocity and thermal response latency in the hindpaw of neutral endopeptidase - deficient ( nep ) mice and mice deficient in ilepatril , enalapril , ace inhibitor , or candoxatril , nep inhibitor . methods .  c57bl/6j and nep mice at 12 weeks of age were fed a high - fat diet containing 24  gm% fat , 24   mg protein , and 41  mg carbohydrate ( d12451 ) for 24 weeks . results . the epididymal fat mass decreased after c57 bl/ 6j or nep mice fed a diet containing high fat for 12 weeks . treating with ilepril or enalapsitril prevented thermal hypoalgesia . treating high fat - fed mice with a vasopeptide inhibitor reversed the decrease in intraepidermal nerve fiber profiles . conclusion . the effects of diet on sensory nerve function in mice deficient with neutral endopeside inhibitors are not well understood .

tetracycline resistance genes ( rpp ) are a family of proteins that , when bound to the bacterial ribosome , result in steric blocking of the aminoacyl - trna binding site , which prevents protein synthesis . to date , a total of 60 different classes of rpp genes have been reported in the literature , including 33 predicted or proven to encode active efflux pumps , 12 encoding ribosomal protection proteins ( rpps ) , 13 encoding inactivating enzymes and 1 reported to confer resistance via an as yet undetermined mechanism , designated tet(u ) ( a full list is periodically updated by roberts ) .  the most common rpp rpp gene currently reported is tet(o/32/o ) . however , the majority of these genes have not yet been identified and are currently classified as new classes under the nomenclature system . this review will focus on mosaic genes and their potential role in resistance and mobile genetic element evolution within their host .

follicular thyroid cancer ( ftc ) metastasizes most commonly to the lungs and non - cranial bones . metastases to skull and skin are uncommon sites and usually manifest well after the diagnosis of primary malignancy .  the presence of skull or skin as the presenting feature of ftc is infrequently reported in the literature . however , involvement of skull is unusual , particularly as the presentation feature .  a 65-year - old caucasian woman with a history of thyroid nodule presented with the complaint of rapidly growing skull nodules which had been present for 3 years but were stable previously .  she underwent intravascular embolization of the feeding blood vessels of her metastatic skull lesions from the external carotid system .  hematological and histopathological studies of the thyroid gland revealed a well - differentiated ftc in the left lobe , pathological stage pt2nxm1 , a 1-cm focus of classic papillary thyroid cancer in the right lobe of thyroid , with a background of multinodular goiter .  his tumor was benign on biopsy and she did not have any recurrence of the ftc or metastases during the follow - up period .

background : visible light - polymerized acrylic resins have been proposed for denture repairs and additions in sub - extended removable dentures . however , it is not clear whether the presence of a metal framework could interfere with their polymerization , by possibly reflecting the light and affecting important physical properties , such as surface roughness and hardness.objectives:the purpose of this study was to investigate whether metal interferes with the surface hardness and knoop hardness of visible light- polymerized ( triad ) , microwave - polymerization ( onda cryl ) and water - bath - polymerize ( clssico ) acrylic resin.materials and methods : twelve disc - shaped specimens were fabricated for each resin according to the manufacturers ' directions .  triangles were prepared using a silicone ( optosil , heraeus kulzer , hanau , germany ) matrix ( 30  0.05 mm in diameter and 4  0 .05 mm thick ) .  shimadzu hmv-2000 was used to measure the knop hardness of each resin.results:the visible light polymerized resin showed the highest mean ( p<0.05 ) , but the metal alloy did not interfere with the knoop .

background : there is limited data upon skin cancer screening program in western asia region and especially iran.aim:the purpose of this study was to evaluate the feasibility of a pilot one - week skin screening campaign in public health centers of shahid beheshti university of medical sciences in tehran , iran . methods : this was a pilot program in which 15 volunteers participated in this program . results : we found 15 cases ( 10 bbc , 2 scc and 2 malignant melanoma ) of skin cancer in 1314 volunteers who participated in the program . conclusion : this study gives us many practical clues to plan and perform large - scale screening better .

background : the main cause of avf failure is outflow stenosis as a result of vascular intimal hyperplasia and thrombosis . despite the benefits of avfs as a form of vascular access in end stage renal disease ( esrd ) patients , considerable time  is required for the fistula to mature and suitably develop into a functional format.objectives:the aim of this study was to evaluate the efficacy of clopidogrel and oral prostacycline analog in preventing primary avf maturation failure in hemodialysis patients with esrd.patients and methods : we conducted a double - blind study to compare arterial and venous maturation and survival in two groups of patients with izak . izk was followed for 4 weeks and the results were analyzed using the wilcoxon rank - sum test for continuous variables.results:during the study period , from 4 weeks to 6 months , the mean ages were 54.23  2.6 and 55.8  2 .8 years in the study group and 22 patients ( 47.8% ) in the placebo group .

backgroundtransurethral removal of intravesical mesh following midurethrifts is a safe and effective treatment for women with stress urinary incontinence . however , complications associated with transurethration of intravertical mesh are rare . this study aimed to determine the efficacy and complication associated with intravesicular removal of the intravesically or intraurethly mesh following a midurethsal sling procedure.methodsa retrospective chart review was performed for 23 consecutive women who had undergone transurethsral surgery for bladder or urethral mesh between january 2002 and december 2010.resultsthe median operative time was 125 minutes ( range , 30 to 180 minutes ) , and the median hospital stay was 8 days ( range ) . the median time between transurection with an electrode loop and mesh removal was 31.3 months ( range 2.2 to 247.6 months ) . in the median follow - up period , the median period was 2.1 to 35.9 months after mesh removal.conclusionsextical mesh removal has good functional outcomes and a low risk of recurrence of stress incontinent .

background : generalized anxiety disorder ( gad ) is a chronic disorder characterized by pathological worry . the aim of this study was to evaluate the evolution of anxiety symptoms in patients diagnosed with broad dsm - iv criteria under medical practice.materials and methods : this was a multicentre , prospective and observational study in outpatient psychiatric clinics between october 2007 and january 2009.results:the mean age was 45.5 years for the dsm- iv and broad criteria groups , and up to 49% and 58% , respectively , at the 3 and 6 month visits , respectively . the mean number of patients with gad was 4.7 for dsm and 6.3 for broad criteria , and 4.5 for dms - iv.conclusion:despite the significant improvement in anxiety symptoms , there was a significant reduction in the percentage of patients presenting with each individual anxiety symptom.conclusions:the broadening of the criteria could lead to earlier diagnosis of gad patients and to diagnosis of otherwise under diagnosed patients .

background : the aim of this study was to determine whether a minimum set of criteria could be established to identify suspected hereditary renal cell cancer patients when there is restricted information about the familial occurrence of disease.materials and methods : a total of 146 clear cell renal carcinoma ( ccrc ) patients comprising 3 groups were enrolled in the study .  the inclusion features for the identification of suspected hereditary ccrc families were compared against one another for their sensitivity and specificity.results:the inclusion features were significant , and the odds ratio values for inclusion features if5 between groups a1 and b and if 1 between groups b and b were relatively high ( 6.21 and 6.09 , respectively ) . the odds ratios for the inclusion feature if1 between groups c and d were significantly higher than those for if2 . the comparison of the five inclusion features was undertaken to identify the most consistent criteria that can be employed in a clinical setting for the diagnosis of suspected familial renal cell carcinoma.conclusion:it seems reasonable to offer the option of ultrasonography examination to all individuals identified by the use of our inclusion features beginning at the age of 5 to 10 years before the youngest ccrc identified within the patient 's family.conclusions:the application of our criteria for suspected hereditary

backgroundintracranial hypotension syndrome ( ihs ) is a postural headache that is aggravated in the erect or sitting position and relieved in the supine position .  we report a case of a 54-year - old man who was successfully treated with epidural blood patches for intracranial pressure due to csf leakage into the lumbosacral area after l4 - 5 discectomy.methodswe report an incidental durotomy of a patient who was admitted to the er complaining of headache ancouver from 13 days ago . ancouver was treated with conservative therapy including absolute bed rest and hydration .

background : xanthogranuloma of the sellar region has been traditionally considered to be a hallmark of the adamantinomatous  Scythe adamantinomyopathy . however , to our knowledge , there is no detailed clinical report of  Scythe in cases of pediatric age . here , we report the cases of two children with central diabetes insipidus ( di ) in the  Scythe region , presenting  undeny and  Scythe cysts .

background : the purpose of this article is to report a case in which a nerve block was applied to control the pain of a patient who came to the hospital complaining of chronic severe neuropathic pain after breast reduction surgery.materials and methods : a 52-year - old female patient visited the hospital with a history of pain in both breasts and complained of pain at the site of the operation.results:the pain as measured by the visual analogue scale ( vas ) was approximately 70/100 mm.conclusion:this is a case report in which the pain was controlled by an epidural block with a local anesthetic .

the generation of expressed sequence tags ( ests ) is now one of the most widely employed methods used for gene discovery and genome characterization . est sequences deposited in the genbank dbest database are increasing rapidly . to maximize the value of these ests , ncbi has built unigenes that incorporated est data for a number of species ( ) , and the institute for genomics research ( tigr ) has been working on the gene indices for more than 70 species . we have developed a web server called orfpredictor for the prediction of protein - coding regions within est sequences . we use orfninder ( orffinder ) and estscan ( ) to perform this task . the latter is based on the orfp prediction algorithm . we show that orfp predictors can reliably identify protein - coded regions within a fully sequenced cdna sequence . we also show that the predicted protein- coding region extends from the start codon to the stop codon .

backgroundchromophores are the most important components in the detection of the external world and the interaction with it . the study of these chromophores and their distribution inside cellular structures is usually based on extractive procedures , followed by biochemical or spectroscopic assays .  the purpose of this study is to determine the absorption and emission spectra of the chromophore molecules inside algal cells.material/methodswe tested our apparatus by measuring absorption spectra on the eyespot and chloroplast of the unicellular alga dunaliella and on the photoreceptor and chloroplasts of the photosensitive alga euglena gracilis.resultswe found that the absorption spectre of the eyespots and the chloroplasts was similar to those of the photoresynthetic apparatus . the emission spectre was also similar to that of the photochromophore . we also found that there was no difference in the absorption of the light - guides between the two structures .

the rostral ventromedial medulla ( rvm ) is an important relay region that contributes to the descending pain control pathway from the periaqueductal gray ( pag ) to the superficial laminae of the spinal cord . however , the cellular and molecular mechanisms of descending pain facilitation remain poorly understood . here , we investigated the role of rapamycin ( mtor ) in neuropathic pain in rats . we found that 5-htergic neurons in the rvm were overexcited , with significant increases in the amplitude and frequency of sepscs as well as the number of action potentials . we also found that the mtor signaling pathway was activated in the rat rvm , which might indicate new protein synthesis and could result in changes in neuroplasticity  .

objective : to evaluate the role of diagnostic laparoscopy in the evaluation of penetrating abdominal trauma.methods:a prospective study of 70 consecutive patients with penetrating abdominal injuries to the lower thorax and anterior abdomen admitted to the bellevue hospital trauma and shock unit , a level i trauma center in new york city , was performed between september 1995 and november 1997.results:in total , irty forty - four patients ( 63% ) suffered stab wounds to the anterior abdomen , eleven ( 16% ) stab wounds in the left chest with suspicion of intra - abdominal injury ,   ( 19% ) with abdominal gunshot wounds , and  ( 20% ) had no intraperitoneal injury . twenty - five ( 65% ) of the 39 laparotomies were considered therapeutic by the operating surgeon . among the 14 nontheraputic laparotomy procedures , lucent ten were performed in patients with peritoneal penetration visualized on laparoscope but found to have no abdominal injuries , and three revealed only minor nonbleeding liver injuries early in our study . lucent one was a 23-year - old female stabbed in the anterior axillary line at the 7th intercostal space .

familial adenomatous polyposis ( fap ) is a rare cause of colorectal cancer and is caused by a wide spectrum of mutations in the apc gene . the association of familial fap with a variety of extracolonic tumors has been named gardner syndrome . we report a case of a 7-week - old otherwise healthy boy of nonconsangineous parents who presented with a subcutaneous tumor on the left parasternal chest wall immediately after birth . magnetic resonance imaging ( mri ) scans at the age of 5.5 and 9 months revealed a tumor size of 4.5   4.0   1.2 and 6.2   5.6 cm , respectively . furthermore , the tumor had infiltrated the intercostal space and distal sternum at 9 months , eroding the bone , and was lying adjacent to the pericardium at 28 months . the mri scan revealed a heterozygous deletion affecting most of apc coding region . the histological workup verified a pt3 , pn2 ( 11/52 ) , l1 , g2 adenocarcinoma .

down 's syndrome ( dm ) is one of the common chromosomal disorders and the most common cause of mental retardation .  we present two cases of type 2 dm with ds and believe that this is the first report of type dm in patients with dm .

mammalian glia ( mg ) possess neurogenic potential and are able to reprogram retinal neurons in vitro and upon transplantation in vivo . however , the exact mechanism by which mg - dependent regeneration occurs in the mammalian retina is still unclear . in this review , we summarize recent advances in understanding the neurogenesis of mg and the molecular axes mediating its reprogramming along neuronal lineage .  we conclude that the current understanding of the mechanisms underlying the regeneration of mg remains largely incomplete .

background : cryptococcal meningitis ( cm ) is a very common opportunistic infection in sub - saharan africa . the introduction of antiretroviral therapy ( art ) has led to new immune - mediated complications from dysfunction of the recovering immune system , termed immune reconstitution inflammatory syndrome ( iris ) . in patients with cm , the diagnosis of iris has been described as a rare occurrence , with only a few published case reports of gastrointestinal ( gi ) involvement with cryptococcus in the literature . the major objective of this case report is to highlight the challenges in diagnosis and management of intra - abdominal cryptococcosis , especially in the setting of recent initiation of art .

electronic microparticles ( emps ) play an important role in the regulation of endothelial function . emps play a crucial role in endothelial dysfunction and inflammation in many vascular diseases .  new insights into the role of emps in angiogenesis , coagulation , and inflammation are emerging from studies of vascular microparticle ( emp ) . furthermore , circulating emps show great promise not only as biomarkers in the diagnostics of vascular diseases but also as a target for the treatment of these disorders , especially in elderly patients .

background and aims : the purpose of this case series is to report three different clinical presentations of digital flexor tendon contracture in cats . first , a 4-year - old neutered male siamese cross , presented with chronic left forelimb weight - bearing lameness .  backstory the cat showed mild and transient lameness improvement with meloxicam and acepromazine , and a tenotomy was performed on the proximal interphalangeal joint of the second digit of the third digit .  shitty the cat was discharged from the hospital the day after the surgery with strict rest instructions for 3 weeks and meloxicamer ( 0.05 mg / kg q24h orally ) for 2 weeks .  unbeliev the cat still presented a mild lameness of the left thoracic limb , although the extension of the distal phalanges was improved compared with preoperative examination.conclusion:despite the fact that the cat had undergone onychectomy several years before , this case should be considered in a differential diagnosis of feline lameness whenever onycheromy has been performed in the past .

the ventral midbrain is a region homologous with vertebrate forebrain and hindbrain , though it is generally the ventral portion of these regions that are best represented .  the vertebrate midbrain , however , is of uniform dimension along its length , and its homology with the dorsal infundibular region of the diencephalon seems to be fairly well accepted .  it is also possible that the ventrally oriented midbrain of chordates is a homolog of the midbrain dopaminergic neurons in vertebrates .

objectiveto evaluate the efficacy of preganglionic ttransforaminal epidural steroid injection ( tfesi ) in the treatment of lumbosacral radiculopathy caused by compression at the supra - adjacent nerve root.methodsthis study included 20 patients who received tfesi using the conventional approach at the level of the intra - adjacent intervertebral disc ( l1 - s1 ) if the nerve root compression was at the lower level of l4 - 5.resultsthe mean age was 53.9 years ( sd : 13.4 ) in conventional tfesi and it was was 55.8 years ( p<0.05 ) in pregangliionic tfesi . the duration of radiculo - adjacent radiculum compression was significantly higher in the preganglonionic tfese group than in the conventional group ( p < 0.05).conclusiontotally , pregangly tfesi was found to have a better therapeutic effect on the radicula caused by the compression at l5-s1 than did conventional tfes .
