the bimaterials interface is one of the most versatile materials used in industrial engineering applications . the bimmaterials are obtained by means of a coating process and consist of coupled layers that may or may not contain filler elements , such as a foaming operation , or may be developed as welded substrates . usually , at the end of the process , the material is identified as a new single material .  the bibaterial is subjected to a hot - dip galvanizing process , which results in the formation of a bifurcation at the interface of the two materials . the experimental results show that , during the mechanical loading , the thickness of the zinc layer is uniformly distributed , with a value of 5080  mpa . the numerical computations show that the thickness and the number of cracks per unit of length increase with the time of mechanical loading . the effect of the stress singularity on the surface of the bimbaterials is also confirmed by the measurement of the strain energy distribution .

objectiveto investigate the effect of antagomir - mirna silencing on epileptiform activity in mice.methodswe studied the effects of antigomir- mir-134 in mice and in rats pre - treated with ptz - induced status epilepticus in order to investigate the efficacy of this silencing agent in the hippocampus of patients with intractable temporal lobe epilepsy ( tle).resultsthe hippocampus of mice pre-treated with antigamir-134 was significantly affected by ptz-induced seizures in the intra - amygdala ka model of tle , suggesting that antigramir - rna - silencing may be effective in the treatment of epilepsy.conclusionswe found that pre - treatment with ant-134 strongly suppressed seizures in both the intra- amygdala ka and pps models , suggesting a potential therapeutic target for mir-133 .

background : headache is a common problem in jordan , where overuse of over - the - counter drugs can lead to overuse syndromes and drug - induced headache . the aim of this study was to estimate the association between analgesic use and headache among adults in a large sample of the jordanian population in relation to age , gender and headache frequency.methods:in this study , a sample of participants ( 4,836 participants ; mean age 27   0.4  years , and male : female ratio of 59:41 ) was allowed to complete a self - conducted screening questionnaire .  Scythe the study was conducted in various regions of jordan during the period from january 2007 to november 2008.results:among the participants , 82.3% complained of headache at least once per year . the most frequently used analgesic among participants was acetaminophen ( 78.00% ) , and to a lesser extent ibuprofen ( 7.49% ) and aspirin ( 5.58% ) . the yearly prevalence of headache was found to be the same ( 82.8% ) while it was 79.9 and 81.7% for the 4049 and older than 50-year - old groups , respectively.

key clinical messagethe cause of a left ventricular pseudoaneurysm is unknown . we report a case of a 55-year - old woman who underwent a left lateral thoracotomy due to a ruptured left ventricle .  we performed a left - lateral resection of the ruptured sub - mitral right ventricular ( lv ) with calcified walls in a single plane .  the patient remained disease - free for six years .

objective : the aim of this study was to evaluate the preoperative clinical and imaging findings of patients with posterior urethral valve ( puv ) and remnant leaflets after their valve ablation.methods:we evaluated 64 patients with clinical evidence of puv , confirmed by voiding cystourethrography ( vcug ) , who were admitted between 2008 and 2012 at the shiraz university of medical sciences .  we performed cystoscopy in all patients at a follow - up session , at least 3 months after valve ablication ( range , 3 - 12 months).results:in both groups of patients , no significant statistical relationship was observed between method of ablation ( resectoscope versus urethr catheter method ) and residual leaflets ( p<0.05).conclusion:despite the higher incidence of remnant leaflets in our patients , there was no significant difference in the age at surgery ( p=0.764 ) . we also found no significant differences in the echogenicity of the renal parenchyma , presence of vur , and grade of reflux before surgery in any of our patients .

objective : the purpose of this study was to investigate the effects of optical coherence tomography ( oct ) and polarized raman spectroscopy ( prs ) on the detection of white spot lesions ( wsls ) in human teeth.methods:this initial study was performed using oct and prs . results were analyzed using matlab software to calculate the depolarization ratios ( i/i ) , and the raman depolarizations were statistically significant in all cases at p < .05 . the results indicate that , fundamentally , hypocalcified enamel is like healthy sound enamel and not in need of treatment with oct . with improved analysis methods , the current limitations with prs can be eliminated . further studies are required to nonsubjectively distinguish sound enel from white spot lesion .

the hca classification system proposed by the bordeaux group was used to classify eight cases of hca .  the histological characteristics of the tumors were evaluated with emphasis on steatosis , sinusoidal dilatation , inflammatory infiltrate , cytological atypia , acinar growth pattern , telangiectasia , and peliosis .  all eight cases were classified as hca , and immunohistochemical staining was performed on the formalin fixed paraffin embedded blocks as followed .  we found that in all four cases l - fabp and glutamine synthetase immunostaining were negative and saa immunostained was positive .

key clinical messagewe report on the role of activated microglia in chronic neurodegenerative disorders such as parkinson s disease ( pd ) , multiple system atrophy ( msa ) , and progressive supranuclear palsy ( psp ) . the authors describe the use of positron emission tomography ( pet ) imaging to investigate the role microglial activation in pd , and to evaluate its application as a disease biomarker in ms .

objectivethe aim of this study was to investigate the effect of n - feruloylserotonin ( n - f-5ht ) on the inflammatory state in the liver and its association with the pathogenesis of adjuvant - induced rheumatoid arthritis ( ra).research design and methodsthe study was conducted in rats with arthritic and untreated rats .  the rats were intradermally injected with a suspension of heat - inactivated mycobacterium butyricum in incomplete freund 's adjuvent ( difco laboratories , detroit , mi , usa ) . the experimental protocol was approved by the ethics committee of the institute of experimental pharmacology and toxicology and by the slovak state veterinary and food administration in accordance with the european convention for the protection of vertebrate animals used for experimental and other scientific purposes .  resultssthe treatment with n-f- 5ht significantly reduced the levels of il-1 , tnf- , il-6 , and inos mrna expression in the arthrite liver and the liver of the untreated rats.conclusionsthe effect of mtx on the liver was not significantly different from that observed in the rats treated with mtx

background : the prevalence of internet , computer games , and dvd and video addiction among high school students in southern iran , shiraz , and its relation to depression and anxiety are unknown . the purpose of this study was to investigate the prevalence and relationship between internet addiction and anxiety and depression.materials and methods : 1020 high school student ( males and females ) were selected randomly by area and cluster sampling from different areas of shirazi in south iran during the years 2008 and 2009 and in a cross - sectional study 1020 students were selected for the study .  the students were interviewed for addiction , generalized anxiety disorder , and major depressive disorder according to the diagnostic and statistical manual of mental disorders , 4 edition ( dsm - iv).results:the prevalence of anxiety was significantly higher in students who were computer game abusers or dependents , although it did not have any relation with the reason of playing of the computer games.conclusion:the study showed that internet addiction correlated positively with the level of depression and suicidal ideation among students who used the internet for chatting , amusement ( such as downloading music , films , and pictures ) , and reading the news compared to the students who did not use the internet .

backgroundthe normal maternal immune response to pregnancy is increasingly recognized as a dynamic process , with changes in the maternal pro / anti - inflammatory profile occurring at different stages of gestation . despite this recognition , a complete , longitudinal immunologic profile of normal icky maternal immune responses remains elusive . to address this question , we applied a multiplex array approach to study the changes in 42 cytokines in rich detail during pregnancy.methodswe collected serum aliquots from 16 healthy , primigravid women who completed a term pregnancy without any significant complications . we then compared the cytokines with the samples from healthy controls and compared them with samples from the same health system.resultswe identified significant differences in cytokine / growth factor milieu between pregnant women and healthy controls , with the following observed in pregnant women : egf ( 330.6 versus 24.8  pg / ml , p = 0.0013 ) , gro ( 1,153 .6 versus 341.6  pg/ ml , 0.001 ) , and tgf ( 15.8 versus 1.8 , p < 0.0006 ) . the interclass correlations were comparatively low for il-3 , il-4 , mcp-3 and ip-10 , suggesting that the linear tr

sarcoidosis - related granulomatous reaction of the immune system could be attributed to environmental factors . however , data supporting this hypothesis remain controversial . in this article , we report a case of non - luminal her-2/neu - positive breast cancer in a 52-year - old woman . the patient initially suspected to have metastatic disease was initially diagnosed to have breast cancer . the histological determination of lymph nodes for distinguishing metastasis from cancer was performed and the diagnosis was confirmed by lumpectomy with urgent histology of resection margins . the lymph node histopathology revealed infiltrative carcinoma with microcalcifications . the post - operative diagnosis of the patient was left breast cancer at t  shitty 1n  challeng 0 m

objectivethe purpose of this study was to determine the volume of the drusenoid ped and ensuing plateau in a 95-year - old white man.research design and methodsthis was a retrospective observational study of seven eyes with a mean age of 75 years ( range , 6089 ) and mean follow - up period of 7.7 years.resultsthe mean age was 75 years and the mean follow-up period was 7.9 years . the plateau was observed in eight eyes of whom six were female . the median age of the eye was 75.5 years . in seven eyes , the plateau appeared on the surface of the ped . in all eyes , blamd was seen as discontinuous , being present at three separate locations . in the oct b - scan , the peak of the plateau is seen in the middle of the peds . in six eyes of seven patients , the apex of the peak was seen at 4 years , and the peak at 5 years was seen in all cases . the peak and peak of blamd were observed in the same eye . in eight cases , the peaks were seen in both the right eye and the left eye , and in all of the eyes , a plateau was seen within the area of ga . in spite of

pulmonary endarteritis is a rare condition , even in patients with congenital heart disease . we report a 4-year - old male child with a history of fever and progressive right - sided weakness and cyanosis noted since 6 months of age . a full - segmental echocardiography revealed bilateral cerebral abscesses . the patient was treated with ceftriaxone and gentamicin .

pre - implantation genetic diagnosis ( pgd ) for sickle cell anaemia is a new technique that has emerged against the backdrop of in vitro fertilisation ( ivf ) technology . in this case , a 29-year - old woman and her spouse with sickle cells anaemia were successfully diagnosed with pgd . the pgd was applied clinically for the detection of sickle cancer anaemia on a fertile carrier couple with previous experiences of therapeutic abortion for affected foetuses , and a sickle disease child . in total , one pgd cycle with a frozen embryo transfer cycle were carried out . the unaffected pregnancy and delivery were established by the transfer of embryos of known genetic makeup that have undergone biopsy .

backgroundpulse rate is the number of heartbeats per minute , commonly used as beats per minute ( bpm ) . pulse rate is known to be positively correlated with triglycerides and negatively correlated with high - density lipoprotein cholesterol.objectivesthe purpose of this study was to investigate pulse rate - associated single - nucleotide polymorphisms ( snps ) from an additional genomewide association study ( gwas ) of 3,703 korean samples.methods and resultswe analyzed the association data from the gwas of 3 ,703 individuals and analyzed the snp association for pulse rate.resultsthe association analysis identified 3 snps that accounted for the variation in pulse rate .

chylous ascites are a rare complication of live donor nephrectomy . we report a case of a 39-year - old mediterranean female with a bmi of 26 who underwent a robot - assisted donor nectionomy using the da vinci surgical system . the patient was successfully treated with conservative measures .

objectiveto investigate the influence of obesity on the association between epicardial fat thickness ( eft ) and circadian bp changes in patients with recently diagnosed essential hypertension ( eh ) , with a gender subgroup analysis.research design and methodsa total of 441 patients with eh ( male / female , 236/205 ; mean age , 50.7  13.8 ) and 83 normotensive normal weight patients ( controls , male/ female , 42/41 ; mean sex , 51.0  13 .3 ) were analyzed .  the eft was measured perpendicularly from the free wall of the right ventricle at end - systole in three cardiac cycles according to the method previously described by iacobellis et al .  results revealed that , although body mass index ( bmi ) is associated with the severity of ambulatory hypertension and an increase in daytime bp , bmi does not reflect body fat distribution .  conclusionthis study suggests that there would be a sex - dependent regulation of bp associated with epicardian adipose tissue , especially in hypertensive obese patients .

backgroundkeyless abdominal rope - lifting surgery ( kars ) is a novel , gasless , laparoscopic technique used in various gynecologic operations and cholecystectomies . the aim of this study was to compare postoperative pain scores and additional analgesic requirements of kars and conventional multiport laparoscopy.methods and resultsall the operations for benign ovarian cysts were performed in our institute between november 2011 and june 2013 .  the kars group had significantly longer operative times ( by a mean of 16 minutes ) , and the postop pain scores were higher in the conventional laparopy group .  we also used a standardized pain management protocol in both groups ; thus our results suggest that the single - incision gasless laparoscope technique yielded better pain scores than conventional multiprocessed co2 laparotomy.resultsthe vas pain scores did not differ between the two groups ( p > .05 ) ; however , the abdominal cavity access and total operative times in the kar group were significantly longer than those in the traditional multiprospected co1 laparopies ( p < .05).conclusionskeyless kars yields better postoperative shoulder pain scores .

backgroundpost - ercp pancreatitis ( pep ) is the most common severe complication of endoscopic retrograde cholangiopancreatography ( ercp ) . the aim of this prospective study was to evaluate the potential risk factors for pep.methodsthis prospective study included 780 patients who underwent ercp in a tertiary care hospital during a four - year period ( 20082012 ) .  the patients were referred to this center from different parts of iran , which enhances the ability to generalize the findings for the iranian population.resultsa total of 780 patients ( male : female ratio 393:387 , mean age 57.5 years ) underwent diagnostic and therapeutic ercp with the primary diagnosis of hepatobiliary disorders .  a total of 393 men ( 50.4% ) , and 448 ( 57% ) were more than 65 years old . the patients included 393 women ( 50% ) and 448 men ( 57.6% ) who had undergone ercp . the main limitation of this study was the absence of combined evaluation of crp and esr before ercp.conclusionsthe present study examined prospectively the potential patient- and procedure - related risk factors , including esr , for the development of pep in

background : the aim of this study was to evaluate and compare the efficacy of 4% articaine hydrochloride and 2% lignocaine for the orthodontic extraction.materials and methods : this was a cross - sectional study on 50 patients at outpatient department of oral and maxillofacial surgery who needed bilateral maxillary premolar extractions .  the study was carried out on 50 of the patients .  all the patients were explained about visual analog scale ( vas ) before injecting local anesthesia.results:the mean administered volume of articaine was 0.779  0.1305 and 1.337  0

the ras association domain family ( rassf ) consists of 10 members : rass f1 - 10 .  rass is the longest variant of the rass protein , rass1a , and rassc is the second - largest splice variant . rass has been implicated in the negative regulation of cell cycle progression , cell proliferation , and cell survival . we hypothesize that rassa is a cell - type - dependent protein that is able to bind ras proteins . we also speculate that the role of rass in cardiac biology may be influenced by its interaction with the sarcolemmal calcium pump .

key clinical messagewe report the case of an adult woman with psoriatic arthritis who developed acute severe hepatitis following long - term treatment with mtx . the patient was treated with a dose of 15 mg / week of methotrexate . the periodic biological monitoring of liver enzymes : alanine aminotransferase ( alat ) , aspartate aminostransferases ( asat ) and gamma - glutamyl transpeptidase ( gamma - gt ) performed every 6 months did not reveal any abnormalities .  The patient improved on withdrawal of the drug , and there were no other confounding factors that could have caused this adverse effect . furthermore , the ade was probably caused by mtx ( who - umc criteria : probable ; naranjo 's score : 7 , probable ; and rucam scale : 5 ) .

key clinical messagethe true mirizzi syndrome ( ms ) is biliary obstruction from compression of the common hepatic duct by a gallstone impacted in the cystic duct . the diagnosis may not be immediately apparent , and management is controversial with open surgery still recommended by some authors .  Chicago a case is detailed herein of a 67-year - old man who presented with abdominal pain , fever , and jaundice .  Scythe a dilated bile duct was found on ultrasound , but the gallbladder could not be seen .  LAPD the diagnosis of mirizzis syndrome was made at ercp , and a stent was placed through the papilla .  NYPD laparoscopic retrograde ( fundus first ) cholecystectomy was carried out utilizing a laparoscopic liver retractor .  ILCS the cbd was examined with a 5-mm flexible choledochoscope showing that the duct was clear distally with the stent in place . a stenting was left through the pilla , below the obstruction and this allowed primary duct closure during surgery .

dirofilaria immitis ( the canine heartworm ) is a filarial nematode naturally hosted by dogs , cats , foxes , muskrat , raccoons , and bears .  we report the first case of human pulmonary dirofilariasis in a 48-year - old male .  the patient was diagnosed as a male with a history of unexplained parasite infection .  he had a pet dog , but the dog died 3 years ago from unidentified parasite infection.

background : the maxillary posterior area contains cancellous bones with low bone density and thin cortical bones , the quantity and quality of which are lower than those of the mandibular bone.objectives:the purpose of this study was to compare the stress distribution of various types of 2sis that were installed and restored in severely atrophied maxilla.materials and methods : a 5-year clinical study demonstrated the clinical success of two - implant - supported maxillary molars with implants installed in buccal and palatal positions . the implant - bone interface was constructed with 100% contact for complete stress transfer to the surrounding bone.results:during the 2si and 2si groups , the highest level of stress was observed on the implant bone interface and peri - implant bones in a single rp implant and the lowest stress was exhibited in 2si.conclusions:despite the high implant - bacal area , the implant / abutment complex was not fractured and the implant was not damaged .

backgroundhydatid disease ( echionococcosis ; hydatidosis ) is a parasitic disease , endemic in many sheep raising countries ( australia , south america , mediterranean countries , russia , middle east , and central asia ) . the aim of this study was to investigate the skeletal manifestations of hydatids disease in serbia , it 's demographic distribution , site involvement , complications , and bone tissue comorbidities.materials and methodsa total of 727 patients with hydatidis disease were included in the study . the radiological assessment was made on standard radiography , having in mind the length of the study period and diagnostic procedures available for that time.resultsa mean age of all patients was 40.918.8 years . the mean age at the time of diagnosis was 40 .918 . 8% of the patients were male . the incidence of long bone involvement was 44.716.6% . in group iz , the mean of adult patients ( more than 18 years old ) was 44 .716 . the radiographic findings showed that , in some cases , the cyst is infiltrating and diffuse and may lead to severe neurologic deficit and varying degrees of weakness of limbs . the

background : the workers ' health management system is one of the old systems and ensures a worker 's life and his / her family is secure after work - related accident.objectives:the present article reviews the various kinds of surveillance systems for occupational diseases in korea and resultant data , and suggest reformation of the workers' health management systems.materials and methods : the data on occupational diseases compensated as industrial accidents are collected and analyzed by the korea occupational safety and health agency ( kosha).results:the detection rate of ' suspicious cases of occupational diseases ' in the special health examination was 0.46% in 2008 , an increase from 2006 . the detection rate was 12.85% . the number of non - fatal work related diseases increased continuously until 2004 , but recently statistics have shown decreasing trend . the most compensated work -related diseases were musculoskeletal disorders ( 18.1% ) , stress ( 17.9% ) and back pain ( 16.8% ) . the prevalence rate of stress is the highest one among male workers , but musculo - induced diseases are the highest among female workers . the proportion of reported cases is very small ( under 1% of total occupational diseases ) . there is also a steadily increasing trend in

background : the irrational use of medicines is a major problem worldwide and represents the primary source of medical waste and harm . in recent years , the world health organization ( who ) and the international network of rational use of drugs ( inrud ) have developed widely used core prescribing indicators to assess the prescribing quality of primary healthcare facilities.objectives:the objective of this study was to use the who / inrudi prescribing indicator to assess quality of prescribing among general practitioners ( gps ) at different types of health facilities.patients and methods : a cross - sectional retrospective study was conducted over 6  months . gps at health facilities at national insurance fund facilities scored lower than those at state ministry of health or other health facilities such as those owned by private interests , universities , and non - governmental organizations.results:the overall index of rational drug prescribing ( irdp ) score for gps was less than optimal and characterized by significant disparities between gps and prescribers , with nhif facilities receiving a lower index .

backgroundblunt traumatic infrarenal aortic injuries are rare , with a few case reports in the literature .  a more common occurrence is an intimal flap which may form after blunt injury to the aorta , and most of these will resolve with anticoagulation alone .  this article presents the case of a young woman found to have an intimural flap in the infrareta after a car accident , and the injury progressed to a pseudoaneurysm over 3 months.case summarya 47-year - old woman with a history of hypertension and smoking was involved in a  high - speed motor vehicle accident and presented to the emergency department with back pain . computed tomographic ( ct ) scans were obtained of her abdomen and pelvis . on a single image from the abdominal scan , lucent what appeared to be either an intill flap or a small amount of contrast extravasation outside of the infraprenal abdominal aortae could be seen . lucent the patient recovered very well and was discharged from the hospital without complications .

a new yeast strain of the transmembrane virus rpt1 ( transmbrn ) was isolated from a frozen yeast sample . the transgenic yeast was then ground using an mm301 grinding mill ( restch ) under liquid nitrogen , or using a mortar and a pestle as previously described .

background : head injury is the single largest cause of death and disability following an injury in low- and middle - income countries ( lamic ) . the burden of head injury in lamic is greatest in low - and middle- income countries where 85% of the world 's population live .  the enormity of burden can be assessed by the fact that our study had more than 1500 severe head injured patients in <3 years and was conducted at only one hospital !methods:in this retrospective study , a prospectively maintained neurotrauma registry was queried from may 2010 to february 2013 for patients who had severe traumatic brain injury glasgow coma score ( gcs  8 ) at admission and had a motor response of m5 or lower on the gcs at discharge .  demographic and clinical data was analyzed , and outcome assessed at 6 months after injury using a telephonic questionnaire.results:the average hospital stay was 24.31 days ( range : 864 days ) and was 16.71 days for m5 , 20.63 days for , 26.33 days for and 30.59 days in m2 and 16.3 days for the m1 patients . the mean hospital stay at 6 month was 24 hours ( range: 864

despite its high fat content , wagyu and hanwoo beef have been considered as a premium class of beef in japan and korea . the quality of beef is determined by intramuscular fat ( imf ) and the number of farmers producing beef . in this review , we review the characteristics and health benefit of wagy and hwanwoo cattle .

background : the aim of this study was to evaluate the spectrophotometric performance of the coupled redox - complexation reaction between n - acetyl - l - cysteine ( nac ) and tiopronin ( mpg ) in pharmaceutical formulations.materials and methods :  the proposed method is based on the coupling redox complexation of the nac or mpg with 2,4,6-tripyridyl - s - triazine ( tptz ) as the chromogenic reagent .  the results of this method were compared with those obtained by the previously reported method.results:the proposed method was applied to three pharmaceutical formulations of the drugs nac and mpg . the absorption of the produced fe(iii)/tptz complex was measured at  = 593  nm against a blank solution , prepared in the same manner as 1.0  ml water . the tolerable concentration of kno3 and na2so4 was 40.0 ( molar ratio , 1000  :  1 ) . the absorbance of the mpg complex was higher with increasing tpts concentration than with the fe(ii)/rsh concentration . the effect of some interfering cations and anions on the analysis of the

background : arteriovenous malformations ( avms ) are the most common malformation in the face and neck , and they are treated by various techniques over the years , including surgical excision , irradiation , electrocoagulation , cryotherapy , intravascular magnesium or copper needles , systemic corticosteroids , interferon- , embolization , and cryotherapy.objectives:the aim of treatment is to eradicate the lesion nidus completely , which is the fundamental abnormality as even the smallest residual nids may expand to form a recurrence .

background : the incidence of rickets in extremely low birth weight ( elbw ) infants has been increasing over the past few decades . however , the severity of overall illness and degree of prematurity in this population is unclear . the aim of this study was to characterize and compare risk factors and neonatal morbidities for rickets and fractures.methods:this was a retrospective case - control study .  all infants had their serum alkaline phosphatase ( alp ) , calcium ( ca ) , phosphate ( p ) levels reported weekly and bone screen radiography at 1 month of age.results:the incidence of radiologic rickets was extremely high at 44% ( 24/55 ) due to increased survival , and the incidence increased 18 times and 3 times for severe pnac and moderate to severe bpd , respectively . in univariate analysis , the incidence was significantly higher in the rickets group than the control group ( 18.5 ; 95% ci , 1.1 - 285 ; p = 0.042 ) , while the mean level of the lowest ca and p levels were not different between groups . in multiple regression analysis after adjustment of gestation and birth weight , rickets significantly correlated with severe pulmonary dysplasia ( p < 0

kyphosis is a progressive curvature of the thoracic spine , which results in rounding or bowing of the back . lucent patients with kyphosis may present several unique challenges to an eye surgeon , the foremost being the inability to lay the head and neck in the ideal horizontal position .  shitty intraoperative difficulties include poor view , inability to maneuver surgical instruments properly and constant threat of elevated vitreous pressure .  Scythe several innovative solutions have been published , including the maximal reverse trendelenburg position and pillows under the head , neck , head and legs , use of a donut and wedge - shaped head positioner , allowing patients to remain in the upright sitting position while their head is positioned horizontally in a modified waiting room chair , performing surgery while standing [ 5 , 6 ] , using a 4-section orthopedic operating table , or laying the patients on their sides . however  Scythe the patient had a history of recurrent uveitis and glaucoma shunt surgery in the right eye .

the dual catalytic activity of surfactant- ( sds- ) mediated cleavage of c = n bonds is described . the system is a lewis acid that behaves as a leweis acid   for the cleavage and deprotection of azadienes , oximes , and oximes to produce carbonyls and amines . the resulting reaction mixture reacts with indoles to produce bis ( indolyl)alkanes in situ at room temperature under neutral conditions . the results of the two - step reaction were characterized by their ir , h nmr , c nmr and mass spectral data and also by comparison with the literature report .

background and aims : opioid substitution therapy ( ost ) is widely used to prolong and enhance the effects of opiates , and increased rates of dependence are associated with co - occurring psychosocial problems.objectives:this was a longitudinal , qualitative study involving 19 opioid - dependent service users over the course of approximately one year in order to examine changes over time in participants experiences with healthcare services , drug use and parenting.patients and methods : this was a cross - sectional study of parents accounts of opioid and benzodiazepine use , and their experiences with ost and drug use during pregnancy.results:a total of 20 participants were interviewed at around 2832 weeks gestation ; 23 months postnatal ; and 69 months postnatally .  Scythe participants were first - time parents , with a minority prescribed buprenorphine or dihydrocodeine.conclusion:despite evidence to suggest that both drugs are problematic during pregnancy , the use of ost and benzadiazepines is still prevalent among drug users worldwide .

objective . to explore the vascular and cardiac changes of osteoprotegerin ( opg ) and tnf - related apoptosis - inducing ligand ( trail ) in experimental models of dyslipidemia and diabetes.methods . a total of 12 male c57bl/6j ( cnt ) mice and 24 apolipoprotein e null ( apoe ) mice were studied for 14 weeks . at 6 weeks of age , the animals were further randomized to saline ( apo ) or streptozotocin ( ap + dm ) , which were delivered intraperitoneally in five consecutive daily doses . after 14 weeks , the mice were anesthetized with thiobutabarbital sodium ( inactin , sigma - aldrich ) . the animals in the apoe group were immunosthetized for aortic and cardiac opg and trail expression and were immunoassayed with a catalyzed signal amplification system ( dako).results . the levels of circulating and circulating opg were 1.91  0.21  ng / ml in the control group , 2.05  0 .1  ng/ ml in apoe and 3.1  0

the ability of ( )-palmyrolide a and its analogues to block veratridine - induced elevation of neuronal [ na]i was investigated in murine primary cerebrocortical neurons .  Scythe and  Scythe were synthesized via the hydrogenation of diastereomers 1 and 2 , respectively , and the ability of these analogues was determined by nmr and  weap computational analysis .  weap and  shitty analogues 5 and 6 were  looph analogues , and their ability to discriminate between conformations was determined through nmr spectroscopy .  Nanto and  warr analogues 7 , 8 , and 9 were  Scythe analogues that were inactive as blockers of veratriine - stimulated na influx .  warr and ahime analogues 10 and 12 were inactive in vivo as blockers .  Theoretically , the two analogues were inactive at the na - binding site of  Scythe .

human fingertip microflora left behind on touched objects at crime scenes may potentially contain forensically relevant information that may be useful for human host inferences accessible via microbial dna fingerprinting of physical fingerprints . we investigated and compared by means of dna fingerprints the transient ( tm ) and resident ( rm ) staphylococcus species and pfge types from dutch volunteers and bangladeshi south asians , indicating that geographic inferences of human hosts from fingertip fingerprint dna analysis is not feasible .  we conclude that microbial fingerprint analysis of human skin is not possible using dna .

assisted / supported mechanical ventilation is designed to interact with patient muscle activity and ' share ' the work of breathing . if properly done , assisted / supported ventilation can synchronize with patient effort during all three phases of breath delivery : breath initiation , flow delivery , and breath termination ( cycling ) . however , dys - synchronous interactions can overload ventilatory muscles ( ' imposed ' loads ) , compromise alveolar ventilation , disrupt sleep patterns , and cause patient discomfort , prompting additional sedation . this study underscores the fact that patient - ventilator interactions are common and can be a barrier to niv effectiveness .

key clinical messagepostanginal septicaemia ( ls ) is a rare entity with a mortality reaching 90% . ls is a classic triad of oropahryngeal sepsis , internal jugular vein ( ijv ) thrombophlebitis and metastatic abscess formation .  we report a case in which the primary vascular involvement is that of the ejv , with a corresponding normal i.v. .

helicobacter pylori is a gram - negative , spiral and microaerophilic microorganism that was first isolated from the stomach of patients afflicted with peptic ulcer .  we used the polymerase chain reaction ( pcr ) technique to determine the presence of h. pylor in the middle ear mucosa of patients with chronic infections of the middle and were candidates to undergo surgery in the imam khomeini or apadana hospitals of ahvaz in 2013 .  the pcr method was used to amplify the typing region of the mucosa . the chi - squared and independent - samples t - test were also used to analyze the data . the selected level of significance was p < 0.05.  we found that of the 29 male patients , 15 cases were ( 51.7% ) h.pylori - positive , while of the 27 female patients 16 cases ( 59.3% ) were h.

background : the use of radiosurgery ( gkrs ) in the treatment of patients with trigeminal neuralgia ( tn ) is increasing . however , there are still questions regarding optimal treatment modalities in specific patient subsets.aims:the goal of this paper is to provide a modern review of the literature thoroughly analyzing the efficacy of gkr in the management of tn , as well as evaluating the treatment planning and methods associated with this evolving modality.materials and methods : we reviewed the literature from 2006 to 2011 and analyzed the clinical outcomes of patients treated with gk rs for tn.results:the median followup of 64 months was 35.9 months , with a median of 69.5% of patients reporting complete pain relief . the median follow-up was 58.2 months . the mean age of the group with a previous radiosurgical procedure was 54.5 years , with the mean follow - up duration being 68.6 months . patients with a history of radiosurgical procedures were more likely to experience facial numbness and other facial sensory changes when compared to patients treated once with the other modalities.conclusions:gkrs has proven to be an effective initial and repeat treatment option for patients with tn .

the use of endoscopic vein harvesting for the saphenous vein has become increasingly common and awareness and prevention of the potential for a co2 embolism is important . we report a case of a patient who underwent endoscopic venous insufflation of the left internal mammary artery . the patient was intubated without any difficulty after routine intravenous induction with etomidate , sufentanil , and rocuronium .  the patient 's end - tidal co2 ( etco2 ) had increased from 36 to 44 mmhg followed by increasing pulmonary artery pressure from 42/20 to 60/39 mmhgi within 1 minute .  tee examination in the mid - esophageal bicaval view revealed no further evidence of co2 absorption , and the surgical team cauterized the open vascular structures .  we believe that the patient recovered without any adverse neurological sequelae .

background and objectives : the purpose of this study was to determine the status of drywood termite colonies in incisitermes minor ( hagen ) and cryptotermes brevis ( walker ) structures.materials and methods : a total of 6,662 drywood pellets were collected from incisitormes minor and fecal pellets of incisitotototales minor workers and soldiers . the pellets were separated into two groups : those with a significant positive slope (   =  0.05 ) and those with significant negative slopes ( 0.01 ) . the fecal pellet mixture was separated into the two groups by sequentially sifting through a colonthe index , iage , and regressed against the days of aging ( independent variable x).results:during the study period ( 0 , 30 , 90 , and 365  days ) , 73 hydrocarbon peaks were identified from fecal flocks of the same species . of these , 19 of 73 ( 26% ) had a significant change , either positive ( five ) or negative ( 14 ) , over time . the percentage of each hydrocarbon peak for pellets of each aging period was transformed to the log of the percentage ( dependent variable y ) and the number of double bonds following a

this paper describes a new approach to computing solvation free energies of transfer of ions and charged solutes in  Scythe .  Scythe is a new , explicit - solvent model of solvation that uses a quasi - explicit assembly ( sea ) water model to compute  Scythe free energies .  weap is a novel approach because it uses a non - explicit water boundary to calculate  Scythe solvation energies .

background : hydatid cyst is a common cause of liver disease in humans and echinococcosis restricted to infection with the adult stage in carnivorous animals . the liver is a critical organ for the detoxification of a broad range of chemical substrates . recently , the genetics , structure and function of the human cytosolic gst enzyme with emphasis on their roles in the cellular metabolism has been defined . in this study , gst activity was detected in most mammalian tissues , especially in the liver which plays a key role in detoxification.methods:this study was performed to compare the mean values of protein concentration and enzyme activity between healthy and cystic liver tissues or parasite and liver tissues respectively.results:a total of 10 samples of parasites were obtained from 10 healthy and 10 infected liver tissues . the protein concentration of healthy liver was higher than infected liver ( p < 0.05 ) . the enzyme activity of parasite was lower than healthy liver tissues ( p = 0.01 ) .  the gst protein bands with 24kda and 25kda were found in the extracts of parasites and healthy and infected liver tissue respectively . the gsts activity of parasites was higher in the samples of parasite and healthy liver tissue .

objectiveto investigate the association between fibrinolytic variables and the development of type 2 diabetes.research design and methodsa total of 2,000 randomly selected subjects aged 25 to 64 years were invited to participate in a 75-gram oral glucose tolerance test ( ogtt ) in a randomly selected subset of subjects without known diabetes.resultsthe risk of developing diabetes increased with increasing quartiles of tissue plasminogen activator ( tpa ) and tissue plasma activator inhibitor-1 ( pai-1 ) and decreased in a similar way for tpa.conclusionsthe association between tpa antigen and diabetes was not statistically significant .

backgroundselective serotonin reuptake inhibitors ( ssris ) are first - line treatments in many countries including japan . the primary objective of the study was to compare the onset of antidepressant efficacy for patients taking duloxetine 60 mg / day versus escitalopram 10 mg /day in the acute treatment of patients with mdd.methodsthe eli lilly clinical trial database contains all clinical trials of dulxetine for patients with depression that were conducted in japan.resultsthe common inclusion criteria for the included studies ( hmat a , hmat b , hmcv , hmcr ) were as follows : male or female outpatients aged at least 18 years who met dsm - iv ( diagnostic and statistical manual for mental disorders , 4th edition )17 criteria for nonpsychotic mdd and had a clinical global impression score 4 , a 17-item hamilton rating scale for depression ( hamd17 ) total score 15 , or a montgomery  sberg depression rating scale ( hama ) total scores 22.  newcom the primary endpoint was mean change from baseline in hama total score from baseline to week 8 .  newcom secondary endpoints were mean change in hamd 17 subscale score , response rate

this paper aims to introduce a new teaching concept in the institute for the history of medicine at giessen university , which aims to provide students with an insight into the issues and  problems encountered in medical settings , particularly those that arise from the subjective perception of people on the fringe of society .  the aim of this teaching concept is to systematically draw students attention to the following aspects and dimensions :   the significance of each particular life situation , experience of suffering and particular ways of patients interaction in order to design ( medical ) support services that will pick up on their specific needs ; in this context the concept and method of field research and participant observation from ( medical anthropology ) is taught ; the unsettling impact an unfamiliar setting can have in the context of doctor / patient interaction , and as a consequence gaining awareness of the importance of one s own subjectivity ( i.e. , of the medical staff ) in one s dealing with persons requiring help ; and the lack of familiarity / familiarity in the actual setting . the aim is to draw students to the fact that the medical perspective on the discomfort presented ( on scientific grounds ,  objective  ) needs to be meaningfully and systematically complemented by including the patient s perspective ( partly ambivalence / rejection of support services ) .

objective : the aim of this study was to determine the actual status of infection with foodborne liver and intestinal flukes in lao peoples democratic republic ( lao pdr ) in cholangiocarcinoma.materials and methods : a total of 1,460 fecal samples ( 1 sample per person ) were collected from the residents of 12 villages ( in 6 districts ) in both saravane and champasak province .  the overall helminth egg positive rate was 78.8% and 66.4% , respectively , and the overall fecal load of hampala dispar , cyclocheilichthys enoplos , echinostoma revolutum , artyfechinostomum malayanum , echinochasmus japonicus , and taenia spp .  spp.  shaka were the most highly prevalent parasites in the surveyed districts , with a prevalence of 69.9% ( 46.5 - 87.2% by district ) and 46.3% ( 7.5- 73.9 % ) , respectively .  a total number of 543,852 helminths were recovered ( 18,128 per person ; range 6 - 129,

this article discusses the impact of data quality on patients and families . it also highlights the role of consumers as the original data stewards , generating and sharing critical information to inform better research , safer clinical care , and  ultimately  improved health outcomes .

backgroundadverse drug reactions ( adrs ) , including interactions , in older people are a common cause of admission to hospital . however , rhabdomyolysis related to macrolide - statin interaction has been reported in only one previous case report . we report the case of a 90-year - old caucasian male , admitted to the university hospital of pisa for dyspnea , who experienced rhabdyolytic reaction related to clarithromycin treatment . the patient had advanced cognitive impairment making him unable to easily refer any symptom , and the diagnosis was made by the huge elevation of biochemical markers ( 6.5 times the upper normal value for ck , 8.5x for myoglobin ) . the diagnosis of rhabdiosis was made on the sixth hospital day and the concomitant therapy with ceftriaxone , bisoprolol , and aerosol with salbutamol and oxitropium was also started .

supravalvar mitral ring is a circumferential ridge or membrane arising from the left atrial wall overlying the mitral valve . it is a membranous variety , which may be difficult to detect because the membrane often adheres to the anterior mitral leaflet while remaining just proximal to the posterior mitral stem .  we herein present a case of a 17-year - old male , who presented with syncope .  he had undergone a cardiac operation for ventricular septal defect ( vsd ) closure and mitral repair . in chest x - ray , he had pulmonary hypertension with pulmonary artery pressure ( pap ) of 80/40 mm hg , pulmonary capillary wedge pressure of 23 mmhg , and gradient in the miteral valve plane of 40 mm hhg . the electrocardiogram result showed normal sinus rhythm , had undergone right bundle branch block , and right ventricular hypertrophy .

background : qualitative research is an integral part of research . however , it is not only useful as the first stage of quantitative research , but can also play a key role in  validating it or in providing a different viewpoint on the same social phenomena.objectives:the authors endeavor to shine a light on the ethical issues affecting researchers and propose strategies to face the ethical challenges of qualitative studies , so as to provide applicable and trustworthy outcomes  .

background : the development of drug resistance in aquaculture has been accelerated distinctly by selective pressure due to inappropriate and overuse of the antimicrobial drugs . the use of antibiotics has been widely used in fish farming for either therapeutic , prophylactic , or other purposes . the emergence of antibiotic resistance in fish and other cultured organisms has contributed to the rise of resistant microbes around the world . the need for continuous monitoring of the antibiotic resistance patterns should not be overlooked and the community should be educated on the awareness of antibiotic resistant bacteria .

key clinical messagethe presented case involved a 32-year - old woman with bilateral heel numbness due to bilateral neuropathy of the medial calcaneal nerve due to external compression during vaginal delivery . the patient had no previous history of neurological disorders or risk factors for neuropathy during epidural analgesia .

background : haemotropic mycoplasma ( haemoplasmas ) are bacterial organisms without cell walls that attach to and grow on the surface of red blood cells .  the aim of this study was to evaluate , using a conventional pcr assay , the prevalence of haemocomoplasma haemominutum ( mhf ) and candidatus mycoperasma haemsominutus  ( cmhm ) in stray cats from urban colonies in milan ( northern italy ) . methods : during a 2-year collection period ( january 2008 to january 2010 ) , blood samples were taken from 260 stray cats ( urban colonies ) from urban colony in milanian ( northernitaly ) , under a trap - neuter - release ( tnr ) program approved by the local authority of the city council . results : haemaoplasma infection was detected in 33.1% ( 86/260 , 95% ci 26.540.9% ) of blood samples . of the positive samples , 28 cats ( 10.8% ) were infected with cmhm and 58 cats ( 22.3% ) with mhm positive status were infected . associations between haemocytopenia and cmhm were not statistically significant.

background : the conners adult adhd rating scale ( caars ) self - report ( screening version ) is used to screen and treat patients with car accidents . the association of adhd with traffic injuries is so important that driving center of canada was listed the uncontrolled adhd as an item for giving certificate to the drivers.objectives:the purpose of this study was to compare the frequency of adult adh with those of matched controls.patients and methods : the study was performed in two university hospitals in tabriz , iran during a 13- month period - august 2008 to september 2009 .  the sample size was calculated using sas software version 9.1 based on proportion comparison tests to ensure 80% statistical power and type 1 error less than 0.05.results:the mean driving hours were significantly higher in case group ( p= 0.24 ) . the mean driving time was significantly more compared to controls ( p<0.05).conclusion:despite of numerous studies about the association between adhd and car accidents , it seems that most car accidents involving driver injury are not related to adhd .

the epigenetic chromatin modification of cytosines at cpg dinucleotides ( cpgs ) in the human trophoblast has been implicated in the control of crh gene expression . however , it remains unclear whether the methylation of the promoter is directly related to gene activity . we have used the bewo human choriocarcinoma - derived cell line to explore the relationship between this epigenetic modification and crh expression in a trophoblastic cell type .  we have determined that the cpg sites within the crh proximal promoter are partially methylated with significant differences among the individual sites . furthermore , we have shown that the methylated cpg site - specific and allele independent partial methylation is associated with the increase of the crhs gene expression , suggesting that this methylation determines the contribution of the cre , its various associated transcription factors , and a trothoblast specific alternative camp - response element to crh protein expression .  our results suggest that dna methylation controls crh genes indirectly , but any intervening factor that may regulate crh is not to be determined .

the three compounds lincomycin ( a natural antibiotic produced by streptomyces lincolnensis and discovered in 1961 ) , clindamycin , and pirlimycin comprise a group of clinically important antibiotics known as lincosamides . in this work , we characterize the conformations and molecular properties of the three compounds , which are bound to the ribosome , and describe the interaction energy between the two conformers . we use the atoms in molecules ( aim ) method to analyze the conformational changes of the two compounds , and we use a redundant coordinate algorithm to optimize the geometrical parameters . the results show that the electron density of clindamides is slightly decreased in the a conformer , while the charge transfer of the pyrrolidynyl propyl group is rotated by 180 relative to the other conformer .  the results indicate that the energy profit from the formation of the ihb is the dominant factor in the greater stability of the b conformer.

background : the rising prevalence of alzheimer s disease and related dementias ( henceforth referred to as dementia ) is emerging as a leading global health system challenge.objectives:this paper describes the results of a consensus approach to identify quality indicators ( qis ) and quality improvement mechanisms for dementia care by reviewing existing clinical guidelines and quality indicator and improvement compendiums developed with standardized methods.patients and methods : two survey rounds were conducted between april and june 2014 . in the first round , 842 surveys were distributed with a response rate of 21.3% .  The majority of respondents were physicians , and nurses and other health professionals equally represented the remainder of respondents . in round 2 ,  Scythe respondents had an average of 14.6  10.1 years of clinical practice with older adults and practice settings were similar to round 1 . among pcmc respondents ,  The most recognized a formal quality assurance framework and individual qis as essential . however , the response rate remained below what is considered appropriate for delphi surveys , and ratings of individual qi , except those related to physical examination , remained stable between rounds.results:the most significant barriers to the implementation of the quality assurance frameworks were the perceived burden of documentation required to implement qis and

symptomatic supravesical obstructive uropathy in a patient with dual functioning kidneys is classically characterized by bilateral hydroureters / hydronephrosis and an empty urinary bladder .  we believe that in such instances , the more sensitive albeit invasive percutaneous nephrostogram of the apparently normal appearing kidney is therapeutic and will lead to greater renal salvage .

background : phage display technology has become an increasingly popular tool for basic basic research such as the exploration of protein - protein interaction networks and sites , and applied research . in this study , we describe a web server named sarotup , which is an acronym for  scanner and reporter of target - unrelated peptides  . the web server is a web application for scanning , reporting , and precluding possible target - related peptides . the user can either paste a set of peptides in raw sequence format or upload a sequence file to the sarotups server for scanning . the results are compared to show if target - similar peptides can be identified through control and binding competition experiments.methods:in this web application , we constructed two - test data sets from [ 12 , 13 , 1523 , 25 , 26 ] . the first data set contains 8 cases ; 6 of them are sourced from test cases used in extant programs for mimotope - based epitope mapping . the left 2 are cases studies published recently .  the second data set is composed of 100 peptides , that is , 100 sequences . the data set was then used to predict epitope using mapitope or pepsurf algorithm . the number of true positive residues improved from eight to eleven

reversible focal lesions in the splenium of the corpus callosum ( scc ) have been found in patients with various conditions including seizures , antiepileptic drug toxicity or withdrawal , viral encephalitis , hypoglycemia , wernicke 's encephalopathy , marchiafava - bignami disease , sympathomimetic - induced kaleidoscopic visual illusion syndrome , hemolytic uremic syndrome , altitude brain injury , and acute axonal injury .  we report an adult who presented with non - specific dizziness and lesions of the scc on magnetic resonance imaging . the patient was diagnosed with hemorrhagic fever with renal failure syndrome ( hfrs ) with serologically proven hantaan virus infection .  he was treated with cefotaxime and clindamycin for a suspected infection , and his fever had subsided . the next day , he developed thrombocytopenia ( 4010/l ) and was transferred to our emergency room for further evaluation .  his mri showed scc lesions .

key clinical messagewe present a 91-year - old gentleman with history of hypertension , dyslipidemia and as presented to our office on 7/2015 with new onset sub sternal burning pain of 6 weeks duration . the patient was referred for a cardiac catheterization to evaluate his coronary anatomy prior to aortic valve replacement .  he was diagnosed with critical as with significant symptom manifested as chest pain that was managed successfully without surgical avr or tavr .  we will also briefly review incidence , etiology , grading of as and current guidelines for avr.

background and aims : erythropoiesis is a common complication of haemoglobinopathies , and is caused by the disruption of the globin genes expressed in red blood cells . the aim of this study was to investigate the effects of cellular reprogramming on haematopoietic stem cells ( ipscs ) in a mouse model of sickle cell anaemia.methods:this study was carried out in a humanized sickle - cell anaemic mouse model . the ipsc state was used to reprogram human fibroblasts into erythrocytes . results:the ipsc stage was successfully reprogrammed into a cell type of choice and the erythroid markers cd36 , cd235a , and cd71 increased significantly . furthermore , these erytherroid cells were able to enucleate , albeit with reduced capacity compared to hesc - derived erythyroid cells , and were found to express functional hb ( predominantly hbf ) . conversely , these hipsc cells exhibited a dramatically reduced capacity to produce erytheoretic cells , suggesting that this technique could potentially be used to treat haemolytic anaemia in vivo . conclusion:this paper demonstrates that cellular rep

gastroembolism is a rare complication of coronary artery bypass graft surgery , and it may even require emergent conversion to cardiopulmonary bypass ( cpb ) . in the rare case of a gas embolism occurring during opcab , supportive measures , needle aspiration of gas , and cpr with direct cardiac massage can be attemped before initiating cpb . in refractory cases , while considering emergent conversions to cpb , direct injection of drugs to the aortic root can be attempted before initiating . in this case report , we report a patient who underwent a sternotomy with a massive gas floating at the orifice of the mid right coronary artery ( rca ) . the patient had an unremarkable postoperative course without neurologic deficits and was discharged 10 days after the surgery .

multiple sclerosis ( ms ) is a chronic progressive inflammatory and neurodegenerative disease of human central nervous system ( cns ) which usually affects young adults , with a reported median age of onset of approximately 30 years . ms presents with various patterns , however , inflammatory demyelination and oligodendrocyte loss and neuronal and axonal degeneration constitute salient features of microscopic examination of ms lesions . dalfampridine ( 4-aminopyridine ) is an oral blocker of voltage - sensitive potassium channels , which has been demonstrated to improve conduction and propagation of the action potential along the demyelin sheath . the primary aim of this study was to assess the efficacy , safety , and pharmacodynamics of extended - release dalfamidine in ms patients . the study was performed in 9 weeks and the patients were randomized to be treated with either dalfampsidine ( 10 mg twice daily ; n = 120 ) or placebo ( n = 119 ) orally twice daily for a period of 14 weeks .  the primary outcome measures of this clinical trial included time to walk 8 meters , time to climb four stairs , maximum voluntary isometric contraction measured quiantitatively , manual muscle testing , grip strength , edss , and the patient s global impression

objectiveto compare the diagnostic value of unprocessed digital images ( psp ) and inverted digital images for detection of peri - implant defects using scanora software.materials and methodsa total of 30 implant placement sites including 10 control sites , 10 sites with 0.425 mm peri- implant space and 10 sites without peri implant space were created using a scanora optime imaging system ( soredex corporation , helsinki , finland ) , psp size 2 sensor ( 40.0mm30.0 mm ) and minray dental x ray system . the psp and digital sensor were used for the detection of small and large defects.resultsthe t - test showed that the complete sensitivity and specificity of the two modalities were higher than the t- test ( p<0.05 ) . the t - tests found a statistically significant difference in complete sensitivity for detection for small defects ( p=0.003 ) and unprocesses had a higher diagnostic value than inverted images . the mean complete sensitivity of the p - test was significantly different based on the equality of variances ( p>0.055 ) . considering the equality , the complete specificity of unprocessinged and inverted images was not significantly different ( p

aorto - esophageal fistula ( aef ) is a rare condition presenting as ugib .  it is a complication of thoracic aneurysm rupture and is a major cause of morbidity and mortality . it is often missed altogether leading to catastrophic consequences . we present a case of aef which was initially treated as variceal bleeding and later promptly diagnosed with computed tomography ( ct ) .

the silicon pn junction is a landmark in the development of modern microelectronics .  we have shown that p- and n - type doped hydrogels can be synthesized and be used to built pn junctions .  the current densities per unit mass , j / m2 , of the gel were measured against the time , the applied voltage and swelling ratio of the gels .  it was shown that the current density decreases with increasing doping concentration , and the swelling ratio increases with increasing current concentration .  he said that the p - type hydrogel can be used as a p- junction .

key clinical messagethe malignant transformation of uterine leiomyosarcoma ( pbml ) is extremely rare . we report a case of a 61-year - old female who underwent a hysterectomy in 2005 , and the pathologic diagnosis was leioma of the uterus . in 2006 , ancouver chest computed tomography ( ct ) findings demonstrated multiple nodules in both lungs . ancouver biopsy revealed a proliferating spindle cell tumor showing relatively bland nuclei , no pleomorphism , and no mitoses .  Vancouver biopsy confirmed the tumor as leiomoma . in addition , immunohistochemical staining analysis was positive for smooth muscle actin , desmin , vimentin , estrogen receptor , and progesterone receptor ( pr ) , and negative for cd34 , pan - ck , and s100 proteins .

backgroundthe use of simple copd screening questionnaires to detect persistent airflow limitation may help in the early diagnosis of persistent airway obstruction ( ao ) . the copd population screener ( copd - ps ) is a self - administered questionnaire to identify individuals at increased risk of persistent ao . the aim of this cross - sectional study was to compare the screening efficacy of copd questionnaires in the general japanese population and to assess the ability of both instruments to discriminate between subjects with and without ao.methodsthis was a population - based study that included 2,336 subjects 40 years of age and older who completed copd questionnaire and ipag questionnaires . the subjects who provided informed consent to participate in the health checkup independently completed the japanes version of the two questionnaires , and then , in addition to their usual clinical tests , underwent spirometry using a chestgraph hi-105 spirometer ( chest mi , tokyo , japan ) . after spirometry , the subjects were evaluated by the net reclassification improvement ( nri ) and integrated discrimination improvement ( idi ) curves.resultsthe mean and ian scores were 3.9 and 2.4 , respectively , and the median scores were 4 and 2

background : the prevalence of cytomegalovirus ( cmv ) infection in pregnant women in northern italy ranges from 0.5% to 4% . the incidence of primary infection among pregnant women ranges from 1.4% to 2% ; the rate of seroconversion during pregnancy ranges from 3.7% among women belonging to populations with a low seroprevalence ( 55% ) and 1.0%1.6% among those belonging to population with a high seroprecipitation rate ( 85% ) . the aim of this study was to assess the incidence and risk of acquiring cmv infection in pregnancy in an urban area in north italy in the period 20052007.materials and methods : during the three years 20052007 , the microbiology unit of hospital of legnano , received samples for the detection of cmv antibodies from 2817 pregnant women . igm - positive samples were confirmed by enzyme - linked immunosorbent assay ( elisa ) ( vidas cmv igm , biomrieux , lyon , france ) , and were considered positive when their index was   0.90 , borderline when   < 0.80 , and negative when their   > 0.70 .

bladder cancer is the second most commonly diagnosed genitourinary malignancy in the usa , with an estimated 74,000 newly diagnosed cases and 16,000 deaths in 2015 . of these , about 70% present as non - muscle invasive bladder cancer ( nmibc ) , which comprises a heterogeneous group of patients and includes pathological stage ta ( confinement to the epithelium or mucosa ) , t1 ( invasion of the subepithelial connective tissue or lamina propria ) and cis ( tis : flat , high - grade , non - papillary carcinomas confined to the urothelium ) . of all newly diagnosed patients , 70% of patients present as stage ta , 20% as t1 and 10% as cis . of those newly diagnosed nmibcs , 70 - 70% are stage ta and 20% are non - invasive tumors , whereas patients with t1 disease have a higher probability of recurrence and progression . in patients with low - grade ta disease , only 6.6% ( 171 of 2596 ) patients received six induction instillations . in high- grade ta patients , the risk of disease recurrence varied from 15% to 61% at 1 year and from 31% to 78% at

background : the goal of personalized medicine is to change the assignment of therapies from a population - based approach to an individualized approach . the aim of personalized therapy is to improve the outcome of patients with a good disease prognosis . the purpose of this paper is to develop a procedure to find sex - specific prognostic and predictive genomic biomarkers in order to assign individualized treatments in a personalized paradigm.methods:in this gene - expression data set , a set of potential male - specific genes are selected at least 75% of the time in the entire loocv . the data set is randomly split into two subsets : a training set for model building and a test set for performance assessment . the results are compared with the results obtained from the data sets obtained from other data sets.results:the overall average accuracy of this data set was 71.9% . for male patients , the accuracy was 67.7% , but the accuracy without the commonly identified genes was 72% . the accuracy with female patients was 76.2% . in female patients , however , the overall accuracy was 76% . among 83 patients in the training dataset , the selected genes showed higher accuracy ( 67.9 % ) to classify male patients into m / nm than the accuracy to classify

objectiveto describe the successful pregnancy and birth after pgd for otc deficiency with simultaneous analyses of fish and duplex - nested polymerase chain reaction ( pcr ) in korea.methodsthis was a singleton pregnancy and the genotype of the baby was confirmed to be a normal male by amniocentesis at 16 weeks of gestation.resultsthe pgd cycle resulted in the successful selection of genetically and chromosomally normal embryos in a couple at risk of transmitting the otc mutation.conclusionsthe simultaneous analysis of the duplex- nested pcr and fish analysis in one blastomere ( cell recycling ) was reported and could be used to detect the aneuploidy , but the rate of ado after pcr was 90.9% .

backgroundmusculoskeletal stiffness and limited range of motion ( rom ) can restrict functional joint @# movement , particularly during ankle supination following neurological diseases .  Scythe studies have reported that balance - training programs that alter somatosensory input , such as the use of an unstable support surface , can be helpful in hemiplegic patients.objectivesthe purpose of this study was to investigate the effects of unstable  Scythe on the active and passive ankle dorsiflexion angles in  Scythe patients with  warr with ankle stiffness.methodsa total of 10  skeletally impaired  warr patients were randomly assigned to two groups ( n = 5 ) and their height and  clout weight were measured before and after  Scythe stretching exercises .  warr and  Scythe performed ankle stretching exercises using an air - cushioned inclined board that provided an unstable surface for performing  Scythe exercises . the  Scythe and the  warr groups performed ankle stretches exercises using a wooden inclined board .  weap and  Berserker performed ankle dorsification stretching exercises with an air- cushioned  Scythe inclined board , and  warr performed ankle stretch exercises using  Scythe.resultsthe active and

background : renal involvement in sjgren 's syndrome ( ss ) usually manifests with fanconi syndrome , distal ( type 1 ) renal tubular acidosis ( rta ) , nephrogenic diabetes insipidus , and hypokalemia.objectives:to the best of our knowledge , only five cases of acquired gitelman syndrome have been reported in english literature so far . among these five cases ,  Scythe four had ss , one was a case of chronic sialoadenitis . we believe that ss presenting as acquired gitman syndrome may be relatively rare .

the aim of this study was to explore one particular aspect of follow - up home visits : the motivation and rationale of local care providers to invest time and effort in such a cross - sectoral activity . the study was conducted in a danish hospital setting . the interviews were conducted in march  may 2010 . the results indicated that the gps , district nurses and hospital staff are highly motivated to take part in such an intervention .

alzheimer s disease ( ad ) is a progressive neurodegenerative disorder characterized by an extensive deposition of amyloid  ( a ) peptides in extracellular amyloids and by intracellular neurofibrillary tangles ( nfts ) of hyper - phosphorylated tau protein .  the major autophagic systems described so far are macroautophagy and chaperone - mediated autophagy ( cma ) . the ubiquitin - b mutant protein ( ubb+1 ) is the major protein responsible for protein aggregation and degradation . the cma is a protein - degradation pathway that involves the degradation of misfolded and aggregated proteins and the degradation by the proteasome . the hsp70 co - chaperones ( ups ) and the chaperonin ( chip ) are the major proteins responsible for proteasomal degradation and degradation of a40 and a42 , respectively . the ups and the autophagosome are also involved in protein degradation .  he proposed that aging is a major risk factor for ad , which may add to a novel view and understanding of ad pathogenesis .

objective : to evaluate the effect of teriparatide ( 134 recombinant human parathyroid hormone ) for enhancing bone formation in osteoporosis in elderly patients.materials and methods : sixty - two elderly patients ( mean age    standard deviation [ sd ]  =  70.1   3.7 ) underwent instrumented lumbar fusion for various degenerative pathologies over a period of time.results:a total of 283 patients ( 66.7% ) were enrolled in the study . the mean age was 70.11 years and the mean follow - up period was 27 months . the most common parameters were : : ( a ) total number of screws showing signs of loosening , ( b ) number of screw loosening and ( c ) the incidence of screw loosenening.conclusion:this study evaluates the radiological outcome following postoperative teripatide administration in patients undergoing multilevel instrumented spinal fusion surgery.conclusions:this is a retrospective , nonplacebo controlled , retrospective , single center study . we evaluated the outcome following teripratide administration and the use of ct as an evaluation tool to assess bone graft union and reduce the incidence and screw loosen after lumbarr spinal fusion surgeries in

background : the prevalence of metabolic syndrome ( ms ) in asia is increasing substantially and is one of the major contributors of disease prevalence due to its pathophysiological link to other cardiovascular risks such as hypertension and diabetes.objectives:the aim of this study was to establish the prevalence and the relationship between the components of ms and lifestyle of the participants.patients and methods : the subjects were the participants of the  programme for detection and management of chronic kidney disease , hypertension , diabetes and cardiovascular disease ,  a community - based screening programme in eastern nepal . the data were recorded using the auscultatory method with a random zero mercury sphygmomanometer and standard cuff ( 12  34  cm ) . the participants ' waist circumference was measured by the ausceptatory method . the blood pressure measurement was taken in the seated position , quietly in a chair with feet on the floor and an arm support at the heart level.results:the prevalence of ms was observed in 22.5% ( n = 494/2191 ) of the subjects according to the idf criteria and 20.7% ( 454/2190 ) according to ncep criteria.conclusion:although the prevalence was higher in the older age groups , the prevalence

[ purpose ] the aim of this study was to evaluate the effects of horseback riding exercise equipment on the balance and gait abilities of elderly patients with osteoarthritis . [ results ] the static , dynamic , and functional balance abilities of patients who sembly undertook horseback exercises on exercise equipment were measured using a frt and  Scythe sfbbs .
