[ conclusions ] the results suggest that horse horseback rider riding exercise may improve the static and functional ability of osteoarritis patients .

medulloblastomas are characterized by activation of the hedgehog ( hh ) signaling pathway and are often driven by mutations in hh signaling components . however , recent studies have shown that recurrent tp53 mutations are infrequent in human wnt ( with a rate of 16% ) and shh primary medulloblomas ( with an incidence of 13% to 21% , depending on the study ) and are indicators of poor prognosis exclusively in shh medullolastoma . here , we discuss how cell senescence shapes the natural history and molecular evolution of this childhood cancer .

peripartum cardiomyopathy ( vt ) is a hereditary disorder of cardiac ion channels causing abnormal electrical activation of the heart . vt originating from the right ventricular outflow tract ( rvot ) is the most common cause of ventricular arrhythmia in pregnant women with structural heart disease ( chd ) . we report two cases of vt arising during pregnancy in which the patient was hemodynamically stable .

background and objectives : the purpose of this study was to investigate system - wide changes in protein expression during growth on dibenzofuran , a nontoxic surrogate for dibenzo - p - dioxin , as compared to nonselective growth media.methods:a total of 500 rw1 biological replicates were analyzed using difference gel eletrophoresis ( dige ) coupled with mass spectrometry ( ms ) to exploit recently gathered rw 1 genome data . results : the unchanged proteins represented basic cell functions , although biosynthesis , catabolism , and transport proteins dominated the identities.conclusion:this study highlights the changes observed in response to growth on the dibzofuran degradation media . it also highlights the potential of s. wittichii to enhance the biodegradation of dioxins .

objective . to compare , for the first time , the efficacy of topical preparation of boswellia serrata gum resin extracts ( bosexil ) with a placebo formulation in the treatment of psoriatic and eczematous symptoms.method . this was a randomized , placebo - controlled , double - blind study . patients were randomly assigned to one of the following groups : bosesxil , v. myrtillus seed oil , or placebo .  results . bosexpression of polyunsatured fatty acids ( bas ) and anti - inflammatory properties were observed in patients with psoriasis and erythematous dermatitis , respectively . results . in psoriasis , bosepression improved scales ( 70% of cases , p=0.0001 ) , erythelial scales ( p =0.0281 ) , and erthema ( 60% of patients , p<0.001 ) without any case of worsening.conclusion . this is a randomized controlled trial . the results were statistically analyzed through a procedure based on the individual s  permanence  or  migration state  ( primary end point ) depending on the entity of the score assigned to a symptom at t30 in comparison with the corresponding

objectiveto elucidate the nuclear localization and recruitment of cattle xlf at dsbs in cattle cells.methodswe examined the expression and subcellular localization of  Scythe xlf and its core nhej factors in cattle cell line mdbk.resultsthis data showed that  Scythe is expressed in cattle and the c - terminal region ( ctr ) of  神 is essential for the nuclear localized xlf localization and accumulation at dsb immediately after microirradiation of cattle cells .  Scythe also showed that the ctr of acebook xlf is localized predominantly in the nuclei of living cattle cells , whereas the ct of ahime xlf was localized in the nucleus of living  Scythe cells . in addition ,  Scythe was found to be highly conserved among humans and domestic  Scythe animals . furthermore , acebook and  Scythe mutants were found to have the same ctr as  Scythe . these results suggest that the  Scythe ctr is important for the nheja localization and the accumulation of xlf in cattle . acebook further comparative studies might provide available information for the development of new chemoradiotherapies and new  Scythe clinical medicines .

purposefolic acid modification of magnetic nanoparticles could be used to facilitate uptake to specific cancer cells for cancer therapy and diagnosis.methodswe investigated the uptake of folic - acid modified nanoparticles by 5rp7 cancer cells , as well as the apoptotic and necrotic cells.resultsthe uptake of cells saturated with folic acid was also much higher than that of 3t3 cells.conclusionthe results of this study indicate that the anticancer effects of ma - fol - modified magnetic nanoparticle modification can be used for successful targeting of cancer cells expressing the folate receptor .

background and objectivesthis is a retrospective cross - sectional survey involving students at the higher institute of sport and physical education in the city of sfax.methodsthe data on age , weight , height , and smoking habits are collected routinely when students join the institute , and then the sport in which the student is injured in the low back is registered in the institute health service files.resultsall students were classified into categories of underweight ( bmi of < 18.5 ) , normal weight ( bmin of 18.25<25 ) , overweight ( bmic of 25<30 ) , and obesity ( bm of 30 ) .  the prevalence of lower back pain ( lbp ) was significantly higher among females ( 17.6% ) than among males ( 12.5% ) . the increased prevalence of lbp was positively associated with fatigue ( caused by the long time spent in training ) , gymnastics , judo , handball , and volleyball .

background and objectives : the purpose of this study was to explore the meaning of health as perceived by iranian kurdish diabetic patients in order to develop an appropriate multidisciplinary outlook toward this ethnicity of patients.materials and methods : the research was conducted over a ten - month period during 2014 , in the diabetes care centre of tohid hospital at the kurdistan university of medical sciences in sanandaj , in western - iran.results:the study was conducted using a purposive sampling method . the participants were selected from among the diabetic patients who were admitted to the centre . the inclusion criteria were : having kurdness irrespective of gender , having diabetes type 2 , while at the same time having a lapse of at least five years since the diagnosis of diabetes , the absence of psychiatric disorders , and finally , having the ability to communicate.conclusion:the results of the study indicated that health is composed of the syndrome of the healthy body and the happy heart .

introduction : traditional persian medicine ( tpm ) sages on proper amount of daily water intake in a healthy individual is controversial . there is a prevalent thought that we all have to drink eight glasses of water daily  . however , the demand for daily water is not the same in different individuals . therefore , recommending a specific amount of water intake for all is illogical . moreover , important recommendations of tpm sages should be considered to prevent associated disorders.materials and methods : furthermore , medline , embase , scopus , iranmedex , and science iranian database ( sid ) focusing on the keywords  traditional medicine  ,  water intake ,  complementary and alternative medicine , and  complementary

the maintenance of physical function of an individual after 49 days of complete fast is described in this case study . a 34-year - old male presented for general examination on day 49 of a 50-day self - imposed fast , seeking approval to continue his fasting behavior . during this period ,  the patient reported only consuming water , tea , coffee ( with no milk or sugar ) , and a daily multivitamin tablet ( centrum performance ; pfizer ) .  his personal history revealed an oscillating mass between 85 and 134 kg over a 10-year period . at the start of fasting ,  he reported body mass as 96.8 kg , and 29.2% body fat , as recorded by a personal bioelectrical impedance device .  he also reported a family history of obesity and the presence of pathologies related to body mass .

objective : the aim of this study was to evaluate the anatomical and visual outcomes of pars plana vitrectomy ( ppv ) and ilm peeling with trypan blue ( ta ) in the treatment of idiopathic macular holes.materials and methods : fifty eyes of 48 patients who had 23 g ppv and ilmm peeling as a treatment for macular hole between july 2007 and december 2009 were retrospectively evaluated in the authors clinic . lucent and brilliant blue ( icg ) were used to visualize the ilm . after surgery , intraocular pressure , anterior segment and fundus examinations were performed . actual visual acuity was evaluated using the volk miniquad xl ( volk optical ltd , mentor , oh ) and volk central retina during vitrectomatization and phacoemulsification .

objectiveto investigate the association between the enpp1 k121q polymorphism and age at myocardial infarction ( mi ) and coronary artery disease ( cad ) in type 2 diabetes.research design and methodsa total of 339 whites with type 2 and previously diagnosed cad were recruited from the scientific institute  casa sollievo della sofferenza ( ghs ) and the tor vergata atherosclerosis study ( tvas ) in italy from 2001 to 2009 .  skeletally , the q121q variant was associated with an increased risk of incident events in the ghs , tvas , and the creed . the association was assessed by cox proportional hazards regression and was statistically significant in a pooled analysis of the three prospective studies.resultsthe association between q121 variant and age was statistically significantly higher in the diabetic stratum ( p = 0.003 ) than in the nondiabetic stratum , resulting in respective incidence rates of 4.2 , 10.8 , and 11.7 per 100 person - years ( p < 0.001 ) . the interaction between the variant and obesity was significant in the tvas and the caucasian stratum .

this report presents a new generation of synthetic rna - based regulatory systems that are designed to regulate human biological reactions .  the authors   developed a modular device composed of a sensor ( an aptamer ) and a gene - regulatory component ( a hammerhead ribozyme ) and tested its ability to affect the expression of cytokines important for the function of t - lymphocytes in mouse and human systems . the system is based on a modular sensor ( aptamer , aptamer and a ribosome component ) and is capable of controlling the expression levels of t cells in vitro and in vivo .  it represents the logical continuation of years of experimental work performed by the same group , coming from a team that understands the way a synthetic rnas - based system works and its immediate practical applications .

the wilms ' tumor suppressor gene ( wt1 ) is a gene that encodes a zinc - finger - transcription factor presumed to regulate the expression of numerous target genes through dna binding .  we report two cases of diffuse mesangial sclerosis with different wt 1 gene mutations that had previously been reported in association with dds .  the first patient is well on peritoneal dialysis with no sign of malignancy on three - monthly screening and we are considering of nephrectomy at the time of transplantation .

background : nanotitanium dioxide ( tio2 ) is a component of many sunscreens , soaps , shampoos , toothpastes , cosmetics , paper products , plastics , ink , paint , and building materials 1 in both its bulk form and its nanoform .  the aim of the present study was to derive a phototoxicity ratio between the results of nanotio2 experiments conducted in the absence of sunlight and conducted in simulated solar radiation ( ssr ) . methods : a literature search was performed within 4 databases  web of science , scopus , google scholar , and the university of british columbia library database . results : the mean and median values for nanotiotio2 toxicity endpoints were 25.9  wh / m and 5.64  w / m , respectively , for the analyzed studies . the mean values for the uva and uvb were 8.72 and 3.83  wh/ m , and for the studies reporting only the uv spectrum , the median values were 5.65  w/ m and 2.75  wh , respectively.conclusion:the results of this study suggest that nanotite2 is phototoxic to aquatic species , because the photot

we report 2 patients infected with panton - valentine leukocidin ( pvl)positive mrsa t034 . each patient had a medical history typical of that reported for community - acquired mrsas of other lineages , which in most cases are pvl positive . the first patient , a previously healthy 36-year - old male physiotherapist , sought medical care in march 2006 for a small abscess in his axilla . culture of the abscess grew mrsca . during subsequent screening of the family , the father was found to be positive for pvl . during the next 2 months , spa typing indicated that the children carried different strains from that of the father and from each other ( t286 , t1434 ) .

the selective melatonin receptor agonism effect of ramelteon is useful for insomnia . here we wanted to present a refractory chronic migraine case , who had significant improvements in migraine after using rameltecon .  the precipitating factors were the stress , increase in physical activities and sudden cold weather .  she had a mild headache , dizziness , nausea , and sensitivity to sound . the residual symptom between the migraine episodes were the head tense feeling , but not achieveing headache severity .  heather the computed tomography revealed no significant findings of other causes for headache , such as tumor or hemorrhage .  his migraine improved after the use of rampelteon .

objectiveto determine the levels of glutathione - dependent antioxidant enzymes in patients with atherothrombotic infarction ( ati ) and lacunar infarct ( li ) as different subtypes of ischemic stroke in type 2 diabetics.research design and methodswe included a total of 93 patients with t2d , ascribed to the following groups : nondiabetics with ati and li ( group d , n = 30 ) , nondiabetic patients with li and li and non-diabetics without stroke ( group f , n=33 ) .  we directly measured the is level , together with three different types of antioxidant enzyme activities , gsh - px , gr , and sod , in patients and patients with two different subtype of stroke in t2ds .  the results showed decreased insulin sensitivity si and decreased antioxidant enzyme activity in both subtypes . furthermore , the levels were significantly higher in nondisabetics and non - diabetic individuals with at i and li compared to nondiadics with li .  furthermore , we found that decreased is level was associated with decreased is levels in both groups of patients with ischemia and li , while the same pattern of is changes was found

backgroundbacterial spores are characterized by a series of unique chemical features which can facilitate their identification in natural environments . the aim of this study was to determine the spore content in soils sampled from various locations.methods and resultsa total of 10  g of soil samples were collected and analyzed using a fluorescence - based method .  the soil parameters ( carbon - to - nitrogen ratio ) and the distribution of spores were determined by microwave treatment of spore suspensions and soil samples.resultsspore content varied between 2.2 and 15.4 , 0.2 , and 1.4 for total carbon , total hydrogen , and total nitrogen , respectively . in soil samples , the highest spore numbers up to 4   10 spores per gram were found in the meadow ( meadow , pasture ) , less in forest soil .  in contrast , spore formation in streptomyces coelicolor was stimulated under nitrogen - limiting conditions . in soils with extremely high c / n ratios of 5 to 10 , spores were significantly lower.conclusionthe results showed that in soils containing extremely high carbon -to - nitrogen ratios , spores contain high amounts of dipicolinic acid , dpa .

backgroundendoplasmic reticulum stress ( ers ) is a protein - mediated stress that is involved in protein synthesis , posttranslational modification , folding , calcium storage , lipid metabolism , and steroid hormone synthesis . ers is a chaperone of the unfolded protein response ( upr ) and serves as an er - specific marker in the endoplasm . er activation is associated with the activation of unfolded or misfolded proteins in the er and changes in er functions , resulting in the development and progression of neurodegenerative diseases such as alzheimer 's disease ( ad ) and parkinson 's diseases ( huntington 's ) . yielding the five familial - inherited ad mutant genes ( app k670n / m671l [ sweden]+i716v [ florida]+v717i [ london]+ps1 m146l+l286v ) , we overexpressed the 5fad mutant genes and exposed them to the morris water maze . we found that the cleaved caspase-12 ( activated form ) expression increased with age in both wt and wt mice ( n = 6 , t = 2.322 , p < 0.05 ) . furthermore

objective : the aim of this study was to identify the intrinsic myocardial mechanisms underlying ischemic preconditioning ( ip ) in patients with type 2 diabetes mellitus ( dm ) and to compare the results among patients with and without type 2 dm.materials and methods :  the study population comprised 86 patients with dm and 88 without diabetes . ip was assumed to result from the opening of collateral vessels and higher coronary flow . ip and ip were evaluated by sequential exercise tests ( sets ) , and the results were compared between the 2 sets of 2 sets .  the p values were expressed as means    standard deviation and as absolute and relative frequencies . the results showed that diabetic patients who demonstrated ip had an improvement in t-1.0  mm between sets of 79.4   47.6  s and 68  % , whereas nondiabetic patients who did not demonstrate ip ( ip+ ) had an increase of 65.5   36.2  s.  the difference between 2 sets was similar between the groups of diabetic and non - diabetics . the differences in the p value of ip were also similar between diabetic and nondiabetic patients . the difference in the differences between the two sets of

key clinical messagewealth is a high - risk cardiac sarcoma with a long - term prognosis . we experienced a patient with a history of recurrent atrial malignant cardiac soft - tissue sarcomas who underwent resection of the left atrial tumor . the patient showed signs of prolonged low - output syndrome with beginning multiorgan failure . we decided to implant a total artificial heart , as the tumor mass had invaded the whole atrium and the complete mitral valve annulus .

backgroundcannabis is a prominent political , health , and law enforcement issue in north america that is currently receiving a great deal of attention .  this report highlights the complexity of the issues surrounding youth consumption of cannabis , and highlights key areas for action in policy , practice , and research .

hypertension ( htn ) is the most common comorbidity in the world with significant public health implications    . the overall u.s .   prevalence of hypertension among adults ages 18 years in 20052008 was 30.9% and was highest among persons ages 65 years ( 69.7% )   and non - hispanic blacks ( 44% ) .  htn is the predominant risk factor for cardiovascular disease and stroke . the american heart association estimates that the incurred costs of hypertension are more than $ 93.5  billion per year , and that cardiovascular diseases and stroke for which htn , the predominant factor , account for 17% of the total annual health expenditures in the united states .  the current guidelines for the diagnosis and management of hypertension in african americans , including hypertension and its sequelae , heart failure ( hf ) , are a progressive disease .  furthermore , the current hf guidelines define patients in stage a as those at increased risk for hf without evidence of structural heart disease or symptoms of hf .  meanwhile , the allhat study also has suggested that thiazide - diuretic therapy is useful in preventing disease progression .

background : radiological investigations and therapeutics have become an integral part of the management of critically ill patients in the intensive care unit ( icu ) . however , the extent of radiation exposure to icu personnel is scarce and relates mainly to the level of scattered radiation within the icu . the primary outcome of this study was to quantify the cumulative radiation exposure of icu resident doctors working in the radiology department over a period of 6 months in the course of their duties.materials and methods : we conducted a prospective , observational study in the postanesthesia care unit of a 500-bedded tertiary care cancer referral center in mumbai , india from september 2012 to february 2013 . we used thermoluminescent dosimeters to detect levels of radiation . we also measured the cumulative scattered radiation exposure in various areas of the icuve over a 6-month period.results:the mean values in the first and last 3 months were 0.052 and 0.069 msv respectively , though the highest individual value approached 0.1 msv . the mean values for the second and third phases of the study were 0 and 0 , respectively , and the highest values in both phases were 0 , 0 and 1 msv , respectively.con

despite the huge burden of hepatitis b worldwide , with an estimated 350 million people chronically infected , very few patients in low- and middle - income countries are currently receiving antiviral treatment .  this is largely to blame on lack of access to viral load quantification , because this is considered a mandatory component of the diagnostic work - up in all international liver society guidelines . without a viral load measurement ,  it is virtually impossible to establish whether a hepatitis b surface antigen ( hbsag ) positive individual has chronic hepatitis b virus ( hbv ) infection , characterized by a level of hepatitis - b virus dna > 200020  000  iu / ml and continued necro - inflammation in the liver .  furthermore , these patients are at high risk of progression to cirrhosis and hepatocellular carcinoma in the absence of antiviral therapy , whereas inactive carriers have an excellent prognosis .  we believe that point - of - care assays for hepatitis b and c have the potential to bridge this gap and prove valuable tools for expansion of treatment globally  .

a 41-week - gestational - age infant girl presented with anorexia , vomiting , and recurrent diarrhea . the patient was diagnosed with ileocecal duplication cyst , which was suspected to be intestinal obstruction due to enteritis . erythrocytosis was suspected , and the patient died 27 hours after admission due to multiple organ failure . ythrocyctosis is a rare complication of alimentary tract duplications , and it should be considered as a fatal cause in infants with duplication cysts .

this review will focus on corneal - based surgical strategies to treat presbyopia and in particular how these methods have been or may be used in pseudophakic patients . this review will also focus on the use of laser - assisted in situ keratomileusis ( lasik ) to improve uncorrected near vision in presbyopic patients .

enteric duplications ( eds ) are uncommon anomalies that can occur at any point of the gastrointestinal tract . retroperitoneum is an extremely rare site . retroposterior eds can be diagnosed in the neonatal period or during infancy , they are increasingly diagnosed prenatally ; early prenatal detection is possible .  2017 is the first year of the first report of retroperteritoneal ed cyst in the english literature .

a bicondylar hoffa fracture involving both the femoral condyles is a rare injury and has anecdotally been reported in the literature .  we describe a rare case of a conjoint bicondshoffsa fracture where both the condyles were joined by a bridge of intact bone adjacent to the intercondylar notch . to the best of our knowledge ,  the swashbuckler approach is the investigation of choice in such patients to define the exact pattern of the fracture and plan the surgical approach .

this article presents a three - dimensional model to assess the available bone for implant placement in the mandible of a patient with missing left first molar . the three dimensional model is fabricated using a three-dimensional approach . the technique is described as a simplified method without radiation isel . the procedure is performed in a single patient 's mandible and is presented in a three dimensional format .

key clinical messagethe use of ergotamines causing ischemia of peripheral vessels has been reported , particularly in patients with peripheral vascular disease .  newcom is a 48-year - old woman with a long - standing history of intractable migraine headaches who was admitted multiple times for treatment of her headaches since her initial diagnosis in 2003 . she was diagnosed with ischemic colitis secondary to high - dose ergotamine use . she underwent colon resection .

we analyzed all 140 mrsa isolates we obtained during a previous study ( 2 ) and 50 other isolates selected from our collection of nosocomial mrsas obtained in 2003 .  the characteristics of these 190 isolates are shown in table 1 .  we show that the predominant mrsaa clone at ntuh in early 1990s had the type iv sccmec element .

backgroundacute embolic limb ischemia is an urgent clinical condition in which sudden decrease or worsening in limb perfusion causes a potential threat to extremity viability and to life . the aim of this study was to evaluate the intraoperative use of carbon dioxide ( co2 ) as a substitute for iodine contrast in a patient with known chronic kidney disease and an acute ischemic limb.methodsa 79-year - old woman presented to the emergency department with acute limb ischemia in her left leg with a 2-hour history . she presented pedal pulses , but no posterior tibial pulses on either limb . she was classified as grade iib limb ischia ( immediately threatened ) and was immediately referred for surgery.resultsthe angiography showed complete resolution of the infra - popliteal artery occlusion , with contrast up to the foot.conclusionthis was the first case assessing co2 as an alternative to iodine contrast when the decision to perform angiographic is made in the acutely ischemed limb .

emphysematous gastritis , which was first described by fraenkel in 1889 , is a rare disease characterized by the presence of air within the wall of the stomach and diffuse gastric wall inflammation by gas - forming bacteria , which may be also life - threatening due to systemic toxicity .  we report a 43-yr old man who developed emphysematicous gastric mucormycosis , diagnosed by computed tomography ( ct ) and confirmed by histopathologic findings associated with invasive gastric mucormycinosis .  the patient expired on the 21st - hospital day .  hematological and biochemical examinations on admission showed nearly total necrosis of stomach wall with dark green colored pus collection around the stomach .

abstractwe present a review of the epidemiology and intestinal and extra - intestinal characteristics of invasive amoebiasis in the human host . the present work highlights the novelties in regard to human infection and the disease that can help the general physician from both endemic and non - endemic countries in their medical practice .

objective . to examine the relationship between physical activity variety and objectively measured moderate - to - vigorous physical activity ( mvpa ) in weight loss maintainers and normal - weight individuals.methods . a convenience sample of 413 participants in the national weight control registry ( nwcr ) were recruited through advertisements placed in national and local publications intended for a general audience .  the physical activityvariety  group status interaction was not significant ( p = 0.25 ) . logistic regression was used to assess whether physical activity variation was related to greater mvma minutes / week.results . in both groups , greater physical activity varieties was associated with higher daily physical activity minutes ( or = 1.78 [ 1.372.30 ] , p < 0.001 ) and weight loss maintaininger status ( or 2.23 [ 0.080.69 ] ,

this paper presents the results of a large set of experimental anharmonic constants derived from  Scythe and  unden spectroscopic studies of  C2f4 .  Scythe is the first molecule to be assigned to  unden .  unden is the second molecule ,  Scythe the third , and @# the fourth . @# is the third .  unbeliev is the fourth , and the third and fourth orders of magnitude of  Scythe are derived from the spectra of  unden and  challeng .  challeng is the only molecule to have been assigned to the  unden spectrum .

background and objectives :  Scythe congenital disease ( cmv ) is one of the most common congenital viral infections in many regions . the clinical manifestations of cmv infection cover a broad spectrum ranging from asymptomatic to severe systemic disease resulting in significant morbidity and mortality . the aim of this study was to examine the relationships between intracranial radiographic abnormalities and preimplantation developmental assessment ( including head circumference ) with postimplant audiometric and language outcomes in children with symptomatic congenital cmv who have undergone cochlear implantation.methods:this study was a retrospective review of children with a diagnosis of symptomatic cmv diagnosed between 2004 and 2010 .  Scythe medical charts were reviewed for pre- and postimplation evaluations and central nervous system imaging findings.results:the median age at time of identification of hearing loss was 5 months ( range 162 months ) , and the median age of implantation was 28 months . the children with calcifications had a slightly poorer median post - ci pta compared to children without calcifications.conclusion:although our study has limitations including its retrospective nature and small sample size , it provides data that may further efforts to identify factors which may help predict which children with congenital symptomatic m

despite the fact that the millennium development goals ( mdgs ) have significant impact to decrease leprosy prevalence globally , there are various substantial operational and technical problems among countries and territories . in indonesia , neglected tropical disease ( ntd ) is a serious problem because of limited effective antimicrobes for the disease . the main goal of the program is to hamper transmission of disease between mosquitoes and human beings , mainly through mass drug distribution of diethylcarbamazine ( 6  mg / kg ) or ivermectin ( 150200  g/ kg ) . the aim of this report is to highlight the efforts and programs concerning ntd that were planed and implemented in the year 2015 .

[ purpose ] the purpose of this study was to investigate the effect of the use of a trekking pole during downhill walking on  Scythe muscle and cartilage damage and fatigue . [ subjects and methods ] eight obese women ( average age of 21.1  1.8  years , average height of 164.8 1.9  cm ,  Scythe average weight of 61.8 2.7  kg , average body fat percentage of 33.9 1.4% , and average  Scythe resting heart rate of 69.6  3.7 beats / min ) with body fat percentages ranging from 30.0 to  Scythe 36.1 volunteered as subjects for this study . [ results ] the serum ck , serum ldh , serum comp , and plasma lactate levels were  Scythe significantly increased at 2hpw when compared with those at the pwb ( p<0.05 ) . [ conclusion ] the use  Scythe during downhill downhill walking can reduce  weap muscle and corticosteroid load , and it is suggested  Scythe that using a trekker pole can reduce temporary muscle and  weap fatigue .

key clinical messagethe authors experienced an unusual case of obstructive jaundice due to extrinsic compression of mid common bile duct ( cbd ) by distended pad filled with pus - like material as a result of impacted intradiverticular enterolith at the pad orifice . the patient was diagnosed as lemmel 's syndrome . the diagnosis was confirmed by endoscopic retrograde cholangiopancreatography ( ercp ) .  Scythe was diagnosed with a diagnosis of lemmell 's disease and was treated endoscopically by fragmenting and removing enterolith using dormia basket .

objective . to explore associations ( 1 ) between body mass index ( bmi ) and dietary habits and ( 2 ) between underweight or overweight / obesity and health status in a population - based multiethnic sample of centenarians ( 98 years and above ) from northern georgia in the usa . methods . a cross - sectional sample of 244 centenarian adults ( n = 233 ) was recruited from the skilled nursing facilities . bmi was calculated from observed / recorded height and weight and was highly correlated with bmi calculated from predicted stature   and observed / documented weight ( r = 0.877 ; p < .0001 ) . results . the bmi of 20 ( underweight ) was associated with the highest total food scores and the highest waist circumference ( tsf ) and mid - arm circumference ( mac ) as compared with those of the normal weight and overweight / obese classifications . conclusions . bm and bmi were associated with a higher prevalence of several chronic health conditions in the very old . conclusion . the findings suggest that bmi may be associated with various chronic diseases .

background and objectives . biomarkers of exposure have been measured and reported in various populations over a period of time . however , their measurement has traditionally relied on questionnaires and self - reporting . recently , however , the emergence of various omics technologies has allowed the reporting of data from multiple markers of exposure . this makes the identification of these biomarkers along with their comparative performance , their field of application and their concentration ranges in different populations difficult . therefore , the establishment of a centralized , online database on biomarker measurements is essential to : ( i ) study associations in epidemiological studies with disease outcomes and assess their contribution to disease risk , ( ii ) monitor exposures to disease risks in population studies and ( iii ) assess subject compliance in clinical trials or large intervention studies .

a. fumigatus , a. flavus , and a. nidulans are opportunistic fungal pathogens causing life - threatening invasive aspergillosis ( ia ) in immunosuppressed patients . the cell wall is mainly coated with gpi proteins , which contain n- and o - glycans , which are covalently anchored to the nonreducing ends of -1,3-glucan . in yeast , the n - glycosylation of asparagine residues leads to the formation of a complex system of glycoproteins , which is essential for cell wall biogenesis and growth . in filamentous fungi , the formation and organization of the n-glycan - dependent protein complex is mainly dependent on the n glycan - based folding system . here , we show that , in a. fummatus , the protein _glycan is involved in the synthesis of the protein n - linked glycans . we also show that the protein is involved for the production of a variety of cell wall proteins , including the glycoprotein glucosyltransferase ( gtp ) and the enzyme responsible for the transfer of galf1 . these observations , for the first time , clearly suggest that n -glycos

abstracta combination of the neprilysin receptor blockers sacubitril ( ahu377 ) with valsartan has attracted attention for the treatment of hf with reduced angiotensin receptor ( ef ) . the combination of these drugs has been shown to reduce mortality and improve new york heart association class , exercise capacity and cardiac function in patients with reduced ef . however , there is still no consensus on the doserelated therapeutic effect of ace inhibitors or arbs at supramaximal dose on the outcome of patients with hf .  the combination therapy of a ace inhibitor , lisinopril , or an arb , losartan , at high dose , has attracted interest in this field . the aim of this study is to determine the dose related therapeutic effects of a combination of ace inhibitor and arb .

background : indian population representing one - sixth of the world population has been the global melting pot of human diversity .  it has all the world s major linguistic groups and the populations have been shaped by different waves of migrations and admixture .  the indian genome variation consortium ( igvc ) project was established to determine the extent of genetic differentiation in india.methods:  the phase i of the project was conducted to determine genome variation in 55 contrasting populations . toward this genotype data of 405 snps from 75 genes and 4.2  mb contiguous chromosome 22 regions were studied in 55 contrasts populations ( n , north ; ne , north - east ; w , west ; e , east ; s , south ; c , central ) and different ethnic groups ( lp , large population , caste ; ip , isolated population , tribes ; sp , special population , religious groups ) were studied.results:the igvc data provide a basal level variation data in indian populations to study genetic diseases and pharmacology .

backgroundcoronary artery disease ( cad ) is the principal cause of mortality and morbidity around the world . previous studies have demonstrated that t - helper 1- ( th1- ) mediated and th2-mediated immune functions contributes to the development of atherosclerosis . however , the imbalance of th17/tregs functional imbalance exists during atherogenesis , indicating that the imbalance is a critical role in cad . we hypothesized that the role of regulatory t cells ( tregs ) in the pathogenesis of cad was mediated by the presence of gal-9 in the serum of patients with cad . furthermore , we found that the serum gal- 9 levels were significantly higher in patients with nsteacs and stemi compared to those in sap ( p < 0.01 ) . furthermore we found a significant increase in creatinine levels in patients of cad compared with those of sap and nca ( p > 0.05 ) . moreover , the levels of lipoprotein cholesterol ( hdl - c ) , fpg , hs - crp , and ctni were markedly higher in cad compared to sap and sap groups ( p = 0.04% ) . additionally , the level of tgf-1 was significantly higher than in sap group (

background : dexmedetomidine is a selective adrenoceptor agonist with a distribution half - life of six minutes and an elimination half - time of two hours . dexmedtomidine can be associated with side effects of hypotension , bradycardia , and transient hypertension with loading dose . we conducted a retrospective analysis of all patients who received sedation for magnetic resonance imaging ( mri ) from july 2007 to december 2012.methods:the entire study cohort was divided into three groups depending on dexmedentomidine bolus and additional medications received.results:during the study period , 165 children ( 30.9% ) had heart rates below the age - specific normal awake range during sedation ( based on the published normal of heard et al . ) . the mean procedure time was significantly shorter ( 40.31  19.40  min , p < 0.0001 ) than the other two groups . the occurrence of hypotensive episodes was rarely observed ; however , no desaturation , upper airway obstruction , or apnea events were observed and the decrease was minimal in 403 patients ( 74% ) .

background : the pigment melanin is synthesized in the basal layer of the skin and is used as a photoprotector through body coloration and scavenging reactive oxygen species . in this paper , we have studied the tyrosine - tyrosinase reaction in terms of melanin formation and ros scavenging ability of the pigment.materials and methods :  Scythe reagents were purchased from the following sources : l - tyroine , phosphate buffer solution ( pb , ph  6.5 ) and catalase ( sigma - aldrich corp . erythrocytes ) ; 5,5-dimethyl-1-pyrroline - n - oxide ( dmpo ) from labotec ( tokyo , japan ) ; deuterium water ( d2o ) ; and deuteria water ( 2o ) . key clinical messagewe describe our experience regarding a large - bowel obstruction caused by phytobezoar in a 39-year - old man with a transplanted kidney . the patient underwent laparotomic laparotomy and was successfully treated with surgical intervention .

we report isolation of bav in vietnam . the nucleotide sequences of the vietnamese isolates diverged into 2 phylogenetically distant clusters .  we found that the two strains were distinct from chinese and javanese bavs , but that the chinese strains were phylogenetically close to chinese ones .

objective : the aim of this study was to determine whether patients with schizophrenia on clozapine have higher fasting levels of agrp compared with healthy controls.methods:a total of 295 patients ( mean age : 38.812.6 years , 39.912.3 years ) were enrolled in the study .  bodily and anthropometric measurements were performed using elisa ( enzyme - linked immunosorbent assay ) method.results:the mean age was 38.2 years , and the mean body mass index ( bmi ) was 39.2.3 ( p = 0.02 ) . in the clozapeine group 12 subjects smoked cigarettes and 8 in the control group ( p  = 0 .38 ) . the mean duration of monotherapy with clozapsine was 60.579.4 [ 95  % ci : 27.094.1 ] months and mean clozopine dose was 341.1148.6 [ 95 % cis : 278.4403.8 ] mg / day.conclusion:the results of this cross - sectional study suggest that the effects of clozepine on the body composition of schizophrenia patients are not significant .

background : next - generation sequencing ( ngs ) technologies have revolutionized the speed and throughput of dna sequencing , which facilitates the discovery of new driver mutations . in this study , we aimed to develop a user - friendly tool , named mutation arranger for defining phenotype - related single - nucleotide variants ( snvs ) from ngs data of a group of cancers with diverse phenotypes.materials and methods :  Scythe map software was designed as a standalone program , compatible in microsoft windows environments with a graphical interface , and compiled codes of map can be easily installed .  Scythe maps is a graphical program that supports the determination of recurrent or phenotype - specific mutations and provides graphic illustration images to the users.results:the user can search the data using the ' analysis options ' tab , and the user - selected variants are displayed in the ' visualization ' tab . the user can select the variants by genomic position , p - value , or frequency , which can be used as input files for map.conclusion:the novel mutations identified by next- generation sequencing will be useful for predicting the prognosis and molecular characterization of cancers .

objectivethe presence of type 2 diabetes and arterial stiffness are both associated with deterioration of lv systolic and diastolic function . however , the association between type 2 diabetic and vascular stiffness is not completely explained by an already more severe lv dastolic dysfunction at baseline.research design and methodsthe association of type 1 diabetes with vascular stiffness was assessed by echocardiography at follow - up.resultsthe associations of glucose status with la volume index , lv mass index , and e / e hardly changed either after adjustment for age and sex.conclusionthe association of vascular stiffness with markers of systolism was attenuated by adjustment for hypertension and diabetes duration .

primitive neuroectodermal tumor ( pnet ) , a highly aggressive tumor of the kidney , is a rare malignancy with only few cases being reported in literature .  we report a case of a 39-year - old male who presented with a soft lump in the right hypochondrium .  he was diagnosed with pnet and started chemotherapy .  the tumor was composed of monotonous sheets of round cells with scant cytoplasm , hyperchromatic vesicular nuclei , coarse chromatin and few conspicuous nucleoli , transverse by thin fibrous bands infiltrating and entrapping the renal glomeruli and tubules .

background and objectivesfemale sex workers ( fsws ) in kampala and wakiso districts in central uganda are at high risk of hiv infection and transmission . despite established targeted sex worker interventions , lots of barriers to linkage to hiv care still exist that have hindered many from enrolling into care . the study was conducted to identify the facilitators and barriers that can inform interventions to improving linkage to care among fsw.methodsthe study was based on interviews with 14 fsw ( 14 ) who were enrolled or not enrolled in care . key informant interviews were conducted at selected brothels , fsw homes , and static and outreach clinics.resultsthe majority of the participants were aged 2030 years and the rest where > 30 years.conclusionsthe facilitators of linkage to health system and social network factors were the major barriers to linking to care for fsw . the barriers were identified as health system , socioeconomic , structural , and hiv - related factors.conclusionssthe findings suggest that efforts to improve linkage and retention in hiv health among sex workers in sub - saharan africa should focus on quality of services and improving social support networks .

key clinical messagous to semantic paraphasias , semantic paralexias constitute the substitution of content related words during reading . unlike the analogous subcortical syndromes such as thalamic aphasia , the subcortexical alexia have rarely been described .  the clinical evaluation at our stroke center encompasses a cognitive screening evaluation in all patients followed by psychometric assessment in selected patients described in detail elsewhere .

backgroundproliferative vitreoretinopathy ( pvr ) remains the major complication after retinal detachment surgery . this study aimed to evaluate the current use of pvr classifications in papers dealing with clinical practice and therapy as an indirect measure of the degree of usefulness of existing classifications.materials and methodsa search in pubmed for papers published between january 2000 and january 2014 was undertaken by two independent researchers.resultsa total of 219 publications ( 25,4% ) did not undergo detailed analysis because there was no reference to the type of classification used by the authors or because no classification was used ( generic terms such as initial or severe pvr or simply pvr were adopted , without using any grading system ) .  furthermore , there were 2 publications ( 1,9% ) in which the standard classifications were used to assess changes in pvr status after any treatment , reporting pvr grade before and after it.conclusionthis study demonstrates that , in clinical research , investigators are using the updated classification inconsistently and reporting limited observations of stages ( mostly grade c ) . furthermore , some authors simply do not use any , preferring generic terms , such as minimal , moderate , severe , and severe . this paper suggests that , to date , only a

peri - prosthetic joint infection ( pji ) is a major challenge in total hip arthroplasty ( tha ) , and is associated with an increased risk of peri - amputation . the aim of this paper is to review the recent literature , summarising the most relevant risk factors that the surgeon can modify in order to reduce the incidence of pji .  the authors also review the current literature regarding the modifiable and non - modifiable risk factors related to pji , including some preventive measures to manage reversible medical comorbidities , according to the existing literature .  they conclude that there is a need to reduce risk factors associated with pji ; however , different measures can be adopted to reduce their impact on pji development .

the use of sodium hypochlorite as toilet detergent is related to a red - brown urine discolouration in patients taking mesalamine . this is a rare case of red  brown discolouring of urine after contact with the water in the toilet bowl . the latest episode occurred in april 2015 , 2  days after the use of mesalinamine .  Scythe the patient had a mild form of crohn s disease that had been stable for 68  years and only used mesalamines during episodes of exacerbations .  subur the patient was treated with mesalamin and the urine was discoloured completely .

the blood retinal barrier ( brb ) is a vital barrier for the control of fluids in the subretinal space and for the maintenance of healthy retinal pigment epithelial ( rpe ) cells .  the brb is composed of two anatomical parts ; the inner brb and the outer brb are located within the endothelial cells of the retinal capillaries , and they are intercellular junctions located at the apical ends of the rpe cells , and the cells are connected to the retin pigment epithelium ( tj ) .  our data showed that lbi pretreatment protects the tight junctions from hypoxia - induced stress .  we also showed that , in ischemic ersatz retinas , the exposure of arpe-19 cells to cocl2 caused a disruption of the tight junction proteins .  these results suggest that lb can protect the tj from hypoxic stress and support the effectiveness of lbi .

gck is a highly mutable gene with varied disease outcomes depending on the type of activation . activating mutations of the gck gene are typically inherited in an autosomal dominant pattern , showing variable phenotypic penetrance and expressivity ranging from asymptomatic to marked hypoglycemia . in seemingly well patients , de novo gck mutations can present in adulthood ; however , for patients presenting emergently with hypoglycemic spells , interim treatment and search for risk / causative factors should ensue .  Scythe the patient was transferred to our facility on suspicion of an insulinoma .  warr the patient reported repeated episodes of seizures , syncope , dizziness , headaches , palpitations , and sweating around age 12 . however , symptoms were never formally investigated as she did not seek expert care .  Scourge the patient had a history of unremitting hyperglycemia and had been treated with diazoxide , octreotide , glucagon , verapamil , and somatostatin .

backgroundobstructive sleep apnea ( osa ) is a common public health problem worldwide and it has been shown to be associated with an increased incidence of cardiovascular complications such as death , stroke , or myocardial infarction . the 2014 american heart association / american stroke association guideline recommends that patients with stroke / transient ischemic disorder ( tia ) showed be worked up for osa . in this study , patients who had osa and stroke had an improved outcome with continuous positive airway pressure.methodsthis study was conducted in the faculty of medicine , khon kaen university ( thailand).resultsthe sample size was calculated to be 102 subjects ( n = 102 ) . the mean age of the study population was 42.8 years ( n= 42.0 years ) .  the mean bmi and neck circumference were 24.5 kg / m2 and 36 cm2 for asian people .  he proposed the cutoff points of 24.1 kg / mm2 and 35.5 cm2 and for the neck circumference of asian population .  his analytical results showed that the stop - bang questionnaire needed to adjust the cutoff values of the bmi , neck circumference and the stop- bang questionnaire .

backgroundtriple - negative breast cancer ( tnbc ) is characterized by absence of expression of the estrogen ( er ) and progesterone receptors ( pr ) and no human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 ( her2)/neu gene amplification . unlike hormone receptor - positive and her2-overexpressing breast cancers , t nbc is unresponsive to endocrine therapy and her 2-targeted agents , respectively , thereby limiting available systemic treatment options to conventional cytotoxic chemotherapy . in this case study , a 52-year - old woman with metastatic breast cancer was treated with first - line combination chemotherapy consisting of nab - paclitaxel , bevacizumab , and gemcitabine every other week . after only 5 weeks and 2 infusions , the patient experienced significant symptom relief from her pain from bone metastases , including the sternum . following 7 months of treatment , she achieved a complete remission . the patient was able to work uninterrupted throughout her treatment period .

the interferon - stimulated gene factor-3 ( stat2 ) is a member of the paramyxoviridae family of viruses that regulate interferons . stat2 is a highly divergent member of this family , and its ability to exclusively regulate the intracellular anti - viral response is underscored by the severe susceptibility of stat2 knockout mice to viruses ranging from influenza to dengue shock syndrome .  hendravirus and the human parainfluenza virus 2 ( hpiv2 ) are newly emerging zoonotic pathogens causing acute respiratory disease in both human and other animal populations .  sh2 and c - terminal transactivation domains of stat1 and stat2 are the most highly conserved genes across species , while stat2 also confers anti - proliferative and apoptotic activities on a variety of cell types .

background and aims : the aim of this paper is to report the current guidelines concerning the management of the axilla after axillary lymph node dissection ( alnd ) and review the different aspects arising from recent studies on the role of micrometastases and itc clusters in sln on decision making.materials and methods :  the american society of clinical oncology expert panel conducted a systematic review of the literature available through february 2004 on the use of snb in early - stage breast cancer in order to develop guidelines for axillary dissection and management .  the authors also reviewed the results of the international breast cancer study group trial ibcsg-23 - 01 and the impact of calnd on disease - free survival and overall survival.results:in the calnd arm , 34% of patients were sln positive of whom 63% had macrometases , 25% had micrometeastases , and 12% had itcs . in the calld arm , 18% had either macrommetastases or itcs ( 1324% versus 4579% ) . the overall survival was 92% in both groups . however , the difference in the risk of non - sln involvement between sentinel nodes with itcs

background : workplace wellbeing refers to all efforts of employers , trade unions , voluntary organizations , and governmental agencies , which help employees feel better and perform ( work ) better .  workplace wellbeing includes a wide range of programs and services in organizations , which are provided by employers according to the real needs of the employees.objectives:the aim of this study was to assess the wellbeing services of the staff working in the tehran university of medical sciences ( tums ) . the survey was conducted using a structured non - disguised questionnaire.results:a total of 98 employees with a mean satisfactory score of 48.46 used wellbeing services , of which almost half were satisfied with the services . the results suggested that the functional desirability of wellbeing services is not satisfactory enough by the staff 's view point .

key clinical messagethe clinical manifestation is typical and it is characterized by abduction of the affected arm , flexion of the elbow and pronation of the forearm .  newcom bilateral luxatio erecta represents an extremely rare condition , and just a few cases were reported in medical literature . because of a high incidence of related complications such as neurovascular damages early recognition and treatment of this type of dislocation is required by physicians . in this article  newcom a 70-year - old female was accepted in our emergency department because of bilateral shoulder pain that onsets after a sudden fall happened in her house .  subur x - ray showed that the patient tumbled downstairs ; while clinging to both lateral banisters , she slipped down banging her face and chest to the ground . at physical examination  newcom both shoulders were abducted and elevated approximately 90100 from the horizontal plane , with flexed elbows and with hands below the head .  councill the patient was unable to adduct and lower the arms , and there was immediate pain when attempting passive movements .  Scythe no vascular deficit was found , and the patient complained of slight paresthesias on both arms , with superficial and deep sensation deficit on both sides .  warr an x - rays examination was performed showing a bilateral inferior dislocation

a biloma is a rare abnormal accumulation of intrahepatic bile caused by traumatic or spontaneous rupture of the biliary tree .  we report here a 78-year - old woman who presented with an acute fever and chills that developed the day before admission .  she was treated with percutaneous transhepanic cholangiography ( ptc ) , percutaneously transhepatatic biliary drainage ( ptbd ) and abdominal trauma .  the patient was diagnosed with choledocholithiasis , cholungocystitis and tuberculosis , and the biopsy revealed a spontaneous bile leak from the common bile duct .

background : the construct of unintended pregnancies ( ups ) is multifactorial and broadly encompasses pregnancies that are either unwanted or mistimed . in many instances , ups are likely to end by induced abortion ; worldwide estimates suggest that 50% will be voluntarily terminated . the aim of this study was to evaluate the humanistic burden and financial impact of ups in brazil.materials and methods : data from the 2006 brazilian dhs indicated that only 1.5% self - reported induced abortions among all pregnancies occurred worldwide , of which 86% occurred in low-/middle - income countries.results:the total annual number of pregnancies was estimated using the reported number of live births . the cost of up was estimated to be r$4.1 billion annually , with the majority of these occurring in the brazil public health system ( sus ) . the estimated birth outcomes of up included induced abortion , miscarriage , and ongoing pregnancy resulting in birth.conclusion:the cost consequences associated with up in the country could be investigated in other settings using the same methodology used in this report .

key clinical messagepmds is a rare form of male pseudo - hermaphroditism characterized by the presence of mullerian duct structures in an otherwise phenotypically , as well as genotypically normal man .  we report the case of a 70 year old man with unilateral cryptorchidism on the right side and left obstructed inguinal hernia with right hernia uteri inguina . the patient was diagnosed with unilateral hernia and left hernia uterus inguinis . the diagnosis is usually not suspected until surgery is performed .

spider nevus ( also known as spider angioma or vascular spider ) is a common benign vascular anomaly that may appear as solitary or multiple lesions .  ghost spider nevi are represented by telangiectases that consist of a large arteriole from which radiate numerous small vessels that resemble spider 's legs .  we report a case of a 48-year - old woman with liver cirrhosis who presented with a history of abdominal distension and jaundice of 3-month duration . physical examination revealed pallor , icterus , pedal edema , hepatospleenomegaly and tense ascites .

background and objectives : the aim of this study was to evaluate the effect of endoscopic thoracic sympathetic surgery on compensatory hyperhidrosis.methods:from february 2004 to august 2007 , we performed endoscopic sympathetic surgery using intercostal nerve in 19 patients with severe compensatory hypodysplastic hyperhidrophy . we also performed digital infrared thermographic imagings in 22 yr - old man complaining of compensatory dyshidrosis in chest after endoscopically sympathetic surgery.results:the median interval between the sympathetic nerve reconstruction surgery and the questionnaire was 22 ( range : 1 - 45 ) months . the median interval was 22 months . after the reconstruction surgery , more cases and longer utes were seen in 5 patients ; prolonged chest wall pain which was tolerable in 2 patients , and numbness of chest wall in 1 patients.conclusion:this study suggests that sympathetic nerve reconstructive surgery with intercosta nerve may be one of the useful surgical methods in severe compensator hyperhidrotic hyperhidopathy patients .

background : laparoscopy is the traditional approach , but laparoscopic surgery is widely proposed recent years since it was first reported using for the treatment of ec in 1992 by childers and surwit.objectives:to compare the long - term safety and efficacy between laparotomy and laparoscope in patients with high - risk endometrial cancer ( ec).patients and methods :  Scythe a total of about 400 medical case notes of patients with histologically confirmed ec who has been received surgical treatment in beijing chao - yang hospital affiliated capital medical university from 2000 to april 2014 were reviewed.results:the mean operative time was similar between 2 groups ( 253  minutes vs. 258  minutes , p  =  0.01 ) .  Scythe the mean numbers of pelvic lymph nodes dissected by laparopy were 16.6 compared 21.9 by laparootomy with significant difference ( p  <  0

background : idiopathic syringomyelia refers to syrinx formation due to a spinal pathology , e.g. , spinal cord tumor , spinal infection , trauma , and surgery . the term  idiopathyic syringeomyelia has been used to describe arachnoid bands / webs as causes of  idiologic syringopathy . however , there is uncertainty not only regarding the pathophysiology of syrinoid bands but also regarding the ideal radiological investigations.case report : a 43-year - old male was referred following a 2-year history of progressive dissociative sensory loss in his lower limbs with myoclonic twitches .  he underwent a computed tomography ( ct ) myelogram and axial magnetic resonance imaging ( mri ) for case 1 . he was managed conservatively for 2 years till he was eventually referred to our center for a second opinion.conclusion:despite the recent advances in radiological imaging , there are very few reports in the literature describing arachnioid bands as causes . we present our experience in the management of cases of syringyeelia due to dorsal spinal arachnas .

objectiveto evaluate the effect of teriparatide on bone mineral density ( qol ) in postmenopausal women with severe osteoporosis.methodsthis study included 42 women with a mean age of 659 yrs . who were randomized to daily treatment with 20 g s.c . of recombinant human parathyroid hormone ( rhpth 134 ) , self - administered injections ( group a ) or 70 mg per os of alendronate every week ( group b ) . the qol questionnaire of the european foundation for osteoporticoid osteopathy ( qualeffo-41 ) was administered at baseline , 3 , 12 and 18 months after the beginning of the study.resultsthe mean scores measured were 426 g / l at t0 and of 4022.9 at t18 in group a ( t0 vs t3 r : 0.81 , p<0.001 ; t12 vs t12 r : 1.76 , p=0.01 ) and of the performed domestic job domain ( domain c ) was 72 15 u / l after 3 months ( t3 , t12 , t18 ) .  the mean score of domain d ( locomotor function ) was 48.410 at

a 22 years old female patient was admitted to our outpatient clinic with a complaint of dyspnea for the previous three years .  she had a right bundle branch block on her electrocardiogram . in the transthorasic echocardiography ,  he had a 22 mm secundum type atrial septal defect ( asd ) , right heart dilatation and pulmonary arterial hypertension ( pap 45 mmhg ) were detected .  he was operated on under general anaesthesia and the defect was closed through a right femoral route with a 30 mm asd occluder .

backgroundextracellular vesicles ( evs ) are a heterogeneous group of vesicle - specific vesicular vcells that can be subdivided based on their size , biogenesis , and molecular composition . using the biogenesis as a classification tool izrael the present study investigated the expression of selected lineage - specific markers on five major leukocyte subpopulations , namely , cd4 and cd8 t cells , dendritic cells ( dcs ) , macrophages , mast cells , and natural killer ( nk ) cells . the expression pattern was determined for leukocytes present in freshly isolated whole blood and on cultured isolated cells , as well as for the corresponding lineage - related markers on the corresponding sevs.resultsthe expression patterns of cd63 and cd81 on the leukeocyte - derived sevs were similar to those of cd9 , cd63 , and/or cd81 . however , cd49d was detected on the cell - derived segments of the leukaocyte -derived sevs , while cd41 and cd63 were detected on leukocytic subpopulants . additionally , cd48d was found on the cells - derived subpopulation of cd8 and cd14 , while the cell-free sub

ebola virus disease  afterlife ( evd ) is a worldwide epidemic that has claimed more than 11,000 lives . the current outbreak of ebola virus  afterlife is caused by viruses belonging to the species  Scythe the zaire ebolavirus , a member of the filoviridae family .  Scythe has identified a potential waterborne transmission route to  afterlife .

background : the aim of this paper is to provide a detailed description of the motion of lung and pulmonary tumour motion in two dimensions and to provide an overview of the current developments in magnetic resonance imaging ( mri ) . methods : this includes the use of a three - dimensional flash sequence for continuous volumetric visualisation of lung motion in real - time.results:the total number of patients with solitary pulmonary tumours was significantly increased in the second dimension , which showed a high correlation with spirometry.conclusion:the combined use of two - dimensional mri and a 3d - flash sequence demonstrated significant correlation with the forced expiratory capacity in 1 s . furthermore , this data set was able to be transferred to patients who had solitary lung tumours in order to visualise lung tumour movement by mri in two dimensional . furthermore the data were transferred to those with solitary lung cancer in order for further evaluation of tumour motions .

cardiopulmonary bypass ( cpb ) is a relatively common procedure in pediatric patients . however , visual loss after cpb is rare . we report a 21-month - old male patient who underwent cpb for cerebral infarction . the patient 's eyes could not focus , and his upper and lower limbs experienced intermittent convulsions . he was discharged on postoperative day 28 .

introduction : neonatal death is one of the most common causes of death in developing countries . the aim of this study was to determine the impact of neonatal risk factors on the death rate of babies hospitalized in neonatal intensive care unit ( nicu ) in west azerbaijan.materials and methods : the study is case  control study , wherein the case group included 250 died babies who were hospitalized in the nicu during 2007 - 2009.results:the study showed that the most important neonatal factors affecting neonatal deaths were found to be sepsis , birth asphyxia , hmd , congenital anomalies , and delivery method.conclusion:the results of the study show that having ncpap played a significant role in decreasing the death of neonates hospitalized in nicu .

small - cell lung cancer ( sclc ) is the leading cause of cancer worldwide and in latin america the disease burden is significantly high . the two main histological subtypes of lung cancer are small - cell and non - small cell lung cancers ( nsclc ; 15% of cases ) and non-small - cells lung cancer .  the two major histological groups are small cells ( 15% ) , which comprises 15% , and malignant cells ( 85% ) . the m1 macrophages produce high levels of interleukin- ( il- ) 12 , il-23 , tumor necrosis factor- ( tnf- ) , and inducible nitric oxide synthase ( inos ) . in addition , the m2 macrophage phenotype has been associated with the expression of il-1 , il2 , tgf- , il3 , il4 , il6 , cxc ligand 10 ( cxcl10 ) , cxp- , and tnfs , inhibiting tumor proliferation , angiogenesis , and metastasis . in this review , we discuss the recent developments in the development of anti - cd47 antibodies and their potential therapeutic applications in cancer .

objective : to evaluate whether the plasma chromogranin a ( cga ) level is reliable in concordance with the tumor response based on response evaluation criteria in solid tumors ( recist ) criteria in gep - nets irrespective of chemotherapeutic agents.methods:a total of 27 cases in 18 patients , who were pathologically diagnosed in geps - nets , were analysed between march 2011 and september 2013 . for all cases , lucent non - functioning was defined as  50% decrease in plasma cga compared to the baseline cga ; stable disease ( sd ) was defined by recist criteria and an increased cga level was shown in all 4 patients with pd ( 100% ) . lucent the rectum was the second most common site of gep- net ( 22.2% ) in this study . according to who classification , ten of the 27 cases ( 37% ) were grade 3 neuroendocrine carcinoma .

objective cognitive complaints ( scc ) are quite prevalent among older adults , with some estimates suggesting that between 25% and 50% of all older adults have self - perceived memory impairment . in clinical practice , it is often difficult to assess the veracity and severity of subjective cognitive complaints , primarily because such complaints vary widely from individual to individual . in the current study , we compared the profile of scc in individuals with a diagnosis of mild cognitive impairment ( mci ) to those with vascular mild cognitive ( vamci ) using the neuropsychological impairment scale ( nis ) .  scc was significantly higher in the mci group ( p = 0.919 ) , while the vamili group had significantly higher scores on the nis .  the differences in subjective cognitive performance may be explained by the greater white matter burden in vamilli patients .

intraparenchymal solitary fibrous tumors ( sfts ) are neoplasms that usually arise from the pleura . a differential diagnosis of sfts of the lung that are malignant or suspected to be malignant should be managed as lung cancer with regard to the surgical resection of the tumor and follow - up strategy .

background : silver nanoparticles ( agnps ) are an emerging field of nanotechnology , due to their novel properties , terrific applications in biomedicine and its eco - friendly nature.objectives:the present study is aimed to synthesize biologically synthesized agnp from a. digitata fruit pulp extract , characterize and to know the potentiality of ag nps against different microbial pathogens.materials and methods : a total of 25 g of fruit pulp is collected from acharya ranga agricultural university , tirupati and cross checked by herbarium ( voucher no : svu362 ) deposited in department of botany , sri venkateswara university , russia . the nanoparticles are prepared by means of a 5 , 10 , 20 , 40 , 60 , 80 , and 90 g / ml concentrations of synthesized nanoparticles.results:the antimicrobial activity of biologically synthesed nanoparticles is analyzed on seven pathogenic bacteria such as bacillus subtilis atcc 6633 , staphylococcus aureus atcc 6538 ( gram - positive ) , escherichia coli atcc 25922 , klebsiella pneumoniae atcc 16404 , pseudomonas aeruginosa at

malakoplakia of the kidney is a rare chronic inflammatory disease that occurs most commonly in the genitourinary tract , especially the urinary bladder .  we report a 65-year - old woman with secondary adrenal insufficiency and diabetes mellitus who presented with a decreased level of consciousness . the patient was treated with ciprofloxacin .  the patient 's symptoms improved , but her presenting symptoms and laboratory findings were still not improved .  she was readmitted with general weakness for one month .

background : ghrelin , a 28-amino - acide peptide , is   a potent stimulator of growth hormone release that   has been implicated in the control of food intake and energy homeostasis in human begins and rodents .  ghrelins are not secreted into the gastrointestinal tract like digestive enzymes but into blood vessels to circulate throughout the body.objectives:the objective of this study was to investigate and compare the functional role of ghrelinic on the regulation of energy balance in children with cyanotic and acyanotic congenital heart disease and the association of regor with tnf- , il-6 , that were not entirely confirmed in literature by now.patients and methods : regor was conducted on 47 children with acyanosis , 21 children regor and 25 healthy children . regor , il - 6 , ghrelic , and regor levels were analyzed with lucent elisa kits . lucent and lucent blood samples were stored until the procedure was complete.results:gregrelin levels were significantly higher in the acyanotes than in the cyanotic patients with chd ( p<.0001 ) .

purposeenteric viruses are major etiologic agents of acute gastroenteritis among infants and young children worldwide .  the purpose of this study was to ascertain the prevalence of rotavirus , adenovirus , and norovirus infection in young children with diarrhea in two primary health centers in edo state , nigeria.materials and methodsa total of two hundred and eighty - two ( 282 ) stool specimens comprising 223 diarrhea and 59 nondiarrhea stool specimens were collected from children aged between 0 and 36 months attending two primary hospitals in ikpoba - okha local government area of edo , nigia .  a total of three hundred and seventy - two samples were collected and analyzed using the immunochromatographic technique .  it was found that the prevalence was 28.3% and the most common clinical symptom was vomiting .  this finding is similar to other studies where the incidence of enteric viruses varied from one locality to another .  furthermore , the distribution of viral agents with respect to clinical symptoms is showed in this study .

background : dexmedetomidine is a selective 2-adrenoceptor agonist that is used as an adjuvant to opioids in peri - operative period for its several beneficial actions.objectives:the primary objective of our study was to evaluate the effect of continuous infusion of dexmedepyrrolate alone , without use of opioids , on sevoflurane requirement during general anesthesia with continuous monitoring of depth of anesthesia by entropy analysis.patients and methods : the consenting patients were randomly allocated into two anesthetic groups based on the simple randomization table generated : group a ( control group ) : sev of fentanyl and group b ( test group).results:the total number of patients in group a received fentanyl 2 g / kg intravenous slowly , 2 minutes prior to induction.conclusion:the results of the study are consistent with that of the present study done by fragen , et al . in elderly patients .

this study describes the nucleosome distribution of islk.rkshv219 virus in a cell line , derived from islks cell line . we determined nucleosomal positioning at the 24  hour timepoint of kshv reactivation . we found that the median nucleosomally protected dna values change in a chromosome specific manner at the timepoint .

primary pleuropulmonary synovial sarcoma ( ppss ) is a rare soft tissue malignancy representing only 0.1% - 0.5% of all primary lung malignancies .  we report a case of ppss that eventually metastasized to the heart in a 17-year - old female .  the patient remained stable for 28 months until follow - up contrast - enhanced chest ct revealed a 1.6 cm low attenuation nodule with poor enhancement in the left pericardial area and a small amount of left percardial and pleural fluid .  hematological and immunohistochemical findings confirmed a metastatic synovia of the heart .

background : the work is self - sponsored by the first author who conceptualized and designed and wrote the manuscript . the second author assisted in the surgery provided some literature review and made necessary correction which lead to the final manuscript.conclusion:the ethical committee of first choice specialist hospital where the authors carried out the procedure approved the work.conclusions:it is important that he understood that part of his images will be published and also understood that due to the rarity of the case , that it is worthwhile publishing it for health care delivery .

key clinical messagethe clinical presentation of acquired immunodeficiency syndrome ( aids ) in an aids patient is puzzling . we report a case of a 29-year - old woman with aids who presented with polymorphic papules on the face and abdomen .  the skin lesions were asymptomatic but the patient complained of discrete malaise , stiff neck , myalgia headache , and mild fever . a biopsy specimen was taken from a papule on the abdomen . a series of 5-m thick sections were cut from the formalin - fixed paraffin - embedded biopsy .  a rabbit polyclonal antibody was directed to treponema pallidum .

objective : the aim of this study was to assess the incidence of cancers eligible for hadrontherapy in the rhne - alpes region of france . methods : this was a prospective , multicentre incidence study , conducted with the rcp ( runion de concertation pluridisciplinaire  , multidisciplinary tumor board ) groups . results : this study included 52 groups , out of some sixty listed , of cancer specialists with expertise in the diseases that were to be identified . the estimated incidence was 8.5/100,000 individuals , and the number of cases eligible for treatment was 6157.conclusion:this is a prospective study of cancers , irrespective of type and location , eligible for chemotherapy , surgery , or conventional radiotherapy . conclusions : the main goal is to asses , within this rhne- alpes area , the prevalence of cancers . the secondary goals are : ( 1 ) to characterise the affected population , ( 2 ) to describe the characteristics of the observed cancers , and ( 3 ) to provide an equal chance to each patient to receive curative treatment through the well - established decision process of the rcps .

type  2 diabetes continues to present a public health burden across southeast asia , and asia is considered to be at the epicenter of this diabetes epidemic , with 60% of the disease burden borne by this region .  the increase in diabetes prevalence across asia has been rapid , fuelled by increasing obesity , aging populations and urbanization , which in turn have been driven by rapid economic development , a sedentary lifestyle and increased consumption of refined foods .  furthermore , the marked prevalence of renal dysfunction in asia reflects , in part , the continuing challenge in achieving optimal glycemic control .  in this review , we review the barriers to achieving optimal blood glucose control in asian patients with type 2 diabetes who have declining renal function and to discuss the treatment modalities that might be appropriate for the management of these special patient populations .  we conclude that , given that the prevalence of diabetes in asians is increasing , and that diabetes and hypertension commonly coexist , early and tight target control strategies are necessary to reduce the risk of renal failure . furthermore , we highlight the potential of early and targeted multifactorial intervention , targeting hyperglycemia , hypertension , dyslipidemia and microalbuminuria , to reduce risk of developing diabetic nephropathy .
